authors_text: Weihao Yu,Chenyang Si,Pan Zhou,Mi Luo,Yichen Zhou,Jiashi Feng,Shuicheng Yan,Xinchao Wang
title: MetaFormer Baselines for Vision
title_zh: MetaFormer 视觉基线
abstract: MetaFormer, the abstracted architecture of Transformer, has been found to play a significant role in achieving competitive performance. In this paper, we further explore the capacity of MetaFormer, again, without focusing on token mixer design: we introduce several baseline models under MetaFormer using the most basic or common mixers, and summarize our observations as follows: (1) MetaFormer ensures solid lower bound of performance. By merely adopting identity mapping as the token mixer, the MetaFormer model, termed IdentityFormer, achieves >80% accuracy on ImageNet-1K. (2) MetaFormer works well with arbitrary token mixers. When specifying the token mixer as even a random matrix to mix tokens, the resulting model RandFormer yields an accuracy of >81%, outperforming IdentityFormer. Rest assured of MetaFormer's results when new token mixers are adopted. (3) MetaFormer effortlessly offers state-of-the-art results. With just conventional token mixers dated back five years ago, the models instantiated from MetaFormer already beat state of the art. (a) ConvFormer outperforms ConvNeXt. Taking the common depthwise separable convolutions as the token mixer, the model termed ConvFormer, which can be regarded as pure CNNs, outperforms the strong CNN model ConvNeXt. (b) CAFormer sets new record on ImageNet-1K. By simply applying depthwise separable convolutions as token mixer in the bottom stages and vanilla self-attention in the top stages, the resulting model CAFormer sets a new record on ImageNet-1K: it achieves an accuracy of 85.5% at 224x224 resolution, under normal supervised training without external data or distillation. In our expedition to probe MetaFormer, we also find that a new activation, StarReLU, reduces 71% FLOPs of activation compared with GELU yet achieves better performance. We expect StarReLU to find great potential in MetaFormer-like models alongside other neural networks.

With just conventional token mixers dated back five years ago, the models instantiated from MetaFormer already beat state of the art. (a) ConvFormer outperforms ConvNeXt. Taking the common depthwise separable convolutions as the token mixer, the model termed ConvFormer, which can be regarded as pure CNNs, outperforms the strong CNN model ConvNeXt. abstract_zh: MetaFormer 是 Transformer 的抽象架构，人们发现它在实现竞争性能方面发挥着重要作用。在本文中，我们再次进一步探索 MetaFormer 的能力，而不关注令牌混合器设计：我们使用最基本或常见的混合器介绍了 MetaFormer 下的几个基线模型，并将我们的观察总结如下：（1）MetaFormer 确保了可靠的性能下限。通过仅采用身份映射作为令牌混合器，MetaFormer 模型（称为 IdentityFormer）在 ImageNet-1K 上实现了 >80% 的准确率。 (2) MetaFormer 与任意令牌混合器配合良好。当将令牌混合器指定为随机矩阵来混合令牌时，生成的模型 RandFormer 的准确度 >81%，优于 IdentityFormer。当采用新的令牌混合器时，请放心 MetaFormer 的结果。 (3) MetaFormer 毫不费力地提供最先进的结果。仅使用五年前的传统令牌混合器，MetaFormer 实例化的模型就已经超越了现有技术。 (a) ConvFormer 优于 ConvNeXt。以常见的深度可分离卷积作为令牌混合器，称为ConvFormer的模型可以被视为纯CNN，其性能优于强大的CNN模型ConvNeXt。 (b) CAFormer 在 ImageNet-1K 上创造了新记录。通过简单地在底部阶段应用深度可分离卷积作为令牌混合器，在顶部阶段应用普通自注意力，生成的模型 CAFormer 在 ImageNet-1K 上创造了新记录：在没有外部数据或蒸馏的正常监督训练下，它在 224x224 分辨率下实现了 85.5% 的准确率。在我们探索 MetaFormer 的过程中，我们还发现新的激活 StarReLU 与 GELU 相比减少了 71% 的激活 FLOP，但仍实现了更好的性能。我们期望 StarReLU 能够与其他神经网络一起在类似 MetaFormer 的模型中找到巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了MetaFormer架构在视觉任务中的潜力，通过使用基础或常见混合器设计多个基线模型，并验证其性能。
AI.motivation: 验证MetaFormer架构在无需复杂设计的情况下能否通过简单混合器实现竞争力性能，为视觉模型提供灵活且高效的基线。
AI.method: 引入基于MetaFormer的基线模型（如IdentityFormer、RandFormer、ConvFormer、CAFormer），采用不同混合器（如恒等映射、随机矩阵、深度可分离卷积、自注意力），并测试新型激活函数StarReLU。
AI.result: IdentityFormer在ImageNet-1K上达80%+精度，RandFormer超81%，ConvFormer优于ConvNeXt，CAFormer在224x224分辨率下达85.5%精度；StarReLU较GELU减少71%计算量且性能更优。
AI.conclusion: MetaFormer具有高度灵活性和性能上限，即使使用简单混合器亦可超越SOTA；StarReLU为未来研究提供高效激活方案。

authors_text: Hongge Wang,Hui Chai,Bin Chen,Aizhen Xie,Rui Song,Bo Su
title: Flying Trot Control Method for Quadruped Robot Based on Trajectory Planning
title_zh: 基于轨迹规划的四足机器人飞步控制方法
abstract: An intuitive control method for the flying trot, which combines offline trajectory planning with real-time balance control, is presented. The motion features of running animals in the vertical direction were analysed using the spring-load-inverted-pendulum (SLIP) model, and the foot trajectory of the robot was planned, so the robot could run similar to an animal capable of vertical flight, according to the given height and speed of the trunk. To improve the robustness of running, a posture control method based on a foot acceleration adjustment is proposed. A novel kinematic based CoM observation method and CoM regulation method is present to enhance the stability of locomotion. To reduce the impact force when the robot interacts with the environment, the virtual model control method is used in the control of the foot trajectory to achieve active compliance. By selecting the proper parameters for the virtual model, the oscillation motion of the virtual model and the planning motion of the support foot are synchronized to avoid the large disturbance caused by the oscillation motion of the virtual model in relation to the robot motion. The simulation and experiment using the quadruped robot Billy are reported. In the experiment, the maximum speed of the robot could reach 4.73 times the body length per second, which verified the feasibility of the control method.
summary: An intuitive control method for the flying trot, which combines offline trajectory planning with real-time balance control, is presented. The motion features of running animals in the vertical direction were analysed using the spring-load-inverted-pendulum (SLIP) model, and the foot trajectory of the robot was planned, so the robot could run similar to an animal capable of vertical flight, according to the given height and speed of the trunk. To improve the robustness of running, a posture control method based on a foot acceleration adjustment is proposed. A novel kinematic based CoM observation method and CoM regulation method is present to enhance the stability of locomotion. To reduce the impact force when the robot interacts with the environment, the virtual model control method is used in the control of the foot trajectory to achieve active compliance. By selecting the proper parameters for the virtual model, the oscillation motion of the virtual model and the planning motion of the support foot are synchronized to avoid the large disturbance caused by the oscillation motion of the virtual model in relation to the robot motion. The simulation and experiment using the quadruped robot Billy are reported. In the experiment, the maximum speed of the robot could reach 4.73 times the body length per second, which verified the feasibility of the control method.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种将离线轨迹规划与实时平衡控制相结合的直观的飞跑控制方法。利用弹簧加载倒立摆（SLIP）模型分析了动物在垂直方向上奔跑的运动特征，规划了机器人的足部轨迹，使得机器人根据给定的躯干高度和速度，可以像垂直飞行的动物一样奔跑。为了提高跑步的鲁棒性，提出一种基于足部加速度调节的姿势控制方法。提出了一种基于运动学的 CoM 观察方法和 CoM 调节方法来增强运动的稳定性。为了减少机器人与环境交互时的冲击力，在足部轨迹的控制中采用虚拟模型控制方法，实现主动柔顺。通过为虚拟模型选择合适的参数，使虚拟模型的振荡运动与支撑脚的规划运动同步，避免虚拟模型的振荡运动对机器人运动产生较大的干扰。报道了四足机器人Billy的模拟和实验。实验中，机器人的最大速度可达每秒4.73倍身体长度，验证了控制方法的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合离线轨迹规划与实时平衡控制的四足机器人飞奔步态控制方法。
AI.motivation: 通过分析动物奔跑时的垂直运动特征，旨在提升四足机器人奔跑的稳定性与效率，实现类似动物的垂直飞行能力。
AI.method: 基于SLIP模型分析运动特性，规划足部轨迹；采用足部加速度调整的姿势控制方法；提出基于运动学的质心观测与调节方法；利用虚拟模型控制实现主动柔顺，同步虚拟模型振荡与支撑足运动。
AI.result: 通过仿真与Billy四足机器人实验验证，机器人最大速度达到4.73倍体长/秒，证明了控制方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过轨迹规划与平衡控制的结合，有效提升了四足机器人奔跑的稳定性与运动速度。

By selecting the proper parameters for the virtual model, the oscillation motion of the virtual model and the planning motion of the support foot are synchronized to avoid the large disturbance caused by the oscillation motion of the virtual model in relation to the robot motion. authors_text: Hang Gao,Ruilong Li,Shubham Tulsiani,Bryan Russell,Angjoo Kanazawa
title: Monocular Dynamic View Synthesis: A Reality Check
title_zh: 单目动态视图合成：现实检验
comment: NeurIPS 2022. Project page: https://hangg7.com/dycheck. Code: https://github.com/KAIR-BAIR/dycheck
comments: NeurIPS 2022. Project page: https://hangg7.com/dycheck. Code: https://github.com/KAIR-BAIR/dycheck
abstract: We study the recent progress on dynamic view synthesis (DVS) from monocular video. Though existing approaches have demonstrated impressive results, we show a discrepancy between the practical capture process and the existing experimental protocols, which effectively leaks in multi-view signals during training. We define effective multi-view factors (EMFs) to quantify the amount of multi-view signal present in the input capture sequence based on the relative camera-scene motion. We introduce two new metrics: co-visibility masked image metrics and correspondence accuracy, which overcome the issue in existing protocols. We also propose a new iPhone dataset that includes more diverse real-life deformation sequences. Using our proposed experimental protocol, we show that the state-of-the-art approaches observe a 1-2 dB drop in masked PSNR in the absence of multi-view cues and 4-5 dB drop when modeling complex motion. Code and data can be found at https://hangg7.com/dycheck.
summary: We study the recent progress on dynamic view synthesis (DVS) from monocular video. Though existing approaches have demonstrated impressive results, we show a discrepancy between the practical capture process and the existing experimental protocols, which effectively leaks in multi-view signals during training. We define effective multi-view factors (EMFs) to quantify the amount of multi-view signal present in the input capture sequence based on the relative camera-scene motion. We introduce two new metrics: co-visibility masked image metrics and correspondence accuracy, which overcome the issue in existing protocols. We also propose a new iPhone dataset that includes more diverse real-life deformation sequences. Using our proposed experimental protocol, we show that the state-of-the-art approaches observe a 1-2 dB drop in masked PSNR in the absence of multi-view cues and 4-5 dB drop when modeling complex motion. Code and data can be found at https://hangg7.com/dycheck.
abstract_zh: 我们研究单目视频动态视图合成（DVS）的最新进展。尽管现有的方法已经证明了令人印象深刻的结果，但我们展示了实际捕获过程与现有实验协议之间的差异，这在训练过程中有效地泄漏了多视图信号。我们定义有效的多视图因子（EMF）来根据相对相机场景运动量化输入捕获序列中存在的多视图信号量。我们引入了两个新指标：共同可见性掩模图像指标和对应准确性，这克服了现有协议中的问题。我们还提出了一个新的 iPhone 数据集，其中包含更多样化的现实生活变形序列。使用我们提出的实验协议，我们表明，在没有多视图线索的情况下，最先进的方法观察到掩蔽 PSNR 下降 1-2 dB，在建模复杂运动时观察到 4-5 dB 下降。代码和数据可以在 https://hangg7.com/dycheck 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文研究单目视频动态视角合成（DVS）的最新进展，提出新的评估指标和数据集以更准确地反映实际应用场景。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在训练过程中可能泄露多视角信号，导致实验结果与实际捕获过程存在偏差，需改进评估协议以提高模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 定义有效多视角因子（EMFs）量化输入序列中的多视角信号，提出遮挡掩码图像指标和对应精度指标，并构建包含更多真实变形序列的iPhone数据集。
AI.result: 在无多视角线索时，先进方法的遮挡PSNR下降1-2dB；复杂运动建模下下降4-5dB，验证了新评估协议的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法在真实场景中存在性能局限，新提出的评估框架和数据集可更准确反映动态视角合成的实际效果。

We also propose a new iPhone dataset that includes more diverse real-life deformation sequences. Using our proposed experimental protocol, we show that the state-of-the-art approaches observe a 1-2 dB drop in masked PSNR in the absence of multi-view cues and 4-5 dB drop when modeling complex motion. authors_text: Zhaopeng Dou,Zhongdao Wang,Weihua Chen,Yali Li,Shengjin Wang
title: Reliability-Aware Prediction via Uncertainty Learning for Person Image Retrieval
title_zh: 通过人物图像检索的不确定性学习进行可靠性感知预测
abstract: Current person image retrieval methods have achieved great improvements in accuracy metrics. However, they rarely describe the reliability of the prediction. In this paper, we propose an Uncertainty-Aware Learning (UAL) method to remedy this issue. UAL aims at providing reliability-aware predictions by considering data uncertainty and model uncertainty simultaneously. Data uncertainty captures the ``noise" inherent in the sample, while model uncertainty depicts the model's confidence in the sample's prediction. Specifically, in UAL, (1) we propose a sampling-free data uncertainty learning method to adaptively assign weights to different samples during training, down-weighting the low-quality ambiguous samples. (2) we leverage the Bayesian framework to model the model uncertainty by assuming the parameters of the network follow a Bernoulli distribution. (3) the data uncertainty and the model uncertainty are jointly learned in a unified network, and they serve as two fundamental criteria for the reliability assessment: if a probe is high-quality (low data uncertainty) and the model is confident in the prediction of the probe (low model uncertainty), the final ranking will be assessed as reliable. Experiments under the risk-controlled settings and the multi-query settings show the proposed reliability assessment is effective. Our method also shows superior performance on three challenging benchmarks under the vanilla single query settings.
summary: Current person image retrieval methods have achieved great improvements in accuracy metrics. However, they rarely describe the reliability of the prediction. In this paper, we propose an Uncertainty-Aware Learning (UAL) method to remedy this issue. UAL aims at providing reliability-aware predictions by considering data uncertainty and model uncertainty simultaneously. Data uncertainty captures the ``noise" inherent in the sample, while model uncertainty depicts the model's confidence in the sample's prediction. Specifically, in UAL, (1) we propose a sampling-free data uncertainty learning method to adaptively assign weights to different samples during training, down-weighting the low-quality ambiguous samples. (2) we leverage the Bayesian framework to model the model uncertainty by assuming the parameters of the network follow a Bernoulli distribution. (3) the data uncertainty and the model uncertainty are jointly learned in a unified network, and they serve as two fundamental criteria for the reliability assessment: if a probe is high-quality (low data uncertainty) and the model is confident in the prediction of the probe (low model uncertainty), the final ranking will be assessed as reliable. Experiments under the risk-controlled settings and the multi-query settings show the proposed reliability assessment is effective. Our method also shows superior performance on three challenging benchmarks under the vanilla single query settings.
abstract_zh: 当前的人物图像检索方法在准确性指标方面取得了很大的进步。然而，他们很少描述预测的可靠性。在本文中，我们提出了一种不确定性感知学习（UAL）方法来解决这个问题。 UAL 旨在通过同时考虑数据不确定性和模型不确定性来提供可靠性感知的预测。数据不确定性捕获样本中固有的“噪声”，而模型不确定性描述了模型对样本预测的置信度。具体来说，在 UAL 中，(1) 我们提出了一种无采样数据不确定性学习方法，在训练期间自适应地为不同样本分配权重，降低低质量模糊样本的权重。(2) 我们利用贝叶斯框架，假设网络参数遵循伯努利分布，对模型不确定性进行建模。(3) 数据不确定性和模型不确定性为在统一网络中共同学习，它们作为可靠性评估的两个基本标准：如果探针是高质量的（低数据不确定性）并且模型对探针的预测有信心（低模型不确定性），则最终排名将被评估为可靠。在风险控制设置和多查询设置下的实验表明，我们的方法在普通单查询设置下的三个具有挑战性的基准上也显示出优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不确定性学习的可靠性感知预测方法，用于提升人物图像检索的可靠性评估。
AI.motivation: 现有图像检索方法虽在准确率上表现优异，但缺乏对预测结果可靠性的描述，难以应对噪声数据和模型不确定性问题。
AI.method: 提出不确定性感知学习（UAL）框架，同时建模数据不确定性和模型不确定性：1）通过采样-free方法动态调整样本权重；2）基于贝叶斯框架假设网络参数服从伯努利分布建模模型不确定性；3）联合学习两种不确定性作为可靠性评估准则。
AI.result: 在风险控制和多查询场景下验证了可靠性评估的有效性，在三个基准数据集上单查询设置下均取得优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模数据与模型不确定性，本文方法有效提升了人物图像检索的可靠性评估能力，为鲁棒检索提供了新思路。

authors_text: Alexandre Défossez,Jade Copet,Gabriel Synnaeve,Yossi Adi
title: High Fidelity Neural Audio Compression
title_zh: 高保真神经音频压缩
abstract: We introduce a state-of-the-art real-time, high-fidelity, audio codec leveraging neural networks. It consists in a streaming encoder-decoder architecture with quantized latent space trained in an end-to-end fashion. We simplify and speed-up the training by using a single multiscale spectrogram adversary that efficiently reduces artifacts and produce high-quality samples. We introduce a novel loss balancer mechanism to stabilize training: the weight of a loss now defines the fraction of the overall gradient it should represent, thus decoupling the choice of this hyper-parameter from the typical scale of the loss. Finally, we study how lightweight Transformer models can be used to further compress the obtained representation by up to 40%, while staying faster than real time. We provide a detailed description of the key design choices of the proposed model including: training objective, architectural changes and a study of various perceptual loss functions. We present an extensive subjective evaluation (MUSHRA tests) together with an ablation study for a range of bandwidths and audio domains, including speech, noisy-reverberant speech, and music. Our approach is superior to the baselines methods across all evaluated settings, considering both 24 kHz monophonic and 48 kHz stereophonic audio. Code and models are available at github.com/facebookresearch/encodec.
summary: We introduce a state-of-the-art real-time, high-fidelity, audio codec leveraging neural networks. It consists in a streaming encoder-decoder architecture with quantized latent space trained in an end-to-end fashion. We simplify and speed-up the training by using a single multiscale spectrogram adversary that efficiently reduces artifacts and produce high-quality samples. We introduce a novel loss balancer mechanism to stabilize training: the weight of a loss now defines the fraction of the overall gradient it should represent, thus decoupling the choice of this hyper-parameter from the typical scale of the loss. Finally, we study how lightweight Transformer models can be used to further compress the obtained representation by up to 40%, while staying faster than real time. We provide a detailed description of the key design choices of the proposed model including: training objective, architectural changes and a study of various perceptual loss functions. We present an extensive subjective evaluation (MUSHRA tests) together with an ablation study for a range of bandwidths and audio domains, including speech, noisy-reverberant speech, and music. Our approach is superior to the baselines methods across all evaluated settings, considering both 24 kHz monophonic and 48 kHz stereophonic audio. Code and models are available at github.com/facebookresearch/encodec.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种利用神经网络的最先进的实时、高保真音频编解码器。它由一个流式编码器-解码器架构组成，具有以端到端方式训练的量化潜在空间。我们通过使用单个多尺度频谱图对手来简化和加速训练，该对手可以有效地减少伪影并产生高质量的样本。我们引入了一种新颖的损失平衡器机制来稳定训练：损失的权重现在定义了它应代表的总体梯度的分数，从而将该超参数的选择与损失的典型规模脱钩。最后，我们研究了如何使用轻量级 Transformer 模型将获得的表示进一步压缩高达 40%，同时保持比实时更快的速度。我们详细描述了所提出模型的关键设计选择，包括：训练目标、架构变化和各种感知损失函数的研究。我们对一系列带宽和音频领域（包括语音、噪声混响语音和音乐）进行了广泛的主观评估（MUSHRA 测试）以及消融研究。考虑到 24 kHz 单声道和 48 kHz 立体声音频，我们的方法优于所有评估设置的基线方法。代码和模型可在 github.com/facebookresearch/encodec 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的实时高保真音频编解码器，通过量化潜空间和多尺度频谱对抗机制实现高质量音频压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有音频编码方法在实时性与保真度间难以平衡，需解决压缩过程中的伪影问题并提升效率。
AI.method: 采用流式编码器-解码器架构，结合单个多尺度频谱对抗网络减少伪影；引入损失平衡机制解耦梯度权重与损失尺度；利用轻量Transformer进一步压缩表示并保持实时性。
AI.result: 在24kHz单声道和48kHz立体声音频的多场景测试中，主观评价（MUSHRA）和消融实验表明该方法优于基线模型，压缩率最高达40%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的端到端神经音频编码框架在保真度、压缩效率及实时性方面均优于现有方法，代码已开源。

search_text: High Fidelity Neural Audio Compression 高保真神经音频压缩 We introduce a state-of-the-art real-time, high-fidelity, audio codec leveraging neural networks. It consists in a streaming encoder-decoder architecture with quantized latent space trained in an end-to-end fashion. We simplify and speed-up the training by using a single multiscale spectrogram adversary that efficiently reduces artifacts and produce high-quality samples. We introduce a novel loss balancer mechanism to stabilize training: the weight of a loss now defines the fraction of the overall gradient it should represent, thus decoupling the choice of this hyper-parameter from the typical scale of the loss. Finally, we study how lightweight Transformer models can be used to further compress the obtained representation by up to 40%, while staying faster than real time. We provide a detailed description of the key design choices of the proposed model including: training objective, architectural changes and a study of various perceptual loss functions. We present an extensive subjective evaluation (MUSHRA tests) together with an ablation study for a range of bandwidths and audio domains, including speech, noisy-reverberant speech, and music. Our approach is superior to the baselines methods across all evaluated settings, considering both 24 kHz monophonic and 48 kHz stereophonic audio. Code and models are available at github.com/facebookresearch/encodec. 我们引入了一种利用神经网络的最先进的实时、高保真音频编解码器。它由一个流式编码器-解码器架构组成，具有以端到端方式训练的量化潜在空间。我们通过使用单个多尺度频谱图对手来简化和加速训练，该对手可以有效地减少伪影并产生高质量的样本。我们引入了一种新颖的损失平衡器机制来稳定训练：损失的权重现在定义了它应代表的总体梯度的分数，从而将该超参数的选择与损失的典型规模脱钩。最后，我们研究了如何使用轻量级 Transformer 模型将获得的表示进一步压缩高达 40%，同时保持比实时更快的速度。我们详细描述了所提出模型的关键设计选择，包括：训练目标、架构变化和各种感知损失函数的研究。我们对一系列带宽和音频领域（包括语音、噪声混响语音和音乐）进行了广泛的主观评估（MUSHRA 测试）以及消融研究。考虑到 24 kHz 单声道和 48 kHz 立体声音频，我们的方法优于所有评估设置的基线方法。代码和模型可在 github.com/facebookresearch/encodec 获取。 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的实时高保真音频编解码器，通过量化潜空间和多尺度频谱对抗机制实现高质量音频压缩。 Alexandre Défossez,Jade Copet,Gabriel Synnaeve,Yossi Adi eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.SD,stat.ML

authors_text: Hao Liu,Lisa Lee,Kimin Lee,Pieter Abbeel
title: Instruction-Following Agents with Multimodal Transformer
title_zh: 具有多模式变压器的指令跟踪代理
abstract: Humans are excellent at understanding language and vision to accomplish a wide range of tasks. In contrast, creating general instruction-following embodied agents remains a difficult challenge. Prior work that uses pure language-only models lack visual grounding, making it difficult to connect language instructions with visual observations. On the other hand, methods that use pre-trained multimodal models typically come with divided language and visual representations, requiring designing specialized network architecture to fuse them together. We propose a simple yet effective model for robots to solve instruction-following tasks in vision-based environments. Our \ours method consists of a multimodal transformer that encodes visual observations and language instructions, and a transformer-based policy that predicts actions based on encoded representations. The multimodal transformer is pre-trained on millions of image-text pairs and natural language text, thereby producing generic cross-modal representations of observations and instructions. The transformer-based policy keeps track of the full history of observations and actions, and predicts actions autoregressively. Despite its simplicity, we show that this unified transformer model outperforms all state-of-the-art pre-trained or trained-from-scratch methods in both single-task and multi-task settings. Our model also shows better model scalability and generalization ability than prior work.
summary: Humans are excellent at understanding language and vision to accomplish a wide range of tasks. In contrast, creating general instruction-following embodied agents remains a difficult challenge. Prior work that uses pure language-only models lack visual grounding, making it difficult to connect language instructions with visual observations. On the other hand, methods that use pre-trained multimodal models typically come with divided language and visual representations, requiring designing specialized network architecture to fuse them together. We propose a simple yet effective model for robots to solve instruction-following tasks in vision-based environments. Our \ours method consists of a multimodal transformer that encodes visual observations and language instructions, and a transformer-based policy that predicts actions based on encoded representations. The multimodal transformer is pre-trained on millions of image-text pairs and natural language text, thereby producing generic cross-modal representations of observations and instructions. The transformer-based policy keeps track of the full history of observations and actions, and predicts actions autoregressively. Despite its simplicity, we show that this unified transformer model outperforms all state-of-the-art pre-trained or trained-from-scratch methods in both single-task and multi-task settings. Our model also shows better model scalability and generalization ability than prior work.
abstract_zh: 人类非常擅长理解语言和视觉来完成各种任务。相比之下，创建遵循一般指令的具体代理仍然是一个艰巨的挑战。之前使用纯语言模型的工作缺乏视觉基础，因此很难将语言指令与视觉观察联系起来。另一方面，使用预先训练的多模态模型的方法通常具有分开的语言和视觉表示，需要设计专门的网络架构将它们融合在一起。我们为机器人提出了一种简单而有效的模型，用于在基于视觉的环境中解决遵循指令的任务。我们的方法由对视觉观察和语言指令进行编码的多模态转换器以及基于编码表示来预测动作的基于转换器的策略组成。多模态转换器经过数百万个图像文本对和自然语言文本的预训练，从而产生观察和指令的通用跨模态表示。基于变压器的策略跟踪观察和行动的完整历史，并自回归预测行动。尽管它很简单，但我们表明，这种统一的 Transformer 模型在单任务和多任务设置中都优于所有最先进的预训练或从头开始训练的方法。我们的模型还显示出比之前的工作更好的模型可扩展性和泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多模态Transformer的模型，用于解决视觉环境中指令跟随任务，通过整合视觉和语言信息提升机器人执行任务的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或缺乏视觉感知（纯语言模型），或需要复杂架构融合多模态信息，难以实现高效指令跟随。
AI.method: 设计统一的多模态Transformer编码器，预训练处理图像-文本对及自然语言，生成跨模态表征；结合基于Transformer的策略网络，自回归预测动作并跟踪完整历史信息。
AI.result: 在单任务和多任务场景中均优于现有预训练或从头训练方法，展现更强的模型扩展性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该统一模型通过端到端架构有效融合多模态信息，在指令跟随任务中实现性能突破，为通用智能体开发提供新思路。

authors_text: Zhaoqi Leng,Shuyang Cheng,Benjamin Caine,Weiyue Wang,Xiao Zhang,Jonathon Shlens,Mingxing Tan,Dragomir Anguelov
title: PseudoAugment: Learning to Use Unlabeled Data for Data Augmentation in Point Clouds
title_zh: PseudoAugment：学习使用未标记数据进行点云中的数据增强
abstract: Data augmentation is an important technique to improve data efficiency and save labeling cost for 3D detection in point clouds. Yet, existing augmentation policies have so far been designed to only utilize labeled data, which limits the data diversity. In this paper, we recognize that pseudo labeling and data augmentation are complementary, thus propose to leverage unlabeled data for data augmentation to enrich the training data. In particular, we design three novel pseudo-label based data augmentation policies (PseudoAugments) to fuse both labeled and pseudo-labeled scenes, including frames (PseudoFrame), objecta (PseudoBBox), and background (PseudoBackground). PseudoAugments outperforms pseudo labeling by mitigating pseudo labeling errors and generating diverse fused training scenes. We demonstrate PseudoAugments generalize across point-based and voxel-based architectures, different model capacity and both KITTI and Waymo Open Dataset. To alleviate the cost of hyperparameter tuning and iterative pseudo labeling, we develop a population-based data augmentation framework for 3D detection, named AutoPseudoAugment. Unlike previous works that perform pseudo-labeling offline, our framework performs PseudoAugments and hyperparameter tuning in one shot to reduce computational cost. Experimental results on the large-scale Waymo Open Dataset show our method outperforms state-of-the-art auto data augmentation method (PPBA) and self-training method (pseudo labeling). In particular, AutoPseudoAugment is about 3X and 2X data efficient on vehicle and pedestrian tasks compared to prior arts. Notably, AutoPseudoAugment nearly matches the full dataset training results, with just 10% of the labeled run segments on the vehicle detection task.
summary: Data augmentation is an important technique to improve data efficiency and save labeling cost for 3D detection in point clouds. In particular, AutoPseudoAugment is about 3X and 2X data efficient on vehicle and pedestrian tasks compared to prior arts. Notably, AutoPseudoAugment nearly matches the full dataset training results, with just 10% of the labeled run segments on the vehicle detection task.
abstract_zh: 数据增强是提高数据效率并节省点云 3D 检测标记成本的重要技术。然而，迄今为止，现有的增强策略仅设计为利用标记数据，这限制了数据多样性。在本文中，我们认识到伪标记和数据增强是互补的，因此提出利用未标记数据进行数据增强来丰富训练数据。特别是，我们设计了三种新颖的基于伪标签的数据增强策略（PseudoAugments）来融合标记和伪标记场景，包括帧（PseudoFrame）、对象（PseudoBBox）和背景（PseudoBackground）。 PseudoAugments 通过减少伪标签错误并生成不同的融合训练场景来优于伪标签。我们演示了 PseudoAugments 可以泛化基于点和基于体素的架构、不同的模型容量以及 KITTI 和 Waymo 开放数据集。为了减轻超参数调整和迭代伪标记的成本，我们开发了一种用于 3D 检测的基于群体的数据增强框架，名为 AutoPseudoAugment。与之前离线执行伪标记的工作不同，我们的框架一次性执行伪增强和超参数调整，以降低计算成本。大规模 Waymo 开放数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的自动数据增强方法（PPBA）和自我训练方法（伪标签）。特别是，与现有技术相比，AutoPseudoAugment 在车辆和行人任务上的数据效率大约提高了 3 倍和 2 倍。值得注意的是，AutoPseudoAugment 几乎与完整数据集的训练结果相匹配，在车辆检测任务中仅标记了 10% 的运行片段。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PseudoAugment的方法，通过结合伪标签和数据增强技术，利用未标记点云数据提升3D检测任务的数据效率。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强策略仅依赖标记数据，限制了数据多样性。伪标签与数据增强具有互补性，但未被有效结合，导致伪标签误差和训练数据不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计三种基于伪标签的增强策略（PseudoFrame/PseudoBBox/PseudoBackground），融合标记与伪标记场景；提出AutoPseudoAugment框架，实现一次性的增强策略优化与超参数调优，降低计算成本。
AI.result: 在Waymo和KITTI数据集上优于SOTA方法PPBA和伪标签自训练方法，车辆/行人任务数据效率提升3倍和2倍，10%标记数据即可接近全数据集性能。
AI.conclusion: PseudoAugment通过融合伪标签与数据增强显著提升3D检测性能，AutoPseudoAugment框架有效降低了方法应用成本，为点云数据高效利用提供了新思路。

search_text: PseudoAugment: Learning to Use Unlabeled Data for Data Augmentation in Point Clouds PseudoAugment：学习使用未标记数据进行点云中的数据增强 Data augmentation is an important technique to improve data efficiency and save labeling cost for 3D detection in point clouds. Yet, existing augmentation policies have so far been designed to only utilize labeled data, which limits the data diversity. In this paper, we recognize that pseudo labeling and data augmentation are complementary, thus propose to leverage unlabeled data for data augmentation to enrich the training data. In particular, we design three novel pseudo-label based data augmentation policies (PseudoAugments) to fuse both labeled and pseudo-labeled scenes, including frames (PseudoFrame), objecta (PseudoBBox), and background (PseudoBackground). PseudoAugments outperforms pseudo labeling by mitigating pseudo labeling errors and generating diverse fused training scenes. We demonstrate PseudoAugments generalize across point-based and voxel-based architectures, different model capacity and both KITTI and Waymo Open Dataset. To alleviate the cost of hyperparameter tuning and iterative pseudo labeling, we develop a population-based data augmentation framework for 3D detection, named AutoPseudoAugment. Unlike previous works that perform pseudo-labeling offline, our framework performs PseudoAugments and hyperparameter tuning in one shot to reduce computational cost. Experimental results on the large-scale Waymo Open Dataset show our method outperforms state-of-the-art auto data augmentation method (PPBA) and self-training method (pseudo labeling). In particular, AutoPseudoAugment is about 3X and 2X data efficient on vehicle and pedestrian tasks compared to prior arts. Notably, AutoPseudoAugment nearly matches the full dataset training results, with just 10% of the labeled run segments on the vehicle detection task. 数据增强是提高数据效率并节省点云 3D 检测标记成本的重要技术。然而，迄今为止，现有的增强策略仅设计为利用标记数据，这限制了数据多样性。在本文中，我们认识到伪标记和数据增强是互补的，因此提出利用未标记数据进行数据增强来丰富训练数据。特别是，我们设计了三种新颖的基于伪标签的数据增强策略（PseudoAugments）来融合标记和伪标记场景，包括帧（PseudoFrame）、对象（PseudoBBox）和背景（PseudoBackground）。 PseudoAugments 通过减少伪标签错误并生成不同的融合训练场景来优于伪标签。我们演示了 PseudoAugments 可以泛化基于点和基于体素的架构、不同的模型容量以及 KITTI 和 Waymo 开放数据集。为了减轻超参数调整和迭代伪标记的成本，我们开发了一种用于 3D 检测的基于群体的数据增强框架，名为 AutoPseudoAugment。与之前离线执行伪标记的工作不同，我们的框架一次性执行伪增强和超参数调整，以降低计算成本。大规模 Waymo 开放数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的自动数据增强方法（PPBA）和自我训练方法（伪标签）。特别是，与现有技术相比，AutoPseudoAugment 在车辆和行人任务上的数据效率大约提高了 3 倍和 2 倍。值得注意的是，AutoPseudoAugment 几乎与完整数据集的训练结果相匹配，在车辆检测任务中仅标记了 10% 的运行片段。 本文提出了一种名为PseudoAugment的方法，通过结合伪标签和数据增强技术，利用未标记点云数据提升3D检测任务的数据效率。 Zhaoqi Leng,Shuyang Cheng,Benjamin Caine,Weiyue Wang,Xiao Zhang,Jonathon Shlens,Mingxing Tan,Dragomir Anguelov cs.CV

authors_text: Mohatashem Reyaz Makhdoomi,Vivek Muralidharan,Juan Sandoval,Miguel Olivares-Mendez,Carol Martinez
title: Evaluation of Position and Velocity Based Forward Dynamics Compliance Control (FDCC) for Robotic Interactions in Position Controlled Robots
title_zh: 基于位置和速度的位置控制机器人中机器人交互的前向动态顺从控制 (FDCC) 评估
comment: Submitted to RA-L on 15th Sept 2022, for associated video see: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iIFscA-CHRU
comments: Submitted to RA-L on 15th Sept 2022, for associated video see: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iIFscA-CHRU
abstract: In robotic manipulation, end-effector compliance is an essential precondition for performing contact-rich tasks, such as machining, assembly, and human-robot interaction. Most robotic arms are position-controlled stiff systems at a hardware level. Thus, adding compliance becomes essential. Compliance in those systems has been recently achieved using Forward dynamics compliance control (FDCC), which, owing to its virtual forward dynamics model, can be implemented on both position and velocity-controlled robots. This paper evaluates the choice of control interface (and hence the control domain), which, although considered trivial, is essential due to differences in their characteristics. In some cases, the choice is restricted to the available hardware interface. However, given the option to choose, the velocity-based control interface makes a better candidate for compliance control because of smoother compliant behaviour, reduced interaction forces, and work done. To prove these points, in this paper FDCC is evaluated on the UR10e six-DOF manipulator with velocity and position control modes. The evaluation is based on force-control benchmarking metrics using 3D-printed artefacts. Real experiments favour the choice of velocity control over position control.
summary: In robotic manipulation, end-effector compliance is an essential precondition for performing contact-rich tasks, such as machining, assembly, and human-robot interaction. Most robotic arms are position-controlled stiff systems at a hardware level. Thus, adding compliance becomes essential. Compliance in those systems has been recently achieved using Forward dynamics compliance control (FDCC), which, owing to its virtual forward dynamics model, can be implemented on both position and velocity-controlled robots. This paper evaluates the choice of control interface (and hence the control domain), which, although considered trivial, is essential due to differences in their characteristics. In some cases, the choice is restricted to the available hardware interface. However, given the option to choose, the velocity-based control interface makes a better candidate for compliance control because of smoother compliant behaviour, reduced interaction forces, and work done. To prove these points, in this paper FDCC is evaluated on the UR10e six-DOF manipulator with velocity and position control modes. The evaluation is based on force-control benchmarking metrics using 3D-printed artefacts. Real experiments favour the choice of velocity control over position control.
abstract_zh: 在机器人操作中，末端执行器合规性是执行加工、装配和人机交互等接触丰富的任务的重要先决条件。大多数机械臂都是硬件级别的位置控制刚性系统。因此，增加合规性变得至关重要。这些系统的合规性最近已使用前向动态顺从控制（FDCC）实现，由于其虚拟前向动态模型，可以在位置和速度控制的机器人上实现。本文评估了控制接口（以及控制域）的选择，虽然被认为是微不足道的，但由于其特性的差异而至关重要。在某些情况下，选择仅限于可用的硬件接口。然而，如果可以选择，基于速度的控制接口由于更平滑的顺从行为、减少的相互作用力和完成的工作而成为顺从控制的更好候选者。为了证明这些观点，本文在具有速度和位置控制模式的 UR10e 六自由度机械臂上对 FDCC 进行了评估。该评估基于使用 3D 打印制品的力控制基准测试指标。实际实验倾向于选择速度控制而不是位置控制。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了基于位置和速度的前向动力学顺应控制（FDCC）在位置控制机器人中的应用。
AI.motivation: 在机器人操作中，末端执行器的顺应性对于完成如加工、装配和人机交互等接触丰富的任务至关重要，但大多数机器人臂是位置控制的刚性系统，因此需要添加顺应性。
AI.method: 本文通过在UR10e六自由度机械臂上使用速度和位置控制模式，评估了FDCC方法，并基于3D打印的工件使用力控制基准指标进行实验。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，速度控制模式在顺应控制中表现出更平滑的行为，减少了交互力和工作量。
AI.conclusion: 在可以选择控制接口的情况下，速度控制比位置控制更适合用于顺应控制。

authors_text: Joshua Albrecht,Abraham J. Fetterman,Bryden Fogelman,Ellie Kitanidis,Bartosz Wróblewski,Nicole Seo,Michael Rosenthal,Maksis Knutins,Zachary Polizzi,James B. Simon,Kanjun Qiu
title: Avalon: A Benchmark for RL Generalization Using Procedurally Generated Worlds
title_zh: Avalon：使用程序生成的世界进行 RL 泛化的基准
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS Datasets and Benchmarks 2022. Video and links to all code, data, etc can be found at https://generallyintelligent.com/avalon/
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS Datasets and Benchmarks 2022. Video and links to all code, data, etc can be found at https://generallyintelligent.com/avalon/
abstract: Despite impressive successes, deep reinforcement learning (RL) systems still fall short of human performance on generalization to new tasks and environments that differ from their training. As a benchmark tailored for studying RL generalization, we introduce Avalon, a set of tasks in which embodied agents in highly diverse procedural 3D worlds must survive by navigating terrain, hunting or gathering food, and avoiding hazards. Avalon is unique among existing RL benchmarks in that the reward function, world dynamics, and action space are the same for every task, with tasks differentiated solely by altering the environment; its 20 tasks, ranging in complexity from eat and throw to hunt and navigate, each create worlds in which the agent must perform specific skills in order to survive. This setup enables investigations of generalization within tasks, between tasks, and to compositional tasks that require combining skills learned from previous tasks. Avalon includes a highly efficient simulator, a library of baselines, and a benchmark with scoring metrics evaluated against hundreds of hours of human performance, all of which are open-source and publicly available. We find that standard RL baselines make progress on most tasks but are still far from human performance, suggesting Avalon is challenging enough to advance the quest for generalizable RL.
summary: Despite impressive successes, deep reinforcement learning (RL) systems still fall short of human performance on generalization to new tasks and environments that differ from their training. As a benchmark tailored for studying RL generalization, we introduce Avalon, a set of tasks in which embodied agents in highly diverse procedural 3D worlds must survive by navigating terrain, hunting or gathering food, and avoiding hazards. Avalon is unique among existing RL benchmarks in that the reward function, world dynamics, and action space are the same for every task, with tasks differentiated solely by altering the environment; its 20 tasks, ranging in complexity from eat and throw to hunt and navigate, each create worlds in which the agent must perform specific skills in order to survive. This setup enables investigations of generalization within tasks, between tasks, and to compositional tasks that require combining skills learned from previous tasks. Avalon includes a highly efficient simulator, a library of baselines, and a benchmark with scoring metrics evaluated against hundreds of hours of human performance, all of which are open-source and publicly available. We find that standard RL baselines make progress on most tasks but are still far from human performance, suggesting Avalon is challenging enough to advance the quest for generalizable RL.
abstract_zh: 尽管取得了令人印象深刻的成功，深度强化学习（RL）系统在泛化到不同于训练的新任务和环境方面仍然低于人类的表现。作为为研究 RL 泛化而定制的基准，我们引入了 Avalon，这是一组任务，其中高度多样化的程序 3D 世界中的具体代理必须通过导航地形、狩猎或采集食物以及避免危险来生存。 Avalon 在现有的 RL 基准中是独一无二的，因为每项任务的奖励函数、世界动态和动作空间都是相同的，任务的区别仅在于改变环境；它有 20 项任务，复杂程度从吃、投掷到狩猎和导航，每项任务都创造了一个世界，在这个世界中，特工必须执行特定的技能才能生存。此设置可以对任务内、任务之间以及需要结合从先前任务中学到的技能的组合任务进行泛化调查。 Avalon 包括一个高效的模拟器、一个基线库和一个基准测试，其中包含根据数百小时的人类表现评估的评分指标，所有这些都是开源且公开的。我们发现标准 RL 基线在大多数任务上都取得了进展，但与人类表现仍相距甚远，这表明 Avalon 具有足够的挑战性来推进对泛化 RL 的探索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Avalon基准，通过程序生成的多样化3D环境评估强化学习代理的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习系统在面对新任务和环境时泛化能力不足，需建立统一基准研究跨任务泛化问题。
AI.method: 构建包含20个任务的程序生成3D世界，通过固定奖励函数和动作空间、仅改变环境实现任务区分，提供模拟器、基线算法及人类表现评估指标。
AI.result: 标准RL基线在多数任务上取得进展但远未达人类水平，验证了Avalon的挑战性及对通用RL研究的价值。
AI.conclusion: Avalon为研究强化学习泛化能力提供了有效基准，推动通用人工智能算法的发展。

search_text: Avalon: A Benchmark for RL Generalization Using Procedurally Generated Worlds Avalon：使用程序生成的世界进行 RL 泛化的基准 Despite impressive successes, deep reinforcement learning (RL) systems still fall short of human performance on generalization to new tasks and environments that differ from their training. As a benchmark tailored for studying RL generalization, we introduce Avalon, a set of tasks in which embodied agents in highly diverse procedural 3D worlds must survive by navigating terrain, hunting or gathering food, and avoiding hazards. Avalon is unique among existing RL benchmarks in that the reward function, world dynamics, and action space are the same for every task, with tasks differentiated solely by altering the environment; its 20 tasks, ranging in complexity from eat and throw to hunt and navigate, each create worlds in which the agent must perform specific skills in order to survive. This setup enables investigations of generalization within tasks, between tasks, and to compositional tasks that require combining skills learned from previous tasks. Avalon includes a highly efficient simulator, a library of baselines, and a benchmark with scoring metrics evaluated against hundreds of hours of human performance, all of which are open-source and publicly available. We find that standard RL baselines make progress on most tasks but are still far from human performance, suggesting Avalon is challenging enough to advance the quest for generalizable RL. 尽管取得了令人印象深刻的成功，深度强化学习（RL）系统在泛化到不同于训练的新任务和环境方面仍然低于人类的表现。作为为研究 RL 泛化而定制的基准，我们引入了 Avalon，这是一组任务，其中高度多样化的程序 3D 世界中的具体代理必须通过导航地形、狩猎或采集食物以及避免危险来生存。 Avalon 在现有的 RL 基准中是独一无二的，因为每项任务的奖励函数、世界动态和动作空间都是相同的，任务的区别仅在于改变环境；它有 20 项任务，复杂程度从吃、投掷到狩猎和导航，每项任务都创造了一个世界，在这个世界中，特工必须执行特定的技能才能生存。此设置可以对任务内、任务之间以及需要结合从先前任务中学到的技能的组合任务进行泛化调查。 Avalon 包括一个高效的模拟器、一个基线库和一个基准测试，其中包含根据数百小时的人类表现评估的评分指标，所有这些都是开源且公开的。我们发现标准 RL 基线在大多数任务上都取得了进展，但与人类表现仍相距甚远，这表明 Avalon 具有足够的挑战性来推进对泛化 RL 的探索。 本文提出Avalon基准，通过程序生成的多样化3D环境评估强化学习代理的泛化能力。 Joshua Albrecht,Abraham J. Fetterman,Bryden Fogelman,Ellie Kitanidis,Bartosz Wróblewski,Nicole Seo,Michael Rosenthal,Maksis Knutins,Zachary Polizzi,James B. Simon,Kanjun Qiu cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: David Helminiak,Hang Hu,Julia Laskin,Dong Hye Ye
title: Deep Learning Approach for Dynamic Sampling for Multichannel Mass Spectrometry Imaging
title_zh: 多通道质谱成像动态采样的深度学习方法
abstract: Mass Spectrometry Imaging (MSI), using traditional rectilinear scanning, takes hours to days for high spatial resolution acquisitions. Given that most pixels within a sample's field of view are often neither relevant to underlying biological structures nor chemically informative, MSI presents as a prime candidate for integration with sparse and dynamic sampling algorithms. During a scan, stochastic models determine which locations probabilistically contain information critical to the generation of low-error reconstructions. Decreasing the number of required physical measurements thereby minimizes overall acquisition times. A Deep Learning Approach for Dynamic Sampling (DLADS), utilizing a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and encapsulating molecular mass intensity distributions within a third dimension, demonstrates a simulated 70% throughput improvement for Nanospray Desorption Electrospray Ionization (nano-DESI) MSI tissues. Evaluations are conducted between DLADS and a Supervised Learning Approach for Dynamic Sampling, with Least-Squares regression (SLADS-LS) and a Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) network (SLADS-Net). When compared with SLADS-LS, limited to a single m/z channel, as well as multichannel SLADS-LS and SLADS-Net, DLADS respectively improves regression performance by 36.7%, 7.0%, and 6.2%, resulting in gains to reconstruction quality of 6.0%, 2.1%, and 3.4% for acquisition of targeted m/z.
summary: Mass Spectrometry Imaging (MSI), using traditional rectilinear scanning, takes hours to days for high spatial resolution acquisitions. Given that most pixels within a sample's field of view are often neither relevant to underlying biological structures nor chemically informative, MSI presents as a prime candidate for integration with sparse and dynamic sampling algorithms. During a scan, stochastic models determine which locations probabilistically contain information critical to the generation of low-error reconstructions. Decreasing the number of required physical measurements thereby minimizes overall acquisition times. A Deep Learning Approach for Dynamic Sampling (DLADS), utilizing a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and encapsulating molecular mass intensity distributions within a third dimension, demonstrates a simulated 70% throughput improvement for Nanospray Desorption Electrospray Ionization (nano-DESI) MSI tissues. Evaluations are conducted between DLADS and a Supervised Learning Approach for Dynamic Sampling, with Least-Squares regression (SLADS-LS) and a Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) network (SLADS-Net). When compared with SLADS-LS, limited to a single m/z channel, as well as multichannel SLADS-LS and SLADS-Net, DLADS respectively improves regression performance by 36.7%, 7.0%, and 6.2%, resulting in gains to reconstruction quality of 6.0%, 2.1%, and 3.4% for acquisition of targeted m/z.
abstract_zh: 质谱成像 (MSI) 使用传统的直线扫描，需要数小时到数天的时间才能实现高空间分辨率采集。鉴于样本视场内的大多数像素通常既不与底层生物结构相关，也不具有化学信息，因此 MSI 是与稀疏和动态采样算法集成的主要候选者。在扫描过程中，随机模型确定哪些位置概率上包含对生成低误差重建至关重要的信息。减少所需物理测量的数量从而最大限度地减少总体采集时间。动态采样深度学习方法 (DLADS) 利用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 并将分子质量强度分布封装在三维内，演示了纳喷雾解吸电喷雾电离 (nano-DESI) MSI 组织的模拟吞吐量提高了 70%。使用最小二乘回归 (SLADS-LS) 和多层感知器 (MLP) 网络 (SLADS-Net) 在 DLADS 和动态采样监督学习方法之间进行评估。与仅限于单 m/z 通道的 SLADS-LS 以及多通道 SLADS-LS 和 SLADS-Net 相比，DLADS 的回归性能分别提高了 36.7%、7.0% 和 6.2%，从而使获取目标 m/z 的重建质量提高了 6.0%、2.1% 和 3.4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的动态采样方法（DLADS），用于加速多通道质谱成像（MSI）的扫描过程。
AI.motivation: 传统MSI扫描耗时且大量像素无生物学或化学意义，需通过动态采样减少冗余测量以提高效率。
AI.method: 利用卷积神经网络（CNN）构建三维分子质量强度分布模型，动态选择关键采样位置以优化重建质量。
AI.result: DLADS在模拟中实现70%吞吐量提升，相较其他方法回归性能提升36.7%-7.0%，目标m/z重建质量提升6.0%-3.4%。
AI.conclusion: DLADS通过深度学习显著优于传统动态采样方法，在减少测量次数的同时提升MSI重建精度与效率。

authors_text: Quercus Hernández,Alberto Badías,Francisco Chinesta,Elías Cueto
title: Thermodynamics-informed neural networks for physically realistic mixed reality
title_zh: 用于物理真实混合现实的热力学神经网络
abstract: The imminent impact of immersive technologies in society urges for active research in real-time and interactive physics simulation for virtual worlds to be realistic. In this context, realistic means to be compliant to the laws of physics. In this paper we present a method for computing the dynamic response of (possibly non-linear and dissipative) deformable objects induced by real-time user interactions in mixed reality using deep learning. The graph-based architecture of the method ensures the thermodynamic consistency of the predictions, whereas the visualization pipeline allows a natural and realistic user experience. Two examples of virtual solids interacting with virtual or physical solids in mixed reality scenarios are provided to prove the performance of the method.
summary: The imminent impact of immersive technologies in society urges for active research in real-time and interactive physics simulation for virtual worlds to be realistic. In this context, realistic means to be compliant to the laws of physics. In this paper we present a method for computing the dynamic response of (possibly non-linear and dissipative) deformable objects induced by real-time user interactions in mixed reality using deep learning. The graph-based architecture of the method ensures the thermodynamic consistency of the predictions, whereas the visualization pipeline allows a natural and realistic user experience. Two examples of virtual solids interacting with virtual or physical solids in mixed reality scenarios are provided to prove the performance of the method.
abstract_zh: 沉浸式技术对社会的迫在眉睫的影响促使人们积极研究实时和交互式物理模拟，以使虚拟世界变得真实。在这种情况下，现实意味着遵守物理定律。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用深度学习计算混合现实中实时用户交互引起的（可能是非线性和耗散的）可变形物体的动态响应的方法。该方法基于图形的架构确保了预测的热力学一致性，而可视化管道则提供自然且真实的用户体验。提供了在混合现实场景中虚拟实体与虚拟或物理实体交互的两个示例来证明该方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于热力学原理的神经网络方法，用于在混合现实环境中实现符合物理规律的实时可变形物体交互模拟。
AI.motivation: 随着沉浸式技术的发展，虚拟世界需要更真实的物理模拟来提升用户体验，而传统方法难以兼顾实时性与物理一致性。
AI.method: 采用图结构神经网络架构确保热力学一致性，结合可视化流水线实现用户交互，通过深度学习预测非线性耗散物体的动态响应。
AI.result: 展示了两个混合现实场景案例，验证了虚拟物体与物理/虚拟物体交互时方法的有效性与真实性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合深度学习与物理规律，为混合现实中的实时物理模拟提供了新思路，可提升虚拟环境的真实性与交互自然度。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于热力学原理的神经网络方法，用于在混合现实环境中实现符合物理规律的实时可变形物体交互模拟。
motivation: 随着沉浸式技术的发展，虚拟世界需要更真实的物理模拟来提升用户体验，而传统方法难以兼顾实时性与物理一致性。
method: 采用图结构神经网络架构确保热力学一致性，结合可视化流水线实现用户交互，通过深度学习预测非线性耗散物体的动态响应。
result: 展示了两个混合现实场景案例，验证了虚拟物体与物理/虚拟物体交互时方法的有效性与真实性。
conclusion: 该方法通过融合深度学习与物理规律，为混合现实中的实时物理模拟提供了新思路，可提升虚拟环境的真实性与交互自然度。
search_text: Thermodynamics-informed neural networks for physically realistic mixed reality 用于物理真实混合现实的热力学神经网络 The imminent impact of immersive technologies in society urges for active research in real-time and interactive physics simulation for virtual worlds to be realistic. In this context, realistic means to be compliant to the laws of physics. In this paper we present a method for computing the dynamic response of (possibly non-linear and dissipative) deformable objects induced by real-time user interactions in mixed reality using deep learning. The graph-based architecture of the method ensures the thermodynamic consistency of the predictions, whereas the visualization pipeline allows a natural and realistic user experience. Two examples of virtual solids interacting with virtual or physical solids in mixed reality scenarios are provided to prove the performance of the method. 沉浸式技术对社会的迫在眉睫的影响促使人们积极研究实时和交互式物理模拟，以使虚拟世界变得真实。在这种情况下，现实意味着遵守物理定律。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用深度学习计算混合现实中实时用户交互引起的（可能是非线性和耗散的）可变形物体的动态响应的方法。该方法基于图形的架构确保了预测的热力学一致性，而可视化管道则提供自然且真实的用户体验。提供了在混合现实场景中虚拟实体与虚拟或物理实体交互的两个示例来证明该方法的性能。 本文提出一种基于热力学原理的神经网络方法，用于在混合现实环境中实现符合物理规律的实时可变形物体交互模拟。 Quercus Hernández,Alberto Badías,Francisco Chinesta,Elías Cueto cs.GR,cs.AI,cs.LG,math.DS

authors_text: Swati Jindal,Roberto Manduchi
title: Contrastive Representation Learning for Gaze Estimation
title_zh: 用于注视估计的对比表示学习
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022 Gaze Meets ML Workshop (Spotlight)
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022 Gaze Meets ML Workshop (Spotlight)
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has become prevalent for learning representations in computer vision. Notably, SSL exploits contrastive learning to encourage visual representations to be invariant under various image transformations. The task of gaze estimation, on the other hand, demands not just invariance to various appearances but also equivariance to the geometric transformations. In this work, we propose a simple contrastive representation learning framework for gaze estimation, named Gaze Contrastive Learning (GazeCLR). GazeCLR exploits multi-view data to promote equivariance and relies on selected data augmentation techniques that do not alter gaze directions for invariance learning. Our experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of GazeCLR for several settings of the gaze estimation task. Particularly, our results show that GazeCLR improves the performance of cross-domain gaze estimation and yields as high as 17.2% relative improvement. Moreover, the GazeCLR framework is competitive with state-of-the-art representation learning methods for few-shot evaluation. The code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/jswati31/gazeclr.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has become prevalent for learning representations in computer vision. Notably, SSL exploits contrastive learning to encourage visual representations to be invariant under various image transformations. The task of gaze estimation, on the other hand, demands not just invariance to various appearances but also equivariance to the geometric transformations. In this work, we propose a simple contrastive representation learning framework for gaze estimation, named Gaze Contrastive Learning (GazeCLR). GazeCLR exploits multi-view data to promote equivariance and relies on selected data augmentation techniques that do not alter gaze directions for invariance learning. Our experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of GazeCLR for several settings of the gaze estimation task. Particularly, our results show that GazeCLR improves the performance of cross-domain gaze estimation and yields as high as 17.2% relative improvement. Moreover, the GazeCLR framework is competitive with state-of-the-art representation learning methods for few-shot evaluation. The code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/jswati31/gazeclr.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）在计算机视觉中的学习表示中已经变得很普遍。值得注意的是，SSL 利用对比学习来鼓励视觉表示在各种图像变换下保持不变。另一方面，注视估计的任务不仅要求对各种外观的不变性，而且要求对几何变换的等变性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于注视估计的简单对比表示学习框架，称为注视对比学习（GazeCLR）。 GazeCLR 利用多视图数据来促进等方差，并依赖于不改变注视方向的选定数据增强技术来实现不变性学习。我们的实验证明了 GazeCLR 对于多种注视估计任务设置的有效性。特别是，我们的结果表明 GazeCLR 提高了跨域注视估计的性能，相对提升高达 17.2%。此外，GazeCLR 框架在少样本评估方面与最先进的表示学习方法具有竞争力。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/jswati31/gazeclr 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GazeCLR的对比表示学习框架，用于改进眼动估计任务中的几何变换不变性与等变性学习。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习仅关注图像变换下的不变性，但眼动估计需同时满足几何变换的等变性需求，现有方法未能有效兼顾两者。
AI.method: 通过多视图数据增强促进等变性学习，并筛选保留注视方向的数据增强策略以实现不变性学习，构建联合优化框架。
AI.result: 在跨域眼动估计任务中实现最高17.2%的相对性能提升，在少样本场景下优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: GazeCLR有效解决了眼动估计中的几何不变性与等变性矛盾，代码开源便于复现与应用。

authors_text: Chaoyi Pan,Marion Lepert,Shenli Yuan,Rika Antonova,Jeannette Bohg
title: In-Hand Manipulation of Unknown Objects with Tactile Sensing for Insertion
title_zh: 通过触觉感应手动操作未知物体以进行插入
abstract: In this paper, we present a method to manipulate unknown objects in-hand using tactile sensing without relying on a known object model. In many cases, vision-only approaches may not be feasible; for example, due to occlusion in cluttered spaces. We address this limitation by introducing a method to reorient unknown objects using tactile sensing. It incrementally builds a probabilistic estimate of the object shape and pose during task-driven manipulation. Our approach uses Bayesian optimization to balance exploration of the global object shape with efficient task completion. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, we apply it to a simulated Tactile-Enabled Roller Grasper, a gripper that rolls objects in hand while collecting tactile data. We evaluate our method on an insertion task with randomly generated objects and find that it reliably reorients objects while significantly reducing the exploration time.
summary: In this paper, we present a method to manipulate unknown objects in-hand using tactile sensing without relying on a known object model. In many cases, vision-only approaches may not be feasible; for example, due to occlusion in cluttered spaces. We address this limitation by introducing a method to reorient unknown objects using tactile sensing. It incrementally builds a probabilistic estimate of the object shape and pose during task-driven manipulation. Our approach uses Bayesian optimization to balance exploration of the global object shape with efficient task completion. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, we apply it to a simulated Tactile-Enabled Roller Grasper, a gripper that rolls objects in hand while collecting tactile data. We evaluate our method on an insertion task with randomly generated objects and find that it reliably reorients objects while significantly reducing the exploration time.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用触觉感知来操纵手中未知物体的方法，而不依赖于已知的物体模型。在许多情况下，仅凭视觉的方法可能并不可行；例如，由于杂乱空间中的遮挡。我们通过引入一种使用触觉感知重新定位未知物体的方法来解决这个限制。它在任务驱动的操作过程中逐步构建对象形状和姿势的概率估计。我们的方法使用贝叶斯优化来平衡全局对象形状的探索与高效的任务完成。为了证明我们方法的有效性，我们将其应用于模拟的触觉滚轮抓取器，这是一种在收集触觉数据的同时滚动手中物体的抓取器。我们在随机生成的对象的插入任务上评估我们的方法，发现它可靠地重新定位对象，同时显着减少探索时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需已知物体模型、通过触觉传感实现未知物体在手中重新定位的方法，用于插拔任务。
AI.motivation: 视觉方法在杂乱环境中因遮挡难以有效工作，需依赖触觉传感解决未知物体操作问题。
AI.method: 基于任务驱动的触觉数据，通过贝叶斯优化逐步构建物体形状与姿态的概率估计，结合仿真的触觉滚夹机械手实现滚动操作。
AI.result: 在随机生成物体的插拔任务中，方法能可靠重新定位物体并显著减少探索时间。
AI.conclusion: 触觉传感与概率建模结合可有效处理未知物体操作，为视觉受限场景提供可行方案。

authors_text: Camellia Zakaria,Pin Sym Foong,Chang Siang Lim,Pavithren V. S. Pakianathan,Gerald Huat Choon Koh,Simon Tangi Perrault
title: Does Mode of Digital Contact Tracing Affect User Willingness to Share Information? A Quantitative Study
title_zh: 数字化接触者追踪模式是否会影响用户共享信息的意愿？定量研究
abstract: Digital contact tracing can limit the spread of infectious diseases. Nevertheless, there remain barriers to attaining sufficient adoption. In this study, we investigate how willingness to participate in contact tracing is affected by two critical factors: the modes of data collection and the type of data collected. We conducted a scenario-based survey study among 220 respondents in the United States (U.S.) to understand their perceptions about contact tracing associated with automated and manual contact tracing methods. The findings indicate a promising use of smartphones and a combination of public health officials and medical health records as information sources. Through a quantitative analysis, we describe how different modalities and individual demographic factors may affect user compliance in providing four key pieces of information to contact tracing.
summary: Digital contact tracing can limit the spread of infectious diseases. Nevertheless, there remain barriers to attaining sufficient adoption. In this study, we investigate how willingness to participate in contact tracing is affected by two critical factors: the modes of data collection and the type of data collected. We conducted a scenario-based survey study among 220 respondents in the United States (U.S.) to understand their perceptions about contact tracing associated with automated and manual contact tracing methods. The findings indicate a promising use of smartphones and a combination of public health officials and medical health records as information sources. Through a quantitative analysis, we describe how different modalities and individual demographic factors may affect user compliance in providing four key pieces of information to contact tracing.
abstract_zh: 数字接触者追踪可以限制传染病的传播。然而，获得充分采用仍然存在障碍。在本研究中，我们调查了参与接触者追踪的意愿如何受到两个关键因素的影响：数据收集的模式和收集的数据的类型。我们对美国 220 名受访者进行了一项基于场景的调查研究，以了解他们对与自动和手动接触者追踪方法相关的接触者追踪的看法。研究结果表明，智能手机以及公共卫生官员和医疗健康记录的结合作为信息来源的使用前景广阔。通过定量分析，我们描述了不同的方式和个人人口统计因素如何影响用户在为接触者追踪提供四个关键信息时的依从性。

AI.tldr: 研究数字接触追踪模式对用户信息分享意愿的影响，分析数据收集方式和类型的作用。
AI.motivation: 解决数字接触追踪应用不足的问题，探索影响用户参与的关键因素以提高疾病防控效果。
AI.method: 通过美国220名受访者的场景化问卷调查，结合定量分析方法研究不同数据收集模式与人口统计因素的影响。
AI.result: 智能手机使用和公共卫生机构与医疗记录结合的信息源更受认可，不同数据收集模式及人口特征显著影响用户合规性。
AI.conclusion: 优化数据收集模式并考虑个体差异可提升用户参与度，为设计有效的接触追踪系统提供依据。

ai_content.tldr: 研究数字接触追踪模式对用户信息分享意愿的影响，分析数据收集方式和类型的作用。
ai_content.motivation: 解决数字接触追踪应用不足的问题，探索影响用户参与的关键因素以提高疾病防控效果。
ai_content.method: 通过美国220名受访者的场景化问卷调查，结合定量分析方法研究不同数据收集模式与人口统计因素的影响。
ai_content.result: 智能手机使用和公共卫生机构与医疗记录结合的信息源更受认可，不同数据收集模式及人口特征显著影响用户合规性。
ai_content.conclusion: 优化数据收集模式并考虑个体差异可提升用户参与度，为设计有效的接触追踪系统提供依据。

search_text: Does Mode of Digital Contact Tracing Affect User Willingness to Share Information? A Quantitative Study 数字化接触者追踪模式是否会影响用户共享信息的意愿？定量研究 Digital contact tracing can limit the spread of infectious diseases. Nevertheless, there remain barriers to attaining sufficient adoption. In this study, we investigate how willingness to participate in contact tracing is affected by two critical factors: the modes of data collection and the type of data collected. We conducted a scenario-based survey study among 220 respondents in the United States (U.S.) to understand their perceptions about contact tracing associated with automated and manual contact tracing methods. The findings indicate a promising use of smartphones and a combination of public health officials and medical health records as information sources. Through a quantitative analysis, we describe how different modalities and individual demographic factors may affect user compliance in providing four key pieces of information to contact tracing. 数字接触者追踪可以限制传染病的传播。然而，获得充分采用仍然存在障碍。在本研究中，我们调查了参与接触者追踪的意愿如何受到两个关键因素的影响：数据收集的模式和收集的数据的类型。我们对美国 220 名受访者进行了一项基于场景的调查研究，以了解他们对与自动和手动接触者追踪方法相关的接触者追踪的看法。研究结果表明，智能手机以及公共卫生官员和医疗健康记录的结合作为信息来源的使用前景广阔。通过定量分析，我们描述了不同的方式和个人人口统计因素如何影响用户在为接触者追踪提供四个关键信息时的依从性。 研究数字接触追踪模式对用户信息分享意愿的影响，分析数据收集方式和类型的作用。 Camellia Zakaria,Pin Sym Foong,Chang Siang Lim,Pavithren V. S. Pakianathan,Gerald Huat Choon Koh,Simon Tangi Perrault cs.HC

authors_text: Christoph Lüscher,Mohammad Zeineldeen,Zijian Yang,Tina Raissi,Peter Vieting,Khai Le-Duc,Weiyue Wang,Ralf Schlüter,Hermann Ney
title: Development of Hybrid ASR Systems for Low Resource Medical Domain Conversational Telephone Speech
title_zh: 低资源医疗领域对话式电话语音混合 ASR 系统的开发
comment: ASR System Paper for HYKIST project
comments: ASR System Paper for HYKIST project
abstract: Language barriers present a great challenge in our increasingly connected and global world. Especially within the medical domain, e.g. hospital or emergency room, communication difficulties and delays may lead to malpractice and non-optimal patient care. In the HYKIST project, we consider patient-physician communication, more specifically between a German-speaking physician and an Arabic- or Vietnamese-speaking patient. Currently, a doctor can call the Triaphon service to get assistance from an interpreter in order to help facilitate communication. The HYKIST goal is to support the usually non-professional bilingual interpreter with an automatic speech translation system to improve patient care and help overcome language barriers. In this work, we present our ASR system development efforts for this conversational telephone speech translation task in the medical domain for two languages pairs, data collection, various acoustic model architectures and dialect-induced difficulties.
summary: Language barriers present a great challenge in our increasingly connected and global world. Especially within the medical domain, e.g. hospital or emergency room, communication difficulties and delays may lead to malpractice and non-optimal patient care. In the HYKIST project, we consider patient-physician communication, more specifically between a German-speaking physician and an Arabic- or Vietnamese-speaking patient. The HYKIST goal is to support the usually non-professional bilingual interpreter with an automatic speech translation system to improve patient care and help overcome language barriers. In this work, we present our ASR system development efforts for this conversational telephone speech translation task in the medical domain for two languages pairs, data collection, various acoustic model architectures and dialect-induced difficulties.
abstract_zh: 在我们日益互联的全球化世界中，语言障碍构成了巨大的挑战。特别是在医疗领域，例如在医院或急诊室，沟通困难和延误可能会导致医疗事故和非最佳的患者护理。在 HYKIST 项目中，我们考虑患者与医生的沟通，更具体地说是讲德语的医生和讲阿拉伯语或越南语的患者之间的沟通。目前，医生可以致电 Triaphon 服务以获得口译员的帮助，以帮助促进沟通。 HYKIST 的目标是通过自动语音翻译系统为通常非专业的双语口译员提供支持，以改善患者护理并帮助克服语言障碍。在这项工作中，我们展示了我们针对医学领域的对话式电话语音翻译任务的 ASR 系统开发工作，涉及两种语言对、数据收集、各种声学模型架构和方言引起的困难。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发适用于医疗领域低资源语言的混合自动语音识别（ASR）系统，以解决医生与阿拉伯语或越南语患者之间的电话会话语言障碍问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗领域中的语言障碍可能导致沟通延误和护理质量下降，现有翻译服务依赖非专业人员，亟需自动语音翻译系统提升效率与准确性。
AI.method: 通过数据收集、构建混合ASR系统、设计多种声学模型架构，并针对方言差异进行优化，以应对低资源语言的电话会话识别挑战。
AI.result: 完成了针对德语-阿拉伯语及德语-越南语的ASR系统开发，初步验证了系统在医疗电话会话场景中的可行性，但低资源语言的识别效果仍需提升。
AI.conclusion: 混合ASR系统可有效辅助医疗跨语言沟通，但需进一步优化方言适应性和数据资源以提高低资源语言的识别性能。

authors_text: Kishen N. Gowda,Thomas Pensyl,Aravind Srinivasan,Khoa Trinh
title: Improved Bi-point Rounding Algorithms and a Golden Barrier for $k$-Median
title_zh: 改进的双点舍入算法和 $k$ 中位数的黄金屏障
abstract: The current best approximation algorithms for $k$-median rely on first obtaining a structured fractional solution known as a bi-point solution, and then rounding it to an integer solution. We improve this second step by unifying and refining previous approaches. We describe a hierarchy of increasingly-complex partitioning schemes for the facilities, along with corresponding sets of algorithms and factor-revealing non-linear programs. We prove that the third layer of this hierarchy is a $2.613$-approximation, improving upon the current best ratio of $2.675$, while no layer can be proved better than $2.588$ under the proposed analysis. On the negative side, we give a family of bi-point solutions which cannot be approximated better than the square root of the golden ratio, even if allowed to open $k+o(k)$ facilities. This gives a barrier to current approaches for obtaining an approximation better than $2 \sqrtφ \approx 2.544$. Altogether we reduce the approximation gap of bi-point solutions by two thirds.
summary: The current best approximation algorithms for $k$-median rely on first obtaining a structured fractional solution known as a bi-point solution, and then rounding it to an integer solution. We improve this second step by unifying and refining previous approaches. We describe a hierarchy of increasingly-complex partitioning schemes for the facilities, along with corresponding sets of algorithms and factor-revealing non-linear programs. We prove that the third layer of this hierarchy is a $2.613$-approximation, improving upon the current best ratio of $2.675$, while no layer can be proved better than $2.588$ under the proposed analysis. On the negative side, we give a family of bi-point solutions which cannot be approximated better than the square root of the golden ratio, even if allowed to open $k+o(k)$ facilities. This gives a barrier to current approaches for obtaining an approximation better than $2 \sqrtφ \approx 2.544$. Altogether we reduce the approximation gap of bi-point solutions by two thirds.
abstract_zh: 当前 $k$ 中位数的最佳近似算法依赖于首先获得称为双点解的结构化分数解，然后将其舍入为整数解。我们通过统一和完善以前的方法来改进第二步。我们描述了设施日益复杂的分区方案的层次结构，以及相应的算法集和揭示因素的非线性程序。我们证明该层次结构的第三层近似为 $2.613$，改进了当前最佳比率 $2.675$，而根据建议的分析，没有任何层可以证明比 $2.588$ 更好。不利的一面是，我们给出了一系列双点解决方案，即使允许开放 $k+o(k)$ 设施，它们也无法比黄金比例的平方根更好地近似。这给当前获得优于 $2 \sqrtφ \approx 2.544$ 的近似值的方法带来了障碍。总的来说，我们将双点解的近似差距减少了三分之二。

AI.tldr: 本文改进了$k$-median问题的近似算法，通过优化第二步的舍入过程，减少了双点解的近似差距。
AI.motivation: 当前最优的$k$-median近似算法依赖于先获得一个结构化的分数解（双点解），然后将其舍入为整数解。但现有方法的近似比仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 本文通过统一和改进已有方法，提出了一种分层的分区方案，并对应设计了算法和非线性规划模型，以实现更优的近似比。
AI.result: 第三层方案实现了2.613的近似比，优于之前的2.675，同时证明了在当前分析下无法突破2.588的下限。此外，还给出了一个无法被改进到黄金比例平方根以下的双点解族。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进舍入算法和分析下限，本文显著缩小了双点解的近似差距，为$k$-median问题的研究提供了新的方向。

On the negative side, we give a family of bi-point solutions which cannot be approximated better than the square root of the golden ratio, even if allowed to open $k+o(k)$ facilities. This gives a barrier to current approaches for obtaining an approximation better than $2 \sqrtφ \approx 2.544$. Altogether we reduce the approximation gap of bi-point solutions by two thirds. 当前 $k$ 中位数的最佳近似算法依赖于首先获得称为双点解的结构化分数解，然后将其舍入为整数解。我们通过统一和完善以前的方法来改进第二步。我们描述了设施日益复杂的分区方案的层次结构，以及相应的算法集和揭示因素的非线性程序。我们证明该层次结构的第三层近似为 $2.613$，改进了当前最佳比率 $2.675$，而根据建议的分析，没有任何层可以证明比 $2.588$ 更好。不利的一面是，我们给出了一系列双点解决方案，即使允许开放 $k+o(k)$ 设施，它们也无法比黄金比例的平方根更好地近似。这给当前获得优于 $2 \sqrtφ \approx 2.544$ 的近似值的方法带来了障碍。总的来说，我们将双点解的近似差距减少了三分之二。 本文改进了$k$-median问题的近似算法，通过优化第二步的舍入过程，减少了双点解的近似差距。 Kishen N. Gowda,Thomas Pensyl,Aravind Srinivasan,Khoa Trinh cs.DS

authors_text: Matthew Bendel,Rizwan Ahmad,Philip Schniter
title: A Regularized Conditional GAN for Posterior Sampling in Image Recovery Problems
title_zh: 用于图像恢复问题中后采样的正则化条件 GAN
abstract: In image recovery problems, one seeks to infer an image from distorted, incomplete, and/or noise-corrupted measurements. Such problems arise in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), computed tomography, deblurring, super-resolution, inpainting, phase retrieval, image-to-image translation, and other applications. Given a training set of signal/measurement pairs, we seek to do more than just produce one good image estimate. Rather, we aim to rapidly and accurately sample from the posterior distribution. To do this, we propose a regularized conditional Wasserstein GAN that generates dozens of high-quality posterior samples per second. Our regularization comprises an $\ell_1$ penalty and an adaptively weighted standard-deviation reward. Using quantitative evaluation metrics like conditional Fréchet inception distance, we demonstrate that our method produces state-of-the-art posterior samples in both multicoil MRI and large-scale inpainting applications. The code for our model can be found here: https://github.com/matt-bendel/rcGAN
summary: In image recovery problems, one seeks to infer an image from distorted, incomplete, and/or noise-corrupted measurements. Such problems arise in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), computed tomography, deblurring, super-resolution, inpainting, phase retrieval, image-to-image translation, and other applications. Given a training set of signal/measurement pairs, we seek to do more than just produce one good image estimate. Rather, we aim to rapidly and accurately sample from the posterior distribution. To do this, we propose a regularized conditional Wasserstein GAN that generates dozens of high-quality posterior samples per second. Our regularization comprises an $\ell_1$ penalty and an adaptively weighted standard-deviation reward. Using quantitative evaluation metrics like conditional Fréchet inception distance, we demonstrate that our method produces state-of-the-art posterior samples in both multicoil MRI and large-scale inpainting applications. The code for our model can be found here: https://github.com/matt-bendel/rcGAN
abstract_zh: 在图像恢复问题中，人们试图从扭曲的、不完整的和/或噪声破坏的测量中推断出图像。这些问题出现在磁共振成像（MRI）、计算机断层扫描、去模糊、超分辨率、修复、相位检索、图像到图像转换和其他应用中。给定一组信号/测量对的训练集，我们寻求做的不仅仅是产生一个良好的图像估计。相反，我们的目标是快速准确地从后验分布中采样。为此，我们提出了一种正则化条件 Wasserstein GAN，每秒生成数十个高质量后验样本。我们的正则化包括 $\ell_1$ 惩罚和自适应加权标准差奖励。使用条件 Fréchet 起始距离等定量评估指标，我们证明我们的方法可以在多线圈 MRI 和大规模修复应用中产生最先进的后验样本。我们模型的代码可以在这里找到：https://github.com/matt-bendel/rcGAN

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种正则化条件Wasserstein GAN，用于图像恢复问题中的后验采样，以生成高质量的后验样本。
AI.motivation: 传统图像恢复方法难以高效准确地从后验分布中采样，而快速生成多样化的高质量样本对MRI、图像修复等应用至关重要。
AI.method: 设计正则化条件Wasserstein GAN，结合ℓ1惩罚项与自适应标准差奖励机制，实现每秒生成数十个高质量后验样本。
AI.result: 在多线圈MRI和大规模图像修复任务中，使用条件Fréchet inception距离等指标验证了方法的先进性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过正则化机制有效提升了后验采样的质量与效率，为图像恢复领域提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Jurgis Pasukonis,Timothy Lillicrap,Danijar Hafner
title: Evaluating Long-Term Memory in 3D Mazes
title_zh: 评估 3D 迷宫中的长期记忆
abstract: Intelligent agents need to remember salient information to reason in partially-observed environments. For example, agents with a first-person view should remember the positions of relevant objects even if they go out of view. Similarly, to effectively navigate through rooms agents need to remember the floor plan of how rooms are connected. However, most benchmark tasks in reinforcement learning do not test long-term memory in agents, slowing down progress in this important research direction. In this paper, we introduce the Memory Maze, a 3D domain of randomized mazes specifically designed for evaluating long-term memory in agents. Unlike existing benchmarks, Memory Maze measures long-term memory separate from confounding agent abilities and requires the agent to localize itself by integrating information over time. With Memory Maze, we propose an online reinforcement learning benchmark, a diverse offline dataset, and an offline probing evaluation. Recording a human player establishes a strong baseline and verifies the need to build up and retain memories, which is reflected in their gradually increasing rewards within each episode. We find that current algorithms benefit from training with truncated backpropagation through time and succeed on small mazes, but fall short of human performance on the large mazes, leaving room for future algorithmic designs to be evaluated on the Memory Maze.
summary: Intelligent agents need to remember salient information to reason in partially-observed environments. For example, agents with a first-person view should remember the positions of relevant objects even if they go out of view. Similarly, to effectively navigate through rooms agents need to remember the floor plan of how rooms are connected. However, most benchmark tasks in reinforcement learning do not test long-term memory in agents, slowing down progress in this important research direction. In this paper, we introduce the Memory Maze, a 3D domain of randomized mazes specifically designed for evaluating long-term memory in agents. Unlike existing benchmarks, Memory Maze measures long-term memory separate from confounding agent abilities and requires the agent to localize itself by integrating information over time. With Memory Maze, we propose an online reinforcement learning benchmark, a diverse offline dataset, and an offline probing evaluation. Recording a human player establishes a strong baseline and verifies the need to build up and retain memories, which is reflected in their gradually increasing rewards within each episode. We find that current algorithms benefit from training with truncated backpropagation through time and succeed on small mazes, but fall short of human performance on the large mazes, leaving room for future algorithmic designs to be evaluated on the Memory Maze.
abstract_zh: 智能代理需要记住显着信息，以便在部分观察的环境中进行推理。例如，具有第一人称视角的代理应该记住相关对象的位置，即使它们超出了视野。同样，为了有效地浏览房间，客服人员需要记住房间连接方式的平面图。然而，强化学习中的大多数基准任务并没有测试智能体的长期记忆，从而减缓了这一重要研究方向的进展。在本文中，我们介绍了记忆迷宫，这是一个随机迷宫的 3D 域，专门用于评估智能体的长期记忆。与现有的基准测试不同，记忆迷宫测量长期记忆与混淆代理能力分开，并要求代理通过随着时间的推移整合信息来定位自身。通过 Memory Maze，我们提出了在线强化学习基准、多样化的离线数据集和离线探测评估。记录人类玩家建立了一个强大的基线，并验证了建立和保留记忆的需要，这反映在他们在每一集中逐渐增加的奖励中。我们发现，当前的算法受益于随着时间的推移截断反向传播的训练，并且在小型迷宫上取得了成功，但在大型迷宫上却低于人类的表现，这为未来的算法设计在记忆迷宫上进行评估留下了空间。

AI.tldr: 设计并评估Memory Maze环境以测试智能体在三维迷宫中的长期记忆能力
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习基准缺乏对长期记忆的有效评估，阻碍了相关研究进展
AI.method: 引入Memory Maze三维迷宫环境，结合在线强化学习基准、离线数据集及人类玩家基线进行评估
AI.result: 当前算法在小型迷宫有效，但大型迷宫表现不及人类，显示算法仍有改进空间
AI.conclusion: Memory Maze为长期记忆算法研究提供了新基准，需进一步优化算法以接近人类水平

authors_text: Kenneth Li,Aspen K. Hopkins,David Bau,Fernanda Viégas,Hanspeter Pfister,Martin Wattenberg
title: Emergent World Representations: Exploring a Sequence Model Trained on a Synthetic Task
title_zh: 新兴世界表示：探索在综合任务上训练的序列模型
abstract: Language models show a surprising range of capabilities, but the source of their apparent competence is unclear. Do these networks just memorize a collection of surface statistics, or do they rely on internal representations of the process that generates the sequences they see? We investigate this question by applying a variant of the GPT model to the task of predicting legal moves in a simple board game, Othello. Although the network has no a priori knowledge of the game or its rules, we uncover evidence of an emergent nonlinear internal representation of the board state. Interventional experiments indicate this representation can be used to control the output of the network and create "latent saliency maps" that can help explain predictions in human terms.
summary: Language models show a surprising range of capabilities, but the source of their apparent competence is unclear. Do these networks just memorize a collection of surface statistics, or do they rely on internal representations of the process that generates the sequences they see? We investigate this question by applying a variant of the GPT model to the task of predicting legal moves in a simple board game, Othello. Although the network has no a priori knowledge of the game or its rules, we uncover evidence of an emergent nonlinear internal representation of the board state. Interventional experiments indicate this representation can be used to control the output of the network and create "latent saliency maps" that can help explain predictions in human terms.
abstract_zh: 语言模型显示出令人惊讶的能力范围，但其明显能力的来源尚不清楚。这些网络只是记住表面统计数据的集合，还是依赖于生成它们所看到的序列的过程的内部表示？我们通过将 GPT 模型的变体应用于预测简单棋盘游戏《黑白棋》中的合法动作的任务来研究这个问题。尽管网络没有游戏或其规则的先验知识，但我们发现了棋盘状态的新兴非线性内部表示的证据。介入实验表明，这种表示可用于控制网络的输出并创建“潜在显着性图”，有助于用人类术语解释预测。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过应用GPT模型变体于围棋游戏Othello的合法移动预测任务，探讨语言模型是否依赖内部状态表示而非单纯记忆表面统计信息。
AI.motivation: 研究语言模型的能力来源，明确其是通过记忆表面统计信息还是构建内部生成过程的表示来实现预测能力。
AI.method: 使用GPT模型变体训练合成任务（Othello合法移动预测），通过干预实验分析模型内部表示并生成可解释的潜在显著性图。
AI.result: 发现模型涌现出非线性棋盘状态表示，干预实验验证该表示可控制输出并生成人类可理解的预测解释。
AI.conclusion: 序列模型能在无先验游戏知识情况下自主构建有效内部表示，为模型可解释性研究提供新视角。

search_text: Emergent World Representations: Exploring a Sequence Model Trained on a Synthetic Task 新兴世界表示：探索在综合任务上训练的序列模型 Language models show a surprising range of capabilities, but the source of their apparent competence is unclear. Do these networks just memorize a collection of surface statistics, or do they rely on internal representations of the process that generates the sequences they see? We investigate this question by applying a variant of the GPT model to the task of predicting legal moves in a simple board game, Othello. Although the network has no a priori knowledge of the game or its rules, we uncover evidence of an emergent nonlinear internal representation of the board state. Interventional experiments indicate this representation can be used to control the output of the network and create "latent saliency maps" that can help explain predictions in human terms. 语言模型显示出令人惊讶的能力范围，但其明显能力的来源尚不清楚。这些网络只是记住表面统计数据的集合，还是依赖于生成它们所看到的序列的过程的内部表示？我们通过将 GPT 模型的变体应用于预测简单棋盘游戏《黑白棋》中的合法动作的任务来研究这个问题。尽管网络没有游戏或其规则的先验知识，但我们发现了棋盘状态的新兴非线性内部表示的证据。介入实验表明，这种表示可用于控制网络的输出并创建“潜在显着性图”，有助于用人类术语解释预测。 该论文通过应用GPT模型变体于围棋游戏Othello的合法移动预测任务，探讨语言模型是否依赖内部状态表示而非单纯记忆表面统计信息。 Kenneth Li,Aspen K. Hopkins,David Bau,Fernanda Viégas,Hanspeter Pfister,Martin Wattenberg cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Maonan Wang,Yutong Xu,Xi Xiong,Yuheng Kan,Chengcheng Xu,Man-On Pun
title: ADLight: A Universal Approach of Traffic Signal Control with Augmented Data Using Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: ADLight：使用强化学习通过增强数据进行交通信号控制的通用方法
comment: ef:2023 Transportation Research Board Annual Meeting
comments: ef:2023 Transportation Research Board Annual Meeting
abstract: Traffic signal control has the potential to reduce congestion in dynamic networks. Recent studies show that traffic signal control with reinforcement learning (RL) methods can significantly reduce the average waiting time. However, a shortcoming of existing methods is that they require model retraining for new intersections with different structures. In this paper, we propose a novel reinforcement learning approach with augmented data (ADLight) to train a universal model for intersections with different structures. We propose a new agent design incorporating features on movements and actions with set current phase duration to allow the generalized model to have the same structure for different intersections. A new data augmentation method named \textit{movement shuffle} is developed to improve the generalization performance. We also test the universal model with new intersections in Simulation of Urban MObility (SUMO). The results show that the performance of our approach is close to the models trained in a single environment directly (only a 5% loss of average waiting time), and we can reduce more than 80% of training time, which saves a lot of computational resources in scalable operations of traffic lights.
summary: Traffic signal control has the potential to reduce congestion in dynamic networks. Recent studies show that traffic signal control with reinforcement learning (RL) methods can significantly reduce the average waiting time. However, a shortcoming of existing methods is that they require model retraining for new intersections with different structures. In this paper, we propose a novel reinforcement learning approach with augmented data (ADLight) to train a universal model for intersections with different structures. We propose a new agent design incorporating features on movements and actions with set current phase duration to allow the generalized model to have the same structure for different intersections. A new data augmentation method named \textit{movement shuffle} is developed to improve the generalization performance. We also test the universal model with new intersections in Simulation of Urban MObility (SUMO). The results show that the performance of our approach is close to the models trained in a single environment directly (only a 5% loss of average waiting time), and we can reduce more than 80% of training time, which saves a lot of computational resources in scalable operations of traffic lights.
abstract_zh: 交通信号控制有可能减少动态网络中的拥塞。最近的研究表明，采用强化学习（RL）方法的交通信号控制可以显着减少平均等待时间。然而，现有方法的一个缺点是它们需要针对具有不同结构的新交叉口进行模型重新训练。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的强化学习方法，使用增强数据（ADLight）来训练具有不同结构的交叉口的通用模型。我们提出了一种新的代理设计，结合了运动和动作的特征以及设定的当前阶段持续时间，以允许广义模型对于不同的交叉点具有相同的结构。开发了一种名为 \textit{movement shuffle} 的新数据增强方法来提高泛化性能。我们还在城市交通模拟 (SUMO) 中测试了具有新交叉口的通用模型。结果表明，我们的方法的性能接近于直接在单一环境中训练的模型（平均等待时间仅损失 5%），并且我们可以减少超过 80% 的训练时间，这在交通信号灯的可扩展操作中节省了大量的计算资源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ADLight方法，通过增强数据和强化学习训练适用于不同结构交叉口的通用交通信号控制模型。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法需为不同结构交叉口单独训练模型，导致效率低且消耗大量计算资源。
AI.method: 设计统一结构的智能体并引入'movement shuffle'数据增强方法，结合当前相位持续时间特征提升模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在SUMO仿真中，通用模型性能仅比单一环境训练模型损失5%平均等待时间，训练时间减少80%。
AI.conclusion: ADLight有效实现了跨交叉口的通用交通信号控制，显著降低训练成本且保持较高性能。
