authors_text: Yuan Gao,Yukai Gong,Victor Paredes,Ayonga Hereid,Yan Gu
title: Time-Varying ALIP Model and Robust Foot-Placement Control for Underactuated Bipedal Robot Walking on a Swaying Rigid Surface
title_zh: 欠驱动双足机器人在摇摆刚性表面上行走的时变 ALIP 模型和鲁棒足部放置控制
abstract: Controller design for bipedal walking on dynamic rigid surfaces (DRSes), which are rigid surfaces moving in the inertial frame (e.g., ships and airplanes), remains largely uninvestigated. This paper introduces a hierarchical control approach that achieves stable underactuated bipedal robot walking on a horizontally oscillating DRS. The highest layer of our approach is a real-time motion planner that generates desired global behaviors (i.e., the center of mass trajectories and footstep locations) by stabilizing a reduced-order robot model. One key novelty of this layer is the derivation of the reduced-order model by analytically extending the angular momentum based linear inverted pendulum (ALIP) model from stationary to horizontally moving surfaces. The other novelty is the development of a discrete-time foot-placement controller that exponentially stabilizes the hybrid, linear, time-varying ALIP model. The middle layer of the proposed approach is a walking pattern generator that translates the desired global behaviors into the robot's full-body reference trajectories for all directly actuated degrees of freedom. The lowest layer is an input-output linearizing controller that exponentially tracks those full-body reference trajectories based on the full-order, hybrid, nonlinear robot dynamics. Simulations of planar underactuated bipedal walking on a swaying DRS confirm that the proposed framework ensures the walking stability under different DRS motions and gait types.
summary: Controller design for bipedal walking on dynamic rigid surfaces (DRSes), which are rigid surfaces moving in the inertial frame (e.g., ships and airplanes), remains largely uninvestigated. This paper introduces a hierarchical control approach that achieves stable underactuated bipedal robot walking on a horizontally oscillating DRS. The highest layer of our approach is a real-time motion planner that generates desired global behaviors (i.e., the center of mass trajectories and footstep locations) by stabilizing a reduced-order robot model. One key novelty of this layer is the derivation of the reduced-order model by analytically extending the angular momentum based linear inverted pendulum (ALIP) model from stationary to horizontally moving surfaces. The other novelty is the development of a discrete-time foot-placement controller that exponentially stabilizes the hybrid, linear, time-varying ALIP model. The middle layer of the proposed approach is a walking pattern generator that translates the desired global behaviors into the robot's full-body reference trajectories for all directly actuated degrees of freedom. The lowest layer is an input-output linearizing controller that exponentially tracks those full-body reference trajectories based on the full-order, hybrid, nonlinear robot dynamics. Simulations of planar underactuated bipedal walking on a swaying DRS confirm that the proposed framework ensures the walking stability under different DRS motions and gait types.
abstract_zh: 用于在动态刚性表面 (DRS) 上双足行走的控制器设计，动态刚性表面是在惯性系（例如船舶和飞机）中移动的刚性表面，在很大程度上仍未得到研究。本文介绍了一种分层控制方法，可实现欠驱动双足机器人在水平振荡 DRS 上稳定行走。我们方法的最高层是实时运动规划器，它通过稳定降阶机器人模型来生成所需的全局行为（即质心轨迹和足迹位置）。该层的一个关键新颖之处是通过分析将基于角动量的线性倒立摆（ALIP）模型从静止表面扩展到水平移动表面来推导降阶模型。另一个新颖之处是开发了一种离散时间足部放置控制器，该控制器能够以指数方式稳定混合、线性、时变 ALIP 模型。所提出方法的中间层是步行模式生成器，它将所需的全局行为转换为机器人所有直接驱动自由度的全身参考轨迹。最底层是一个输入输出线性化控制器，它基于全阶、混合、非线性机器人动力学以指数方式跟踪这些全身参考轨迹。在摇摆 DRS 上平面欠驱动双足行走的模拟证实，所提出的框架确保了不同 DRS 运动和步态类型下的行走稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层控制方法，使欠驱动双足机器人能够在水平摆动的动态刚性表面上稳定行走。
AI.motivation: 动态刚性表面（如船舶和飞机）上的双足机器人控制研究尚未充分探索，现有方法难以应对表面运动带来的稳定性挑战。
AI.method: 采用分层控制架构：顶层基于扩展的角动量ALIP模型生成运动轨迹，中层生成全身参考轨迹，底层通过输入输出线性化控制器跟踪轨迹，并设计离散时间足部放置控制器稳定时变ALIP模型。
AI.result: 仿真验证了该框架在不同动态表面运动和步态类型下均能保证行走稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分层控制方法有效解决了欠驱动双足机器人在动态刚性表面的稳定行走问题，为相关领域提供了新的技术路径。

Simulations of planar underactuated bipedal walking on a swaying DRS confirm that the proposed framework ensures the walking stability under different DRS motions and gait types. 用于在动态刚性表面 (DRS) 上双足行走的控制器设计，动态刚性表面是在惯性系（例如船舶和飞机）中移动的刚性表面，在很大程度上仍未得到研究。本文介绍了一种分层控制方法，可实现欠驱动双足机器人在水平振荡 DRS 上稳定行走。我们方法的最高层是实时运动规划器，它通过稳定降阶机器人模型来生成所需的全局行为（即质心轨迹和足迹位置）。该层的一个关键新颖之处是通过分析将基于角动量的线性倒立摆（ALIP）模型从静止表面扩展到水平移动表面来推导降阶模型。另一个新颖之处是开发了一种离散时间足部放置控制器，该控制器能够以指数方式稳定混合、线性、时变 ALIP 模型。所提出方法的中间层是步行模式生成器，它将所需的全局行为转换为机器人所有直接驱动自由度的全身参考轨迹。最底层是一个输入输出线性化控制器，它基于全阶、混合、非线性机器人动力学以指数方式跟踪这些全身参考轨迹。在摇摆 DRS 上平面欠驱动双足行走的模拟证实，所提出的框架确保了不同 DRS 运动和步态类型下的行走稳定性。 本文提出了一种分层控制方法，使欠驱动双足机器人能够在水平摆动的动态刚性表面上稳定行走。 Yuan Gao,Yukai Gong,Victor Paredes,Ayonga Hereid,Yan Gu cs.RO

authors_text: Hochul Hwang,Tim Xia,Ibrahima Keita,Ken Suzuki,Joydeep Biswas,Sunghoon I. Lee,Donghyun Kim
title: System Configuration and Navigation of a Guide Dog Robot: Toward Animal Guide Dog-Level Guiding Work
title_zh: 导盲犬机器人的系统配置和导航：走向动物导盲犬级的导盲工作
abstract: A robot guide dog has compelling advantages over animal guide dogs for its cost-effectiveness, potential for mass production, and low maintenance burden. However, despite the long history of guide dog robot research, previous studies were conducted with little or no consideration of how the guide dog handler and the guide dog work as a team for navigation. To develop a robotic guiding system that is genuinely beneficial to blind or visually impaired individuals, we performed qualitative research, including interviews with guide dog handlers and trainers and first-hand blindfold walking experiences with various guide dogs. Grounded on the facts learned from vivid experience and interviews, we build a collaborative indoor navigation scheme for a guide dog robot that includes preferred features such as speed and directional control. For collaborative navigation, we propose a semantic-aware local path planner that enables safe and efficient guiding work by utilizing semantic information about the environment and considering the handler's position and directional cues to determine the collision-free path. We evaluate our integrated robotic system by testing guide blindfold walking in indoor settings and demonstrate guide dog-like navigation behavior by avoiding obstacles at typical gait speed ($0.7 \mathrm{m/s}$).
summary: A robot guide dog has compelling advantages over animal guide dogs for its cost-effectiveness, potential for mass production, and low maintenance burden. However, despite the long history of guide dog robot research, previous studies were conducted with little or no consideration of how the guide dog handler and the guide dog work as a team for navigation. To develop a robotic guiding system that is genuinely beneficial to blind or visually impaired individuals, we performed qualitative research, including interviews with guide dog handlers and trainers and first-hand blindfold walking experiences with various guide dogs. Grounded on the facts learned from vivid experience and interviews, we build a collaborative indoor navigation scheme for a guide dog robot that includes preferred features such as speed and directional control. For collaborative navigation, we propose a semantic-aware local path planner that enables safe and efficient guiding work by utilizing semantic information about the environment and considering the handler's position and directional cues to determine the collision-free path. We evaluate our integrated robotic system by testing guide blindfold walking in indoor settings and demonstrate guide dog-like navigation behavior by avoiding obstacles at typical gait speed ($0.7 \mathrm{m/s}$).
abstract_zh: 与动物导盲犬相比，机器人导盲犬具有成本效益、大规模生产潜力和低维护负担等显着优势。然而，尽管导盲犬机器人研究历史悠久，但之前的研究很少或根本没有考虑导盲犬训练员和导盲犬如何作为一个团队进行导航。为了开发真正有益于盲人或视障人士的机器人导盲系统，我们进行了定性研究，包括采访导盲犬训练员和训练员，以及与各种导盲犬一起蒙眼行走的第一手经验。基于从生动的经验和采访中了解到的事实，我们为导盲犬机器人构建了一个协作室内导航方案，其中包括速度和方向控制等首选功能。对于协作导航，我们提出了一种语义感知的本地路径规划器，它通过利用有关环境的语义信息并考虑处理程序的位置和方向线索来确定无碰撞路径，从而实现安全高效的引导工作。我们通过在室内环境中测试导盲犬蒙眼行走来评估我们的集成机器人系统，并通过以典型步态速度（$0.7 \mathrm{m/s}$）避开障碍物来展示类似导盲犬的导航行为。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种具有类似导盲犬导航能力的机器人导盲犬系统。
AI.motivation: 机器人导盲犬相比动物导盲犬具有成本低、易于量产和维护负担小等优势，但以往研究很少考虑导盲犬与使用者之间的协作导航。
AI.method: 通过与导盲犬训练师和使用者的访谈以及盲人模拟行走体验，构建了基于语义信息的协作室内导航方案，并提出了一种语义感知的局部路径规划器。
AI.result: 通过室内盲人模拟行走测试验证了该系统的有效性，展示了类似导盲犬的导航行为，能够在典型步速下避开障碍物。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为开发真正有益于视障人士的机器人导盲系统提供了新的思路和方法。

authors_text: Junya Sato,Shoji Kido
title: Large Batch and Patch Size Training for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于医学图像分割的大批量和补丁大小训练
abstract: Multi-organ segmentation enables organ evaluation, accounts the relationship between multiple organs, and facilitates accurate diagnosis and treatment decisions. However, only few models can perform segmentation accurately because of the lack of datasets and computational resources. On AMOS2022 challenge, which is a large-scale, clinical, and diverse abdominal multiorgan segmentation benchmark, we trained a 3D-UNet model with large batch and patch sizes using multi-GPU distributed training. Segmentation performance tended to increase for models with large batch and patch sizes compared with the baseline settings. The accuracy was further improved by using ensemble models that were trained with different settings. These results provide a reference for parameter selection in organ segmentation.
summary: Multi-organ segmentation enables organ evaluation, accounts the relationship between multiple organs, and facilitates accurate diagnosis and treatment decisions. However, only few models can perform segmentation accurately because of the lack of datasets and computational resources. On AMOS2022 challenge, which is a large-scale, clinical, and diverse abdominal multiorgan segmentation benchmark, we trained a 3D-UNet model with large batch and patch sizes using multi-GPU distributed training. Segmentation performance tended to increase for models with large batch and patch sizes compared with the baseline settings. The accuracy was further improved by using ensemble models that were trained with different settings. These results provide a reference for parameter selection in organ segmentation.
abstract_zh: 多器官分割可以实现器官评估，说明多个器官之间的关系，有利于准确的诊断和治疗决策。然而，由于缺乏数据集和计算资源，只有少数模型能够准确地进行分割。在 AMOS2022 挑战赛（大规模、临床和多样化的腹部多器官分割基准）中，我们使用多 GPU 分布式训练训练了具有大批量和补丁大小的 3D-UNet 模型。与基线设置相比，具有大批量和补丁大小的模型的分割性能往往会提高。通过使用在不同设置下训练的集成模型，准确性得到了进一步提高。这些结果为器官分割中的参数选择提供参考。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在医学图像分割中使用大批次和大块尺寸训练的方法，以提升多器官分割的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于缺乏数据集和计算资源，现有模型难以准确进行多器官分割，因此需要探索更有效的训练策略。
AI.method: 采用3D-UNet模型，结合多GPU分布式训练，使用大批次和大块尺寸进行训练，并通过不同设置的集成模型提升准确率。
AI.result: 模型分割性能相比基线设置显著提升，集成模型进一步优化了准确率，为参数选择提供了参考。
AI.conclusion: 大批次和大块尺寸训练有效提升了医学图像分割性能，集成方法可进一步优化结果，为参数配置提供依据。

authors_text: Mark Ibrahim,Diane Bouchacourt,Ari Morcos
title: Robust Self-Supervised Learning with Lie Groups
title_zh: 具有李群的鲁棒自监督学习
abstract: Deep learning has led to remarkable advances in computer vision. Even so, today's best models are brittle when presented with variations that differ even slightly from those seen during training. Minor shifts in the pose, color, or illumination of an object can lead to catastrophic misclassifications. State-of-the art models struggle to understand how a set of variations can affect different objects. We propose a framework for instilling a notion of how objects vary in more realistic settings. Our approach applies the formalism of Lie groups to capture continuous transformations to improve models' robustness to distributional shifts. We apply our framework on top of state-of-the-art self-supervised learning (SSL) models, finding that explicitly modeling transformations with Lie groups leads to substantial performance gains of greater than 10% for MAE on both known instances seen in typical poses now presented in new poses, and on unknown instances in any pose. We also apply our approach to ImageNet, finding that the Lie operator improves performance by almost 4%. These results demonstrate the promise of learning transformations to improve model robustness.
summary: Deep learning has led to remarkable advances in computer vision. Even so, today's best models are brittle when presented with variations that differ even slightly from those seen during training. Minor shifts in the pose, color, or illumination of an object can lead to catastrophic misclassifications. State-of-the art models struggle to understand how a set of variations can affect different objects. We propose a framework for instilling a notion of how objects vary in more realistic settings. Our approach applies the formalism of Lie groups to capture continuous transformations to improve models' robustness to distributional shifts. We apply our framework on top of state-of-the-art self-supervised learning (SSL) models, finding that explicitly modeling transformations with Lie groups leads to substantial performance gains of greater than 10% for MAE on both known instances seen in typical poses now presented in new poses, and on unknown instances in any pose. We also apply our approach to ImageNet, finding that the Lie operator improves performance by almost 4%. These results demonstrate the promise of learning transformations to improve model robustness.
abstract_zh: 深度学习带来了计算机视觉领域的显着进步。即便如此，当今最好的模型在出现与训练期间看到的变化甚至略有不同的变化时仍然很脆弱。物体的姿势、颜色或照明的微小变化可能会导致灾难性的错误分类。最先进的模型很难理解一组变化如何影响不同的对象。我们提出了一个框架，用于灌输物体在更现实的环境中如何变化的概念。我们的方法应用李群的形式来捕获连续变换，以提高模型对分布变化的鲁棒性。我们将我们的框架应用在最先进的自监督学习 (SSL) 模型之上，发现使用李群进行显式建模变换可以使 MAE 在新姿势中呈现的典型姿势中看到的已知实例以及任何姿势中的未知实例上获得超过 10% 的显着性能提升。我们还将我们的方法应用于 ImageNet，发现 Lie 算子将性能提高了近 4%。这些结果证明了学习转换有望提高模型的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于李群的框架，以增强自监督学习模型对分布偏移的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的深度学习模型在面对训练时未见过的细微变化（如姿态、颜色或光照变化）时表现脆弱，容易出现灾难性错误分类。
AI.method: 该方法利用李群的形式化来建模连续变换，并将其应用于最先进的自监督学习模型中，以提高模型对分布偏移的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在MAE和ImageNet数据集上的实验表明，该方法在新姿态下的已知实例和任何姿态下的未知实例上分别提升了超过10%和近4%的性能。
AI.conclusion: 学习变换以提高模型鲁棒性的方法展现出良好的前景，李群的引入有效提升了模型对分布偏移的适应能力。

search_text: Robust Self-Supervised Learning with Lie Groups 具有李群的鲁棒自监督学习 Deep learning has led to remarkable advances in computer vision. Even so, today's best models are brittle when presented with variations that differ even slightly from those seen during training. Minor shifts in the pose, color, or illumination of an object can lead to catastrophic misclassifications. State-of-the art models struggle to understand how a set of variations can affect different objects. We propose a framework for instilling a notion of how objects vary in more realistic settings. Our approach applies the formalism of Lie groups to capture continuous transformations to improve models' robustness to distributional shifts. We apply our framework on top of state-of-the-art self-supervised learning (SSL) models, finding that explicitly modeling transformations with Lie groups leads to substantial performance gains of greater than 10% for MAE on both known instances seen in typical poses now presented in new poses, and on unknown instances in any pose. We also apply our approach to ImageNet, finding that the Lie operator improves performance by almost 4%. These results demonstrate the promise of learning transformations to improve model robustness. 深度学习带来了计算机视觉领域的显着进步。即便如此，当今最好的模型在出现与训练期间看到的变化甚至略有不同的变化时仍然很脆弱。物体的姿势、颜色或照明的微小变化可能会导致灾难性的错误分类。最先进的模型很难理解一组变化如何影响不同的对象。我们提出了一个框架，用于灌输物体在更现实的环境中如何变化的概念。我们的方法应用李群的形式来捕获连续变换，以提高模型对分布变化的鲁棒性。我们将我们的框架应用在最先进的自监督学习 (SSL) 模型之上，发现使用李群进行显式建模变换可以使 MAE 在新姿势中呈现的典型姿势中看到的已知实例以及任何姿势中的未知实例上获得超过 10% 的显着性能提升。我们还将我们的方法应用于 ImageNet，发现 Lie 算子将性能提高了近 4%。这些结果证明了学习转换有望提高模型的稳健性。 该论文提出了一种基于李群的框架，以增强自监督学习模型对分布偏移的鲁棒性。 Mark Ibrahim,Diane Bouchacourt,Ari Morcos cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sanchit Gandhi,Patrick von Platen,Alexander M. Rush
title: ESB: A Benchmark For Multi-Domain End-to-End Speech Recognition
title_zh: ESB：多域端到端语音识别的基准
abstract: Speech recognition applications cover a range of different audio and text distributions, with different speaking styles, background noise, transcription punctuation and character casing. However, many speech recognition systems require dataset-specific tuning (audio filtering, punctuation removal and normalisation of casing), therefore assuming a-priori knowledge of both the audio and text distributions. This tuning requirement can lead to systems failing to generalise to other datasets and domains. To promote the development of multi-domain speech systems, we introduce the End-to-end Speech Benchmark (ESB) for evaluating the performance of a single automatic speech recognition (ASR) system across a broad set of speech datasets. Benchmarked systems must use the same data pre- and post-processing algorithm across datasets - assuming the audio and text data distributions are a-priori unknown. We compare a series of state-of-the-art (SoTA) end-to-end (E2E) systems on this benchmark, demonstrating how a single speech system can be applied and evaluated on a wide range of data distributions. We find E2E systems to be effective across datasets: in a fair comparison, E2E systems achieve within 2.6% of SoTA systems tuned to a specific dataset. Our analysis reveals that transcription artefacts, such as punctuation and casing, pose difficulties for ASR systems and should be included in evaluation. We believe E2E benchmarking over a range of datasets promotes the research of multi-domain speech recognition systems. ESB is available at https://huggingface.co/esb.
summary: Speech recognition applications cover a range of different audio and text distributions, with different speaking styles, background noise, transcription punctuation and character casing. However, many speech recognition systems require dataset-specific tuning (audio filtering, punctuation removal and normalisation of casing), therefore assuming a-priori knowledge of both the audio and text distributions. This tuning requirement can lead to systems failing to generalise to other datasets and domains. To promote the development of multi-domain speech systems, we introduce the End-to-end Speech Benchmark (ESB) for evaluating the performance of a single automatic speech recognition (ASR) system across a broad set of speech datasets. Benchmarked systems must use the same data pre- and post-processing algorithm across datasets - assuming the audio and text data distributions are a-priori unknown. We compare a series of state-of-the-art (SoTA) end-to-end (E2E) systems on this benchmark, demonstrating how a single speech system can be applied and evaluated on a wide range of data distributions. We find E2E systems to be effective across datasets: in a fair comparison, E2E systems achieve within 2.6% of SoTA systems tuned to a specific dataset. Our analysis reveals that transcription artefacts, such as punctuation and casing, pose difficulties for ASR systems and should be included in evaluation. We believe E2E benchmarking over a range of datasets promotes the research of multi-domain speech recognition systems. ESB is available at https://huggingface.co/esb.
abstract_zh: 语音识别应用涵盖一系列不同的音频和文本分布，具有不同的说话风格、背景噪音、转录标点符号和字符大小写。然而，许多语音识别系统需要特定于数据集的调整（音频过滤、标点符号删除和大小写标准化），因此假设音频和文本分布的先验知识。这种调整要求可能会导致系统无法推广到其他数据集和领域。为了促进多域语音系统的发展，我们引入了端到端语音基准（ESB），用于评估单个自动语音识别（ASR）系统在广泛的语音数据集上的性能。基准系统必须在数据集中使用相同的数据预处理和后处理算法 - 假设音频和文本数据分布是先验未知的。我们在此基准上比较了一系列最先进的 (SoTA) 端到端 (E2E) 系统，展示了如何在广泛的数据分布上应用和评估单个语音系统。我们发现 E2E 系统在跨数据集上都很有效：公平比较，E2E 系统在针对特定数据集调整的 SoTA 系统中的实现率在 2.6% 以内。我们的分析表明，标点符号和大小写等转录伪影给 ASR 系统带来了困难，应将其纳入评估中。我们相信，对一系列数据集进行端到端基准测试可以促进多域语音识别系统的研究。 ESB 位于 https://huggingface.co/esb。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ESB基准测试，用于评估端到端语音识别系统在多领域数据集上的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语音识别系统需针对特定数据集进行参数调整，导致跨领域泛化能力不足，缺乏统一的多领域性能评估标准。
AI.method: 构建包含多领域语音数据集的基准测试，强制使用统一预处理与后处理流程，对比不同端到端系统在未知数据分布下的表现。
AI.result: 端到端系统在跨数据集测试中表现接近特定优化系统（误差小于2.6%），且发现标点符号和大小写处理对系统性能有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: ESB基准推动了多领域语音识别研究，证明端到端模型具备良好泛化性，同时强调评估中应包含文本转录伪影因素。

authors_text: MD Abdullah Al Nasim,Abdullah Al Munem,Maksuda Islam,Md Aminul Haque Palash,MD. Mahim Anjum Haque,Faisal Muhammad Shah
title: Brain Tumor Segmentation using Enhanced U-Net Model with Empirical Analysis
title_zh: 使用增强型 U-Net 模型和实证分析进行脑肿瘤分割
abstract: Cancer of the brain is deadly and requires careful surgical segmentation. The brain tumors were segmented using U-Net using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). When looking for overlaps of necrotic, edematous, growing, and healthy tissue, it might be hard to get relevant information from the images. The 2D U-Net network was improved and trained with the BraTS datasets to find these four areas. U-Net can set up many encoder and decoder routes that can be used to get information from images that can be used in different ways. To reduce computational time, we use image segmentation to exclude insignificant background details. Experiments on the BraTS datasets show that our proposed model for segmenting brain tumors from MRI (MRI) works well. In this study, we demonstrate that the BraTS datasets for 2017, 2018, 2019, and 2020 do not significantly differ from the BraTS 2019 dataset's attained dice scores of 0.8717 (necrotic), 0.9506 (edema), and 0.9427 (enhancing).
summary: Cancer of the brain is deadly and requires careful surgical segmentation. The brain tumors were segmented using U-Net using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). When looking for overlaps of necrotic, edematous, growing, and healthy tissue, it might be hard to get relevant information from the images. The 2D U-Net network was improved and trained with the BraTS datasets to find these four areas. U-Net can set up many encoder and decoder routes that can be used to get information from images that can be used in different ways. To reduce computational time, we use image segmentation to exclude insignificant background details. Experiments on the BraTS datasets show that our proposed model for segmenting brain tumors from MRI (MRI) works well. In this study, we demonstrate that the BraTS datasets for 2017, 2018, 2019, and 2020 do not significantly differ from the BraTS 2019 dataset's attained dice scores of 0.8717 (necrotic), 0.9506 (edema), and 0.9427 (enhancing).
abstract_zh: 脑癌是致命的，需要仔细的手术分割。使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 使用 U-Net 对脑肿瘤进行分割。当寻找坏死组织、水肿组织、生长组织和健康组织的重叠部分时，可能很难从图像中获取相关信息。使用 BraTS 数据集对 2D U-Net 网络进行了改进和训练，以找到这四个区域。 U-Net 可以设置许多编码器和解码器路由，可用于从可以以不同方式使用的图像中获取信息。为了减少计算时间，我们使用图像分割来排除无关紧要的背景细节。 BraTS 数据集上的实验表明，我们提出的从 MRI (MRI) 中分割脑肿瘤的模型效果良好。在本研究中，我们证明 2017 年、2018 年、2019 年和 2020 年的 BraTS 数据集与 BraTS 2019 数据集获得的 dice 分数 0.8717（坏死）、0.9506（水肿）和 0.9427（增强）没有显着差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的U-Net模型，用于从MRI图像中分割脑肿瘤，并通过实验证明其有效性。
AI.motivation: 脑肿瘤分割需要精确区分坏死、水肿、增生和健康组织，传统方法在处理重叠区域时存在困难，需改进模型以提高分割精度。
AI.method: 基于2D U-Net架构，优化编码器-解码器路径以提取多尺度特征，并利用BraTS数据集进行训练，通过图像分割去除背景噪声。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2017-2020数据集上，模型Dice系数达到0.8717（坏死）、0.9506（水肿）和0.9427（增强区域），不同年份数据集结果无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 改进的U-Net模型在脑肿瘤分割任务中表现优异，且BraTS数据集的跨年份实验结果具有稳定性。

motivation: 脑肿瘤分割需要精确区分坏死、水肿、增生和健康组织，传统方法在处理重叠区域时存在困难，需改进模型以提高分割精度。
method: 基于2D U-Net架构，优化编码器-解码器路径以提取多尺度特征，并利用BraTS数据集进行训练，通过图像分割去除背景噪声。
result: 在BraTS 2017-2020数据集上，模型Dice系数达到0.8717（坏死）、0.9506（水肿）和0.9427（增强区域），不同年份数据集结果无显著差异。
conclusion: 改进的U-Net模型在脑肿瘤分割任务中表现优异，且BraTS数据集的跨年份实验结果具有稳定性。
search_text: Brain Tumor Segmentation using Enhanced U-Net Model with Empirical Analysis 使用增强型 U-Net 模型和实证分析进行脑肿瘤分割 Cancer of the brain is deadly and requires careful surgical segmentation. The brain tumors were segmented using U-Net using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). When looking for overlaps of necrotic, edematous, growing, and healthy tissue, it might be hard to get relevant information from the images. The 2D U-Net network was improved and trained with the BraTS datasets to find these four areas. U-Net can set up many encoder and decoder routes that can be used to get information from images that can be used in different ways. To reduce computational time, we use image segmentation to exclude insignificant background details. Experiments on the BraTS datasets show that our proposed model for segmenting brain tumors from MRI (MRI) works well. In this study, we demonstrate that the BraTS datasets for 2017, 2018, 2019, and 2020 do not significantly differ from the BraTS 2019 dataset's attained dice scores of 0.8717 (necrotic), 0.9506 (edema), and 0.9427 (enhancing). 脑癌是致命的，需要仔细的手术分割。使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 使用 U-Net 对脑肿瘤进行分割。当寻找坏死组织、水肿组织、生长组织和健康组织的重叠部分时，可能很难从图像中获取相关信息。使用 BraTS 数据集对 2D U-Net 网络进行了改进和训练，以找到这四个区域。 U-Net 可以设置许多编码器和解码器路由，可用于从可以以不同方式使用的图像中获取信息。为了减少计算时间，我们使用图像分割来排除无关紧要的背景细节。 BraTS 数据集上的实验表明，我们提出的从 MRI (MRI) 中分割脑肿瘤的模型效果良好。在本研究中，我们证明 2017 年、2018 年、2019 年和 2020 年的 BraTS 数据集与 BraTS 2019 数据集获得的 dice 分数 0.8717（坏死）、0.9506（水肿）和 0.9427（增强）没有显着差异。 本文提出了一种改进的U-Net模型，用于从MRI图像中分割脑肿瘤，并通过实验证明其有效性。 MD Abdullah Al Nasim,Abdullah Al Munem,Maksuda Islam,Md Aminul Haque Palash,MD. Mahim Anjum Haque,Faisal Muhammad Shah eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Quchen Fu,Szu-Wei Fu,Yaran Fan,Yu Wu,Zhuo Chen,Jayant Gupchup,Ross Cutler
title: Real-time Speech Interruption Analysis: From Cloud to Client Deployment
title_zh: 实时语音中断分析：从云端到客户端部署
abstract: Meetings are an essential form of communication for all types of organizations, and remote collaboration systems have been much more widely used since the COVID-19 pandemic. One major issue with remote meetings is that it is challenging for remote participants to interrupt and speak. We have recently developed the first speech interruption analysis model, which detects failed speech interruptions, shows very promising performance, and is being deployed in the cloud. To deliver this feature in a more cost-efficient and environment-friendly way, we reduced the model complexity and size to ship the WavLM_SI model in client devices. In this paper, we first describe how we successfully improved the True Positive Rate (TPR) at a 1% False Positive Rate (FPR) from 50.9% to 68.3% for the failed speech interruption detection model by training on a larger dataset and fine-tuning. We then shrank the model size from 222.7 MB to 9.3 MB with an acceptable loss in accuracy and reduced the complexity from 31.2 GMACS (Giga Multiply-Accumulate Operations per Second) to 4.3 GMACS. We also estimated the environmental impact of the complexity reduction, which can be used as a general guideline for large Transformer-based models, and thus make those models more accessible with less computation overhead.
summary: Meetings are an essential form of communication for all types of organizations, and remote collaboration systems have been much more widely used since the COVID-19 pandemic. One major issue with remote meetings is that it is challenging for remote participants to interrupt and speak. We have recently developed the first speech interruption analysis model, which detects failed speech interruptions, shows very promising performance, and is being deployed in the cloud. To deliver this feature in a more cost-efficient and environment-friendly way, we reduced the model complexity and size to ship the WavLM_SI model in client devices. In this paper, we first describe how we successfully improved the True Positive Rate (TPR) at a 1% False Positive Rate (FPR) from 50.9% to 68.3% for the failed speech interruption detection model by training on a larger dataset and fine-tuning. We then shrank the model size from 222.7 MB to 9.3 MB with an acceptable loss in accuracy and reduced the complexity from 31.2 GMACS (Giga Multiply-Accumulate Operations per Second) to 4.3 GMACS. We also estimated the environmental impact of the complexity reduction, which can be used as a general guideline for large Transformer-based models, and thus make those models more accessible with less computation overhead.
abstract_zh: 会议是所有类型组织的重要沟通形式，自 COVID-19 大流行以来，远程协作系统得到了更广泛的使用。远程会议的一个主要问题是远程参与者很难打断并发言。我们最近开发了第一个语音中断分析模型，该模型可以检测失败的语音中断，显示出非常有前途的性能，并且正在云端部署。为了以更具成本效益和环境友好的方式提供此功能，我们降低了模型复杂性和大小，以便在客户端设备中提供 WavLM_SI 模型。在本文中，我们首先描述了如何通过在更大的数据集上进行训练和微调，成功地将失败的语音中断检测模型在 1% 假阳性率 (FPR) 下的真阳性率 (TPR) 从 50.9% 提高到 68.3%。然后，我们将模型大小从 222.7 MB 缩小到 9.3 MB，精度损失可以接受，并将复杂性从 31.2 GMACS（每秒千兆乘法累加运算）降低到 4.3 GMACS。我们还估计了复杂性降低对环境的影响，这可以用作基于 Transformer 的大型模型的一般指南，从而使这些模型更易于访问，且计算开销更少。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种实时语音中断分析模型WavLM_SI，通过优化模型复杂度和大小，实现从云端到客户端的部署。
AI.motivation: 远程会议中参与者难以有效中断发言，现有云端模型存在成本高和环境负担大的问题，需开发更高效的小型化模型。
AI.method: 通过扩大训练数据集并微调提升检测准确率，采用模型压缩技术减少参数量和计算复杂度，并评估优化后的环境影响。
AI.result: 将失败语音中断检测的TPR@1%FPR从50.9%提升至68.3%，模型体积从222.7MB压缩至9.3MB，计算复杂度降低至原值的13.8%。
AI.conclusion: 优化后的轻量级模型在保持性能的同时显著降低计算开销，为大型Transformer模型的环境友好型部署提供了可推广的指导方案。

authors_text: Long Feng,Guang Yang
title: Deep Kronecker Network
title_zh: 深度克罗内克网络
abstract: We propose Deep Kronecker Network (DKN), a novel framework designed for analyzing medical imaging data, such as MRI, fMRI, CT, etc. Medical imaging data is different from general images in at least two aspects: i) sample size is usually much more limited, ii) model interpretation is more of a concern compared to outcome prediction. Due to its unique nature, general methods, such as convolutional neural network (CNN), are difficult to be directly applied. As such, we propose DKN, that is able to i) adapt to low sample size limitation, ii) provide desired model interpretation, and iii) achieve the prediction power as CNN. The DKN is general in the sense that it not only works for both matrix and (high-order) tensor represented image data, but also could be applied to both discrete and continuous outcomes. The DKN is built on a Kronecker product structure and implicitly imposes a piecewise smooth property on coefficients. Moreover, the Kronecker structure can be written into a convolutional form, so DKN also resembles a CNN, particularly, a fully convolutional network (FCN). Furthermore, we prove that with an alternating minimization algorithm, the solutions of DKN are guaranteed to converge to the truth geometrically even if the objective function is highly nonconvex. Interestingly, the DKN is also highly connected to the tensor regression framework proposed by Zhou et al. (2010), where a CANDECOMP/PARAFAC (CP) low-rank structure is imposed on tensor coefficients. Finally, we conduct both classification and regression analyses using real MRI data from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) to demonstrate the effectiveness of DKN.
summary: We propose Deep Kronecker Network (DKN), a novel framework designed for analyzing medical imaging data, such as MRI, fMRI, CT, etc. Medical imaging data is different from general images in at least two aspects: i) sample size is usually much more limited, ii) model interpretation is more of a concern compared to outcome prediction. Due to its unique nature, general methods, such as convolutional neural network (CNN), are difficult to be directly applied. As such, we propose DKN, that is able to i) adapt to low sample size limitation, ii) provide desired model interpretation, and iii) achieve the prediction power as CNN. The DKN is general in the sense that it not only works for both matrix and (high-order) tensor represented image data, but also could be applied to both discrete and continuous outcomes. The DKN is built on a Kronecker product structure and implicitly imposes a piecewise smooth property on coefficients. Moreover, the Kronecker structure can be written into a convolutional form, so DKN also resembles a CNN, particularly, a fully convolutional network (FCN). Furthermore, we prove that with an alternating minimization algorithm, the solutions of DKN are guaranteed to converge to the truth geometrically even if the objective function is highly nonconvex. Interestingly, the DKN is also highly connected to the tensor regression framework proposed by Zhou et al. (2010), where a CANDECOMP/PARAFAC (CP) low-rank structure is imposed on tensor coefficients. Finally, we conduct both classification and regression analyses using real MRI data from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) to demonstrate the effectiveness of DKN.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了深度克罗内克网络（DKN），这是一种设计用于分析医学成像数据（例如 MRI、fMRI、CT 等）的新颖框架。医学成像数据至少在两个方面与一般图像不同：i）样本量通常更加有限，ii）与结果预测相比，模型解释更受关注。由于其独特的性质，一般方法，例如卷积神经网络（CNN），很难直接应用。因此，我们提出 DKN，它能够 i) 适应低样本量限制，ii) 提供所需的模型解释，iii) 实现与 CNN 一样的预测能力。 DKN 是通用的，因为它不仅适用于矩阵和（高阶）张量表示的图像数据，而且还可以应用于离散和连续结果。 DKN 建立在克罗内克乘积结构的基础上，并隐式地对系数施加分段平滑属性。而且，克罗内克结构可以写成卷积形式，因此DKN也类似于CNN，特别是全卷积网络（FCN）。此外，我们证明，通过交替最小化算法，即使目标函数高度非凸，DKN 的解也能保证在几何上收敛于真值。有趣的是，DKN 也与 Zhou 等人提出的张量回归框架高度相关。 (2010)，其中 CANDECOMP/PARAFAC (CP) 低秩结构被强加于张量系数。最后，我们使用来自阿尔茨海默病神经影像计划 (ADNI) 的真实 MRI 数据进行分类和回归分析，以证明 DKN 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Deep Kronecker Network (DKN)的新框架，专门用于分析医学影像数据，如MRI、fMRI和CT等。
AI.motivation: 医学影像数据通常样本量有限且需要更高的模型可解释性，传统方法如CNN难以直接应用，因此需要一种能适应小样本、提供解释性并保持预测能力的新型网络结构。
AI.method: DKN基于Kronecker积结构，隐式施加系数的分段平滑特性，并通过卷积形式实现类似全卷积网络（FCN）的结构，同时采用交替最小化算法保证非凸目标函数的几何收敛性。
AI.result: 在阿尔茨海默病神经影像倡议（ADNI）的真实MRI数据上进行分类和回归分析，验证了DKN的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DKN是一种通用框架，适用于矩阵和高阶张量表示的图像数据，兼顾小样本适应性、模型解释性和预测性能，并与张量回归框架存在理论联系。

Moreover, the Kronecker structure can be written into a convolutional form, so DKN also resembles a CNN, particularly, a fully convolutional network (FCN). Furthermore, we prove that with an alternating minimization algorithm, the solutions of DKN are guaranteed to converge to the truth geometrically even if the objective function is highly nonconvex. Interestingly, the DKN is also highly connected to the tensor regression framework proposed by Zhou et al. (2010), where a CANDECOMP/PARAFAC (CP) low-rank structure is imposed on tensor coefficients. Finally, we conduct both classification and regression analyses using real MRI data from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) to demonstrate the effectiveness of DKN. 我们提出了深度克罗内克网络（DKN），这是一种设计用于分析医学成像数据（例如 MRI、fMRI、CT 等）的新颖框架。医学成像数据至少在两个方面与一般图像不同：i）样本量通常更加有限，ii）与结果预测相比，模型解释更受关注。由于其独特的性质，一般方法，例如卷积神经网络（CNN），很难直接应用。因此，我们提出 DKN，它能够 i) 适应低样本量限制，ii) 提供所需的模型解释，iii) 实现与 CNN 一样的预测能力。 DKN 是通用的，因为它不仅适用于矩阵和（高阶）张量表示的图像数据，而且还可以应用于离散和连续结果。 DKN 建立在克罗内克乘积结构的基础上，并隐式地对系数施加分段平滑属性。而且，克罗内克结构可以写成卷积形式，因此DKN也类似于CNN，特别是全卷积网络（FCN）。此外，我们证明，通过交替最小化算法，即使目标函数高度非凸，DKN 的解也能保证在几何上收敛于真值。有趣的是，DKN 也与 Zhou 等人提出的张量回归框架高度相关。 (2010)，其中 CANDECOMP/PARAFAC (CP) 低秩结构被强加于张量系数。最后，我们使用来自阿尔茨海默病神经影像计划 (ADNI) 的真实 MRI 数据进行分类和回归分析，以证明 DKN 的有效性。 本文提出了一种名为Deep Kronecker Network (DKN)的新框架，专门用于分析医学影像数据，如MRI、fMRI和CT等。 Long Feng,Guang Yang stat.ML,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Subhadeep Dey,Abhilash Pal,Cyrine Chaabani,Oscar Koller
title: Clean Text and Full-Body Transformer: Microsoft's Submission to the WMT22 Shared Task on Sign Language Translation
title_zh: 干净的文本和全身变形金刚：微软提交给 WMT22 手语翻译共享任务
abstract: This paper describes Microsoft's submission to the first shared task on sign language translation at WMT 2022, a public competition tackling sign language to spoken language translation for Swiss German sign language. The task is very challenging due to data scarcity and an unprecedented vocabulary size of more than 20k words on the target side. Moreover, the data is taken from real broadcast news, includes native signing and covers scenarios of long videos. Motivated by recent advances in action recognition, we incorporate full body information by extracting features from a pre-trained I3D model and applying a standard transformer network. The accuracy of the system is further improved by applying careful data cleaning on the target text. We obtain BLEU scores of 0.6 and 0.78 on the test and dev set respectively, which is the best score among the participants of the shared task. Also in the human evaluation the submission reaches the first place. The BLEU score is further improved to 1.08 on the dev set by applying features extracted from a lip reading model.
summary: This paper describes Microsoft's submission to the first shared task on sign language translation at WMT 2022, a public competition tackling sign language to spoken language translation for Swiss German sign language. The task is very challenging due to data scarcity and an unprecedented vocabulary size of more than 20k words on the target side. Moreover, the data is taken from real broadcast news, includes native signing and covers scenarios of long videos. Motivated by recent advances in action recognition, we incorporate full body information by extracting features from a pre-trained I3D model and applying a standard transformer network. The accuracy of the system is further improved by applying careful data cleaning on the target text. We obtain BLEU scores of 0.6 and 0.78 on the test and dev set respectively, which is the best score among the participants of the shared task. Also in the human evaluation the submission reaches the first place. The BLEU score is further improved to 1.08 on the dev set by applying features extracted from a lip reading model.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Microsoft 在 WMT 2022 上提交的第一个手语翻译共享任务，这是一项针对瑞士德语手语手语到口语翻译的公开竞赛。由于数据稀缺且目标端词汇量前所未有地超过20k，该任务非常具有挑战性。而且，数据取自真实的广播新闻，包含原生签名，涵盖长视频场景。受动作识别最新进展的推动，我们通过从预先训练的 I3D 模型中提取特征并应用标准变压器网络来整合全身信息。通过对目标文本进行仔细的数据清理，系统的准确性进一步提高。我们在测试集和开发集上分别获得了 0.6 和 0.78 的 BLEU 分数，这是共享任务参与者中的最佳分数。在人类评估中，提交内容也达到了第一名。通过应用从唇读模型中提取的特征，BLEU 分数在开发集上进一步提高到 1.08。

AI.tldr: 本文描述了微软在WMT22手语翻译共享任务中的提交方案，旨在将瑞士德语手语翻译为口语语言，应对数据稀缺和目标语言词汇量大的挑战。
AI.motivation: 受动作识别领域进展启发，通过引入全身信息并结合预训练模型特征提取，同时通过目标文本清洗提升系统准确性。
AI.method: 采用预训练I3D模型提取全身特征，结合标准Transformer网络进行翻译，并通过目标文本清洗优化结果，后续进一步引入唇读模型特征提升性能。
AI.result: 在测试集和开发集上分别取得0.6和0.78的BLEU分数，为参赛最佳成绩；人工评估排名第一，使用唇读模型特征后开发集BLEU分数提升至1.08。
AI.conclusion: 全身特征提取、数据清洗及唇读模型的结合显著提升了手语翻译性能，验证了多模态信息融合在低资源场景下的有效性。

authors_text: Yizhou Li,Yusuke Monno,Masatoshi Okutomi
title: Dual-Pixel Raindrop Removal
title_zh: 双像素雨滴去除
abstract: Removing raindrops in images has been addressed as a significant task for various computer vision applications. In this paper, we propose the first method using a Dual-Pixel (DP) sensor to better address the raindrop removal. Our key observation is that raindrops attached to a glass window yield noticeable disparities in DP's left-half and right-half images, while almost no disparity exists for in-focus backgrounds. Therefore, DP disparities can be utilized for robust raindrop detection. The DP disparities also brings the advantage that the occluded background regions by raindrops are shifted between the left-half and the right-half images. Therefore, fusing the information from the left-half and the right-half images can lead to more accurate background texture recovery. Based on the above motivation, we propose a DP Raindrop Removal Network (DPRRN) consisting of DP raindrop detection and DP fused raindrop removal. To efficiently generate a large amount of training data, we also propose a novel pipeline to add synthetic raindrops to real-world background DP images. Experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our DPRRN outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, especially showing better robustness to real-world situations. Our source code and datasets are available at http://www.ok.sc.e.titech.ac.jp/res/SIR/.
summary: Removing raindrops in images has been addressed as a significant task for various computer vision applications. In this paper, we propose the first method using a Dual-Pixel (DP) sensor to better address the raindrop removal. Our key observation is that raindrops attached to a glass window yield noticeable disparities in DP's left-half and right-half images, while almost no disparity exists for in-focus backgrounds. Therefore, DP disparities can be utilized for robust raindrop detection. The DP disparities also brings the advantage that the occluded background regions by raindrops are shifted between the left-half and the right-half images. Therefore, fusing the information from the left-half and the right-half images can lead to more accurate background texture recovery. Based on the above motivation, we propose a DP Raindrop Removal Network (DPRRN) consisting of DP raindrop detection and DP fused raindrop removal. To efficiently generate a large amount of training data, we also propose a novel pipeline to add synthetic raindrops to real-world background DP images. Experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our DPRRN outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, especially showing better robustness to real-world situations. Our source code and datasets are available at http://www.ok.sc.e.titech.ac.jp/res/SIR/.
abstract_zh: 去除图像中的雨滴已成为各种计算机视觉应用的一项重要任务。在本文中，我们提出了第一种使用双像素（DP）传感器的方法来更好地解决雨滴去除问题。我们的主要观察结果是，附着在玻璃窗上的雨滴会在 DP 的左半部分和右半部分图像中产生明显的差异，而对焦背景几乎不存在差异。因此，DP 差异可用于稳健的雨滴检测。 DP 视差还带来了被雨滴遮挡的背景区域在左半图像和右半图像之间移动的优点。因此，融合来自左半部和右半部图像的信息可以导致更准确的背景纹理恢复。基于上述动机，我们提出了一种由DP雨滴检测和DP融合雨滴去除组成的DP雨滴去除网络（DPRRN）。为了有效地生成大量训练数据，我们还提出了一种新颖的管道，将合成雨滴添加到现实世界的背景 DP 图像中。合成数据集和现实数据集的实验结果表明，我们的 DPRRN 优于现有的最先进方法，特别是对现实世界情况表现出更好的鲁棒性。我们的源代码和数据集可在 http://www.ok.sc.e.titech.ac.jp/res/SIR/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用双像素（DP）传感器进行雨滴去除的新方法，通过利用DP图像左右半部分的视差差异实现雨滴检测与背景恢复。
AI.motivation: 雨滴附着在玻璃窗上时会在DP传感器的左右图像中产生明显视差，而背景区域几乎无视差。这一特性可用于鲁棒的雨滴检测，并通过融合左右图像恢复被遮挡的背景纹理。
AI.method: 提出DP雨滴去除网络（DPRRN），包含DP雨滴检测模块和DP融合去雨模块，并设计了一种合成雨滴生成管道以生成训练数据。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，DPRRN优于现有方法，尤其在真实场景中表现更稳健。
AI.conclusion: 基于DP传感器视差特性的方法能有效提升雨滴去除效果，代码和数据集已公开。

authors_text: Mohit Daga
title: Edge-Cuts and Rooted Spanning Trees
title_zh: 边切和有根生成树
abstract: We give a closed form formula to determine the size of a k-respecting cut. Further, we show that for any k, the size of the k-respecting cut can be found only using the size of 2-respecting cuts.
summary: We give a closed form formula to determine the size of a k-respecting cut. Further, we show that for any k, the size of the k-respecting cut can be found only using the size of 2-respecting cuts.
abstract_zh: 我们给出一个封闭形式的公式来确定 k 相关切割的大小。此外，我们表明，对于任何 k，仅使用 2 相关割的大小即可找到 k 相关割的大小。

AI.tldr: 提出一个闭式公式计算k-respecting cut的大小，并证明其可以通过2-respecting cuts计算得到。
AI.motivation: 优化网络分析中边割集的计算效率，为生成树相关算法提供理论支持。
AI.method: 通过数学推导建立k-respecting cut与2-respecting cuts的关联性，结合组合分析推导闭式表达式。
AI.result: 成功推导出k-respecting cut的闭式公式，并证明其计算可完全依赖2-respecting cuts的大小。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为分析边割集与根生成树的关系提供了新方法，简化了高阶割集的计算复杂度。

authors_text: Yufeng Yang,Ashutosh Pandey,DeLiang Wang
title: Time-Domain Speech Enhancement for Robust Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于鲁棒自动语音识别的时域语音增强
abstract: It has been shown that the intelligibility of noisy speech can be improved by speech enhancement algorithms. However, speech enhancement has not been established as an effective frontend for robust automatic speech recognition (ASR) in noisy conditions compared to an ASR model trained on noisy speech directly. The divide between speech enhancement and ASR impedes the progress of robust ASR systems especially as speech enhancement has made big strides in recent years. In this work, we focus on eliminating this divide with an ARN (attentive recurrent network) based time-domain enhancement model. The proposed system fully decouples speech enhancement and an acoustic model trained only on clean speech. Results on the CHiME-2 corpus show that ARN enhanced speech translates to improved ASR results. The proposed system achieves $6.28\%$ average word error rate, outperforming the previous best by $19.3\%$ relatively.
summary: It has been shown that the intelligibility of noisy speech can be improved by speech enhancement algorithms. However, speech enhancement has not been established as an effective frontend for robust automatic speech recognition (ASR) in noisy conditions compared to an ASR model trained on noisy speech directly. The divide between speech enhancement and ASR impedes the progress of robust ASR systems especially as speech enhancement has made big strides in recent years. In this work, we focus on eliminating this divide with an ARN (attentive recurrent network) based time-domain enhancement model. The proposed system fully decouples speech enhancement and an acoustic model trained only on clean speech. Results on the CHiME-2 corpus show that ARN enhanced speech translates to improved ASR results. The proposed system achieves $6.28\%$ average word error rate, outperforming the previous best by $19.3\%$ relatively.
abstract_zh: 已经表明，可以通过语音增强算法来提高噪声语音的清晰度。然而，与直接在噪声语音上训练的 ASR 模型相比，语音增强尚未成为噪声条件下鲁棒自动语音识别 (ASR) 的有效前端。语音增强和 ASR 之间的分歧阻碍了强大的 ASR 系统的进步，尤其是近年来语音增强取得了长足的进步。在这项工作中，我们致力于通过基于 ARN（注意力循环网络）的时域增强模型来消除这种鸿沟。所提出的系统完全解耦语音增强和仅在干净语音上训练的声学模型。 CHiME-2 语料库的结果表明，ARN 增强语音可转化为改进的 ASR 结果。所提出的系统实现了 $6.28\%$ 平均单词错误率，比之前的最佳值相对高出 $19.3\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于ARN（注意力递归网络）的时间域语音增强模型，旨在消除语音增强与自动语音识别（ASR）之间的差距，提升噪声环境下ASR的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管语音增强算法能提升噪声语音的可懂度，但相比直接在噪声语音上训练的ASR模型，其作为前端处理的效果尚未得到充分验证，两者间的割裂阻碍了鲁棒ASR系统的发展。
AI.method: 设计基于ARN的时间域增强模型，完全解耦语音增强模块与仅在干净语音上训练的声学模型，通过注意力机制和递归结构优化增强效果。
AI.result: 在CHiME-2数据集上，该方法实现6.28%的平均词错误率（WER），较之前最佳结果相对提升19.3%。
AI.conclusion: 解耦式增强框架有效弥合了语音增强与ASR间的鸿沟，验证了时间域增强模型在提升噪声环境下ASR性能中的潜力。

authors_text: Philipp Kratzer,Marc Toussaint,Jim Mainprice
title: Planning Coordinated Human-Robot Motions with Neural Network Full-Body Prediction Models
title_zh: 使用神经网络全身预测模型规划协调的人机运动
abstract: Numerical optimization has become a popular approach to plan smooth motion trajectories for robots. However, when sharing space with humans, balancing properly safety, comfort and efficiency still remains challenging. This is notably the case because humans adapt their behavior to that of the robot, raising the need for intricate planning and prediction. In this paper, we propose a novel optimization-based motion planning algorithm, which generates robot motions, while simultaneously maximizing the human trajectory likelihood under a data-driven predictive model. Considering planning and prediction together allows us to formulate objective and constraint functions in the joint human-robot state space. Key to the approach are added latent space modifiers to a differentiable human predictive model based on a dedicated recurrent neural network. These modifiers allow to change the human prediction within motion optimization. We empirically evaluate our method using the publicly available MoGaze dataset. Our results indicate that the proposed framework outperforms current baselines for planning handover trajectories and avoiding collisions between a robot and a human. Our experiments demonstrate collaborative motion trajectories, where both, the human prediction and the robot plan, adapt to each other.
summary: Numerical optimization has become a popular approach to plan smooth motion trajectories for robots. However, when sharing space with humans, balancing properly safety, comfort and efficiency still remains challenging. This is notably the case because humans adapt their behavior to that of the robot, raising the need for intricate planning and prediction. In this paper, we propose a novel optimization-based motion planning algorithm, which generates robot motions, while simultaneously maximizing the human trajectory likelihood under a data-driven predictive model. Considering planning and prediction together allows us to formulate objective and constraint functions in the joint human-robot state space. Key to the approach are added latent space modifiers to a differentiable human predictive model based on a dedicated recurrent neural network. These modifiers allow to change the human prediction within motion optimization. We empirically evaluate our method using the publicly available MoGaze dataset. Our results indicate that the proposed framework outperforms current baselines for planning handover trajectories and avoiding collisions between a robot and a human. Our experiments demonstrate collaborative motion trajectories, where both, the human prediction and the robot plan, adapt to each other.
abstract_zh: 数值优化已成为规划机器人平滑运动轨迹的流行方法。然而，在与人类共享空间时，如何平衡安全性、舒适性和效率仍然具有挑战性。这种情况尤其明显，因为人类会根据机器人的行为调整自己的行为，从而提高了对复杂规划和预测的需求。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于优化的运动规划算法，该算法生成机器人运动，同时在数据驱动的预测模型下最大化人类轨迹的可能性。一起考虑规划和预测使我们能够在人机联合状态空间中制定目标函数和约束函数。该方法的关键是将潜在空间修饰符添加到基于专用循环神经网络的可微人类预测模型中。这些修改器允许改变运动优化中的人类预测。我们使用公开可用的 MoGaze 数据集对我们的方法进行实证评估。我们的结果表明，所提出的框架在规划切换轨迹和避免机器人与人类之间的碰撞方面优于当前的基线。我们的实验展示了协作运动轨迹，其中人类预测和机器人计划相互适应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的全身预测模型，用于协调人类与机器人之间的运动规划，以提高安全性和效率。
AI.motivation: 在共享空间中，机器人需要同时平衡安全性、舒适性和效率，而人类行为会动态适应机器人动作，导致传统规划方法难以应对。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于优化的运动规划算法，结合数据驱动的可微分人类预测模型（含循环神经网络）及潜在空间修饰符，实现人类轨迹预测与机器人运动的联合优化。
AI.result: 在MoGaze数据集上的实验表明，该框架在交接轨迹规划和避障任务中优于现有基线方法，实现了人机协同的自适应运动。
AI.conclusion: 将预测模型与运动规划结合，能够在联合状态空间中生成更安全、高效的协作运动轨迹。

Our experiments demonstrate collaborative motion trajectories, where both, the human prediction and the robot plan, adapt to each other. 数值优化已成为规划机器人平滑运动轨迹的流行方法。然而，在与人类共享空间时，如何平衡安全性、舒适性和效率仍然具有挑战性。这种情况尤其明显，因为人类会根据机器人的行为调整自己的行为，从而提高了对复杂规划和预测的需求。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于优化的运动规划算法，该算法生成机器人运动，同时在数据驱动的预测模型下最大化人类轨迹的可能性。一起考虑规划和预测使我们能够在人机联合状态空间中制定目标函数和约束函数。该方法的关键是将潜在空间修饰符添加到基于专用循环神经网络的可微人类预测模型中。这些修改器允许改变运动优化中的人类预测。我们使用公开可用的 MoGaze 数据集对我们的方法进行实证评估。我们的结果表明，所提出的框架在规划切换轨迹和避免机器人与人类之间的碰撞方面优于当前的基线。我们的实验展示了协作运动轨迹，其中人类预测和机器人计划相互适应。 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的全身预测模型，用于协调人类与机器人之间的运动规划，以提高安全性和效率。 Philipp Kratzer,Marc Toussaint,Jim Mainprice cs.RO

authors_text: Alkis Kalavasis,Konstantinos Stavropoulos,Manolis Zampetakis
title: Learning and Covering Sums of Independent Random Variables with Unbounded Support
title_zh: 在无界支持下学习和覆盖独立随机变量的和
comment: 60 pages, 0 figures. Accepted to the Thirty-sixth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: 60 pages, 0 figures. Accepted to the Thirty-sixth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: We study the problem of covering and learning sums $X = X_1 + \cdots + X_n$ of independent integer-valued random variables $X_i$ (SIIRVs) with unbounded, or even infinite, support. De et al. at FOCS 2018, showed that the maximum value of the collective support of $X_i$'s necessarily appears in the sample complexity of learning $X$. In this work, we address two questions: (i) Are there general families of SIIRVs with unbounded support that can be learned with sample complexity independent of both $n$ and the maximal element of the support? (ii) Are there general families of SIIRVs with unbounded support that admit proper sparse covers in total variation distance? As for question (i), we provide a set of simple conditions that allow the unbounded SIIRV to be learned with complexity $\text{poly}(1/ε)$ bypassing the aforementioned lower bound. We further address question (ii) in the general setting where each variable $X_i$ has unimodal probability mass function and is a different member of some, possibly multi-parameter, exponential family $\mathcal{E}$ that satisfies some structural properties. These properties allow $\mathcal{E}$ to contain heavy tailed and non log-concave distributions. Moreover, we show that for every $ε> 0$, and every $k$-parameter family $\mathcal{E}$ that satisfies some structural assumptions, there exists an algorithm with $\tilde{O}(k) \cdot \text{poly}(1/ε)$ samples that learns a sum of $n$ arbitrary members of $\mathcal{E}$ within $ε$ in TV distance. The output of the learning algorithm is also a sum of random variables whose distribution lies in the family $\mathcal{E}$. En route, we prove that any discrete unimodal exponential family with bounded constant-degree central moments can be approximated by the family corresponding to a bounded subset of the initial (unbounded) parameter space.

abstract_zh: 我们研究覆盖和学习具有无界甚至无限支持的独立整数值随机变量 $X_i$ (SIIRV) 的和 $X = X_1 + \cdots + X_n$ 的问题。德等人。在 FOCS 2018 上，表明 $X_i$ 的集体支持的最大值必然出现在学习 $X$ 的样本复杂性中。在这项工作中，我们解决了两个问题：（i）是否存在具有无限支持的 SIIRV 一般家族，可以通过独立于 $n$ 和支持的最大元素的样本复杂性来学习？ (ii) 是否存在具有无界支持的 SIIRV 一般家族，在总变异距离中允许适当的稀疏覆盖？对于问题（i），我们提供了一组简单的条件，允许以绕过上述下限的复杂度 $\text{poly}(1/ε)$ 来学习无界 SIIRV。我们进一步在一般设置中解决问题（ii），其中每个变量 $X_i$ 具有单峰概率质量函数，并且是某些可能是多参数的指数族 $\mathcal{E}$ 的不同成员，满足某些结构属性。这些属性允许 $\mathcal{E}$ 包含重尾分布和非对数凹分布。此外，我们表明，对于每个$ε> 0$，以及每个满足某些结构假设的$k$参数族$\mathcal{E}$，都存在一种具有$\tilde{O}(k) \cdot \text{poly}(1/ε)$样本的算法，该算法可以学习电视距离$ε$内$\mathcal{E}$的$n$个任意成员的总和。学习算法的输出也是分布在$\mathcal{E}$族中的随机变量的总和。在此过程中，我们证明任何具有有界常度中心矩的离散单峰指数族都可以通过与初始（无界）参数空间的有界子集相对应的族来近似。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何学习和覆盖具有无界或无限支持的独立整数值随机变量之和（SIIRVs）的问题，重点解决样本复杂度与支持集最大值无关的条件以及构造总变差距离下的稀疏覆盖。
AI.motivation: 现有方法的学习复杂度依赖于随机变量支持集的最大值，限制了其在无界支持情况下的应用。本文旨在寻找不依赖于变量数量n和支持集最大值的通用学习条件，并构造有效的稀疏覆盖。
AI.method: 提出无界SIIRV的可学习条件，通过多项式样本复杂度绕过下界限制；针对满足结构性质的指数族分布，设计基于参数空间子集逼近的算法，并利用中心矩约束构造总变差距离覆盖。
AI.result: 证明了满足特定条件的无界SIIRV可被poly(1/ε)样本学习；对于k参数指数族，提出~O(k)·poly(1/ε)样本算法，输出分布仍属于该族；证明有界中心矩的单峰指数族可由参数子集族逼近。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构性质约束和参数空间逼近方法，解决了无界支持SIIRV的高效学习与覆盖问题，扩展了对高维随机变量和学习理论的理解边界。

authors_text: Maarten Sap,Ronan LeBras,Daniel Fried,Yejin Choi
title: Neural Theory-of-Mind? On the Limits of Social Intelligence in Large LMs
title_zh: 神经心理理论？大型 LM 中社交智能的局限性
comment: Originally published at EMNLP 2022, extended to include ChatGPT and GPT-4 models on March 30th 2023 (extension not peer reviewed)
comments: Originally published at EMNLP 2022, extended to include ChatGPT and GPT-4 models on March 30th 2023 (extension not peer reviewed)
abstract: Social intelligence and Theory of Mind (ToM), i.e., the ability to reason about the different mental states, intents, and reactions of all people involved, allow humans to effectively navigate and understand everyday social interactions. As NLP systems are used in increasingly complex social situations, their ability to grasp social dynamics becomes crucial. In this work, we examine the open question of social intelligence and Theory of Mind in modern NLP systems from an empirical and theory-based perspective. We show that one of today's largest language models (GPT-3; Brown et al., 2020) lacks this kind of social intelligence out-of-the box, using two tasks: SocialIQa (Sap et al., 2019), which measures models' ability to understand intents and reactions of participants of social interactions, and ToMi (Le et al., 2019), which measures whether models can infer mental states and realities of participants of situations. Our results show that models struggle substantially at these Theory of Mind tasks, with well-below-human accuracies of 55% and 60% on SocialIQa and ToMi, respectively. To conclude, we draw on theories from pragmatics to contextualize this shortcoming of large language models, by examining the limitations stemming from their data, neural architecture, and training paradigms. Challenging the prevalent narrative that only scale is needed, we posit that person-centric NLP approaches might be more effective towards neural Theory of Mind. In our updated version, we also analyze newer instruction tuned and RLFH models for neural ToM. We find that even ChatGPT and GPT-4 do not display emergent Theory of Mind; strikingly even GPT-4 performs only 60% accuracy on the ToMi questions related to mental states and realities.

As NLP systems are used in increasingly complex social situations, their ability to grasp social dynamics becomes crucial. In this work, we examine the open question of social intelligence and Theory of Mind in modern NLP systems from an empirical and theory-based perspective. We show that one of today's largest language models (GPT-3; Brown et al., 2020) lacks this kind of social intelligence out-of-the box, using two tasks: SocialIQa (Sap et al., 2019), which measures models' ability to understand intents and reactions of participants of social interactions, and ToMi (Le et al., 2019), which measures whether models can infer mental states and realities of participants of situations. Our results show that models struggle substantially at these Theory of Mind tasks, with well-below-human accuracies of 55% and 60% on SocialIQa and ToMi, respectively. To conclude, we draw on theories from pragmatics to contextualize this shortcoming of large language models, by examining the limitations stemming from their data, neural architecture, and training paradigms. Challenging the prevalent narrative that only scale is needed, we posit that person-centric NLP approaches might be more effective towards neural Theory of Mind. In our updated version, we also analyze newer instruction tuned and RLFH models for neural ToM. We find that even ChatGPT and GPT-4 do not display emergent Theory of Mind; strikingly even GPT-4 performs only 60% accuracy on the ToMi questions related to mental states and realities.
abstract_zh: 社交智能和心理理论 (ToM)，即推理所有相关人员的不同心理状态、意图和反应的能力，使人类能够有效地导航和理解日常社交互动。随着 NLP 系统应用于日益复杂的社会情境，其掌握社会动态的能力变得至关重要。在这项工作中，我们从实证和理论的角度研究了现代 NLP 系统中社会智力和心理理论的开放问题。我们使用两项任务表明，当今最大的语言模型之一（GPT-3；Brown 等人，2020）缺乏这种开箱即用的社交智能：SocialIQa（Sap 等人，2019）测量模型理解社交互动参与者的意图和反应的能力，以及 ToMi（Le 等人，2019）测量模型是否可以推断情境参与者的心理状态和现实。我们的结果表明，模型在这些心智理论任务中表现不佳，在 SocialIQa 和 ToMi 上的准确率分别远低于人类的 55% 和 60%。总而言之，我们利用语用学理论，通过检查数据、神经架构和训练范式所产生的局限性，将大型语言模型的这一缺点置于语境中。挑战只需要规模的流行说法，我们认为以人为中心的 NLP 方法可能对神经心理理论更有效。在我们的更新版本中，我们还分析了神经 ToM 的新指令调整和 RLFH 模型。我们发现，即使 ChatGPT 和 GPT-4 也没有表现出新兴的心理理论；令人惊讶的是，即使是 GPT-4 在与心理状态和现实相关的 ToMi 问题上也只有 60% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 评估大型语言模型在社交智能和心智理论任务中的表现，探讨其局限性。
AI.motivation: 随着NLP系统在复杂社交场景中的应用增加，理解其社交智能能力变得关键，但现有模型是否具备类似人类的心智理论能力尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过SocialIQa和ToMi两个基准任务，测试GPT-3、ChatGPT及GPT-4在理解社交意图、反应及心智状态的能力，并分析模型表现与人类对比。
AI.result: 所有测试模型在SocialIQa和ToMi任务中准确率均显著低于人类（分别为55%和60%），GPT-4在ToMi相关问题上仅达60%。
AI.conclusion: 单纯扩大模型规模无法实现神经心智理论，需转向更注重人类中心的NLP方法以提升社交智能能力。

search_text: Neural Theory-of-Mind? On the Limits of Social Intelligence in Large LMs 神经心理理论？大型 LM 中社交智能的局限性 Social intelligence and Theory of Mind (ToM), i.e., the ability to reason about the different mental states, intents, and reactions of all people involved, allow humans to effectively navigate and understand everyday social interactions. As NLP systems are used in increasingly complex social situations, their ability to grasp social dynamics becomes crucial. In this work, we examine the open question of social intelligence and Theory of Mind in modern NLP systems from an empirical and theory-based perspective. We show that one of today's largest language models (GPT-3; Brown et al., 2020) lacks this kind of social intelligence out-of-the box, using two tasks: SocialIQa (Sap et al., 2019), which measures models' ability to understand intents and reactions of participants of social interactions, and ToMi (Le et al., 2019), which measures whether models can infer mental states and realities of participants of situations. Our results show that models struggle substantially at these Theory of Mind tasks, with well-below-human accuracies of 55% and 60% on SocialIQa and ToMi, respectively. To conclude, we draw on theories from pragmatics to contextualize this shortcoming of large language models, by examining the limitations stemming from their data, neural architecture, and training paradigms. Challenging the prevalent narrative that only scale is needed, we posit that person-centric NLP approaches might be more effective towards neural Theory of Mind. In our updated version, we also analyze newer instruction tuned and RLFH models for neural ToM. We find that even ChatGPT and GPT-4 do not display emergent Theory of Mind; strikingly even GPT-4 performs only 60% accuracy on the ToMi questions related to mental states and realities. 社交智能和心理理论 (ToM)，即推理所有相关人员的不同心理状态、意图和反应的能力，使人类能够有效地导航和理解日常社交互动。随着 NLP 系统应用于日益复杂的社会情境，其掌握社会动态的能力变得至关重要。在这项工作中，我们从实证和理论的角度研究了现代 NLP 系统中社会智力和心理理论的开放问题。我们使用两项任务表明，当今最大的语言模型之一（GPT-3；Brown 等人，2020）缺乏这种开箱即用的社交智能：SocialIQa（Sap 等人，2019）测量模型理解社交互动参与者的意图和反应的能力，以及 ToMi（Le 等人，2019）测量模型是否可以推断情境参与者的心理状态和现实。我们的结果表明，模型在这些心智理论任务中表现不佳，在 SocialIQa 和 ToMi 上的准确率分别远低于人类的 55% 和 60%。总而言之，我们利用语用学理论，通过检查数据、神经架构和训练范式所产生的局限性，将大型语言模型的这一缺点置于语境中。挑战只需要规模的流行说法，我们认为以人为中心的 NLP 方法可能对神经心理理论更有效。在我们的更新版本中，我们还分析了神经 ToM 的新指令调整和 RLFH 模型。我们发现，即使 ChatGPT 和 GPT-4 也没有表现出新兴的心理理论；令人惊讶的是，即使是 GPT-4 在与心理状态和现实相关的 ToMi 问题上也只有 60% 的准确率。 评估大型语言模型在社交智能和心智理论任务中的表现，探讨其局限性。 Maarten Sap,Ronan LeBras,Daniel Fried,Yejin Choi cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Jing Yi,Weize Chen,Yujia Qin,Yankai Lin,Ning Ding,Xu Han,Zhiyuan Liu,Maosong Sun,Jie Zhou
title: Different Tunes Played with Equal Skill: Exploring a Unified Optimization Subspace for Delta Tuning
title_zh: 异曲同工：探索Delta调音的统一优化子空间
abstract: Delta tuning (DET, also known as parameter-efficient tuning) is deemed as the new paradigm for using pre-trained language models (PLMs). Up to now, various DETs with distinct design elements have been proposed, achieving performance on par with fine-tuning. However, the mechanisms behind the above success are still under-explored, especially the connections among various DETs. To fathom the mystery, we hypothesize that the adaptations of different DETs could all be reparameterized as low-dimensional optimizations in a unified optimization subspace, which could be found by jointly decomposing independent solutions of different DETs. Then we explore the connections among different DETs by conducting optimization within the subspace. In experiments, we find that, for a certain DET, conducting optimization simply in the subspace could achieve comparable performance to its original space, and the found solution in the subspace could be transferred to another DET and achieve non-trivial performance. We also visualize the performance landscape of the subspace and find that there exists a substantial region where different DETs all perform well. Finally, we extend our analysis and show the strong connections between fine-tuning and DETs.
summary: Delta tuning (DET, also known as parameter-efficient tuning) is deemed as the new paradigm for using pre-trained language models (PLMs). Up to now, various DETs with distinct design elements have been proposed, achieving performance on par with fine-tuning. However, the mechanisms behind the above success are still under-explored, especially the connections among various DETs. To fathom the mystery, we hypothesize that the adaptations of different DETs could all be reparameterized as low-dimensional optimizations in a unified optimization subspace, which could be found by jointly decomposing independent solutions of different DETs. Then we explore the connections among different DETs by conducting optimization within the subspace. In experiments, we find that, for a certain DET, conducting optimization simply in the subspace could achieve comparable performance to its original space, and the found solution in the subspace could be transferred to another DET and achieve non-trivial performance. We also visualize the performance landscape of the subspace and find that there exists a substantial region where different DETs all perform well. Finally, we extend our analysis and show the strong connections between fine-tuning and DETs.
abstract_zh: Delta 调优（DET，也称为参数高效调优）被认为是使用预训练语言模型 (PLM) 的新范例。到目前为止，已经提出了各种具有不同设计元素的DET，实现了与微调相当的性能。然而，上述成功背后的机制仍有待探索，特别是各种DET之间的联系。为了理解这个谜团，我们假设不同DET的适应都可以被重新参数化为统一优化子空间中的低维优化，这可以通过联合分解不同DET的独立解来找到。然后我们通过在子空间内进行优化来探索不同DET之间的联系。在实验中，我们发现，对于某个DET，简单地在子空间中进行优化可以达到与其原始空间相当的性能，并且子空间中找到的解可以转移到另一个DET并获得不平凡的性能。我们还可视化了子空间的性能景观，发现存在一个很大的区域，其中不同的 DET 都表现良好。最后，我们扩展了我们的分析并展示了微调和 DET 之间的紧密联系。

AI.tldr: 本文探索将不同Delta调优方法（DET）的适配过程统一到一个低维优化子空间中，以揭示其内在联系和优化机制。
AI.motivation: 尽管多种DET方法已实现与微调相当的性能，但其成功机制及不同方法间的关联性尚未明确，需通过统一视角深入分析。
AI.method: 通过联合分解不同DET的独立解，构建统一优化子空间，并在该子空间内进行优化以探索方法间的联系。
AI.result: 子空间优化可达到与原空间相当的性能，且解可跨DET迁移；可视化显示存在多方法共优的区域，证实了微调与DET的强关联。
AI.conclusion: 不同DET方法在统一子空间中存在强联系，子空间优化有效且具迁移性，揭示了DET与微调的深层一致性。

authors_text: Lukas Bode,Michael Weinmann,Reinhard Klein
title: BoundED: Neural Boundary and Edge Detection in 3D Point Clouds via Local Neighborhood Statistics
title_zh: BoundED：通过局部邻域统计进行 3D 点云中的神经边界和边缘检测
abstract: Extracting high-level structural information from 3D point clouds is challenging but essential for tasks like urban planning or autonomous driving requiring an advanced understanding of the scene at hand. Existing approaches are still not able to produce high-quality results consistently while being fast enough to be deployed in scenarios requiring interactivity. We propose to utilize a novel set of features describing the local neighborhood on a per-point basis via first and second order statistics as input for a simple and compact classification network to distinguish between non-edge, sharp-edge, and boundary points in the given data. Leveraging this feature embedding enables our algorithm to outperform the state-of-the-art techniques in terms of quality and processing time.
summary: Extracting high-level structural information from 3D point clouds is challenging but essential for tasks like urban planning or autonomous driving requiring an advanced understanding of the scene at hand. Existing approaches are still not able to produce high-quality results consistently while being fast enough to be deployed in scenarios requiring interactivity. We propose to utilize a novel set of features describing the local neighborhood on a per-point basis via first and second order statistics as input for a simple and compact classification network to distinguish between non-edge, sharp-edge, and boundary points in the given data. Leveraging this feature embedding enables our algorithm to outperform the state-of-the-art techniques in terms of quality and processing time.
abstract_zh: 从 3D 点云中提取高级结构信息具有挑战性，但对于城市规划或自动驾驶等需要深入了解当前场景的任务来说至关重要。现有的方法仍然无法始终如一地产生高质量的结果，同时又无法足够快地部署在需要交互性的场景中。我们建议利用一组新颖的特征，通过一阶和二阶统计来描述每点的局部邻域，作为简单而紧凑的分类网络的输入，以区分给定数据中的非边缘、锐边缘和边界点。利用这种特征嵌入，我们的算法在质量和处理时间方面优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部邻域统计的神经网络方法，用于在3D点云中高效检测边界和边缘点。
AI.motivation: 现有3D点云边界检测方法在质量和处理速度上难以兼顾，无法满足自动驾驶等实时交互场景需求。
AI.method: 通过计算每个点的局部邻域一阶/二阶统计特征，输入简单分类网络区分非边缘点、尖锐边缘点和边界点。
AI.result: 在质量和处理时间指标上均优于现有最先进的技术方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实时3D场景理解提供了高效准确的边界检测解决方案，适用于城市规划和自动驾驶等领域。

authors_text: Petros N. Tamvakis,Chairi Kiourt,Alexandra D. Solomou,George Ioannakis,Nestoras C. Tsirliganis
title: Semantic Image Segmentation with Deep Learning for Vine Leaf Phenotyping
title_zh: 利用深度学习进行语义图像分割，用于藤叶表型分析
comment: 7th IFAC Conference on Sensing, Control and Automation Technologies for Agriculture (AGRICONTROL 2022)
comments: 7th IFAC Conference on Sensing, Control and Automation Technologies for Agriculture (AGRICONTROL 2022)
abstract: Plant phenotyping refers to a quantitative description of the plants properties, however in image-based phenotyping analysis, our focus is primarily on the plants anatomical, ontogenetical and physiological properties.This technique reinforced by the success of Deep Learning in the field of image based analysis is applicable to a wide range of research areas making high-throughput screens of plants possible, reducing the time and effort needed for phenotypic characterization.In this study, we use Deep Learning methods (supervised and unsupervised learning based approaches) to semantically segment grapevine leaves images in order to develop an automated object detection (through segmentation) system for leaf phenotyping which will yield information regarding their structure and function.In these directions we studied several deep learning approaches with promising results as well as we reported some future challenging tasks in the area of precision agriculture.Our work contributes to plant lifecycle monitoring through which dynamic traits such as growth and development can be captured and quantified, targeted intervention and selective application of agrochemicals and grapevine variety identification which are key prerequisites in sustainable agriculture.

abstract_zh: 植物表型是指对植物特性的定量描述，然而在基于图像的表型分析中，我们的重点主要是植物的解剖学、个体发育和生理学特性。深度学习在基于图像的分析领域的成功强化了这项技术，适用于广泛的研究领域，使植物的高通量筛选成为可能，减少表型表征所需的时间和精力。在这项研究中，我们使用深度学习方法（基于监督和无监督学习）方法）对葡萄树叶图像进行语义分割，以开发一种用于树叶表型的自动对象检测（通过分割）系统，该系统将产生有关其结构和功能的信息。在这些方向上，我们研究了几种具有可喜成果的深度学习方法，并报告了精准农业领域未来的一些具有挑战性的任务。我们的工作有助于植物生命周期监测，通过捕捉和量化生长和发育等动态性状，有针对性地干预和选择性应用农用化学品和葡萄品种识别，这是可持续农业的关键先决条件。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在利用深度学习技术进行葡萄叶的语义图像分割，开发自动化系统以实现叶片表型的结构和功能分析。
AI.motivation: 传统植物表型分析方法存在效率低、耗时长的问题，而深度学习在图像分析中的成功应用为高通量植物表型筛选提供了新途径，从而提升农业研究的效率。
AI.method: 采用监督与非监督深度学习方法，对葡萄叶图像进行语义分割，构建自动化目标检测系统，以获取叶片结构及功能信息。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所采用的深度学习方法在葡萄叶分割任务中表现良好，为后续精准农业应用奠定了基础，同时明确了该领域未来的研究方向与挑战。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过深度学习实现葡萄叶自动表型分析，有助于动态监测植物生长发育，支持精准农业中的靶向干预与可持续种植，对品种识别和资源优化具有重要意义。

authors_text: Holger R. Roth,Yan Cheng,Yuhong Wen,Isaac Yang,Ziyue Xu,Yuan-Ting Hsieh,Kristopher Kersten,Ahmed Harouni,Can Zhao,Kevin Lu,Zhihong Zhang,Wenqi Li,Andriy Myronenko,Dong Yang,Sean Yang,Nicola Rieke,Abood Quraini,Chester Chen,Daguang Xu,Nic Ma,Prerna Dogra,Mona Flores,Andrew Feng
title: NVIDIA FLARE: Federated Learning from Simulation to Real-World
title_zh: NVIDIA FLARE：从模拟到现实世界的联合学习
comment: Accepted at the International Workshop on Federated Learning, NeurIPS 2022, New Orleans, USA (https://federated-learning.org/fl-neurips-2022); Revised version v2: added Key Components list, system metrics for homomorphic encryption experiment; Extended v3 for journal submission
comments: Accepted at the International Workshop on Federated Learning, NeurIPS 2022, New Orleans, USA (https://federated-learning.org/fl-neurips-2022); Revised version v2: added Key Components list, system metrics for homomorphic encryption experiment; Extended v3 for journal submission
abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables building robust and generalizable AI models by leveraging diverse datasets from multiple collaborators without centralizing the data. We created NVIDIA FLARE as an open-source software development kit (SDK) to make it easier for data scientists to use FL in their research and real-world applications. The SDK includes solutions for state-of-the-art FL algorithms and federated machine learning approaches, which facilitate building workflows for distributed learning across enterprises and enable platform developers to create a secure, privacy-preserving offering for multiparty collaboration utilizing homomorphic encryption or differential privacy. The SDK is a lightweight, flexible, and scalable Python package. It allows researchers to apply their data science workflows in any training libraries (PyTorch, TensorFlow, XGBoost, or even NumPy) in real-world FL settings. This paper introduces the key design principles of NVFlare and illustrates some use cases (e.g., COVID analysis) with customizable FL workflows that implement different privacy-preserving algorithms. Code is available at https://github.com/NVIDIA/NVFlare.
summary: Federated learning (FL) enables building robust and generalizable AI models by leveraging diverse datasets from multiple collaborators without centralizing the data. We created NVIDIA FLARE as an open-source software development kit (SDK) to make it easier for data scientists to use FL in their research and real-world applications. The SDK includes solutions for state-of-the-art FL algorithms and federated machine learning approaches, which facilitate building workflows for distributed learning across enterprises and enable platform developers to create a secure, privacy-preserving offering for multiparty collaboration utilizing homomorphic encryption or differential privacy. The SDK is a lightweight, flexible, and scalable Python package. It allows researchers to apply their data science workflows in any training libraries (PyTorch, TensorFlow, XGBoost, or even NumPy) in real-world FL settings. This paper introduces the key design principles of NVFlare and illustrates some use cases (e.g., COVID analysis) with customizable FL workflows that implement different privacy-preserving algorithms. Code is available at https://github.com/NVIDIA/NVFlare.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 可以通过利用来自多个协作者的不同数据集来构建强大且可通用的 AI 模型，而无需集中数据。我们创建了 NVIDIA FLARE 作为开源软件开发套件 (SDK)，让数据科学家能够更轻松地在研究和实际应用中使用 FL。该 SDK 包括最先进的 FL 算法和联合机器学习方法的解决方案，有助于构建跨企业分布式学习的工作流程，并使平台开发人员能够利用同态加密或差分隐私为多方协作创建安全、保护隐私的产品。 SDK 是一个轻量级、灵活且可扩展的 Python 包。它允许研究人员在现实 FL 设置中的任何训练库（PyTorch、TensorFlow、XGBoost 甚至 NumPy）中应用他们的数据科学工作流程。本文介绍了 NVFlare 的关键设计原则，并说明了一些使用可自定义 FL 工作流程的用例（例如，COVID 分析），这些工作流程实现了不同的隐私保护算法。代码可在 https://github.com/NVIDIA/NVFlare 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为NVIDIA FLARE的开源软件开发工具包，用于简化联邦学习在研究和现实应用中的使用。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习能够利用多个合作者的多样化数据集构建稳健且具有泛化能力的AI模型，但其使用复杂且需要隐私保护技术，因此需要一个高效的工具包来简化其应用。
AI.method: 开发了一个名为NVIDIA FLARE的轻量级、灵活且可扩展的Python工具包，支持多种训练库，并提供隐私保护算法实现。
AI.result: NVIDIA FLARE工具包已经实现，并在实际案例（如新冠疫情分析）中展示了其应用效果。
AI.conclusion: NVIDIA FLARE为研究人员和平台开发者提供了一个高效的联邦学习工具，有助于推动多方协作和隐私保护的AI模型开发。

We created NVIDIA FLARE as an open-source software development kit (SDK) to make it easier for data scientists to use FL in their research and real-world applications. The SDK includes solutions for state-of-the-art FL algorithms and federated machine learning approaches, which facilitate building workflows for distributed learning across enterprises and enable platform developers to create a secure, privacy-preserving offering for multiparty collaboration utilizing homomorphic encryption or differential privacy. authors_text: Linda Lastrico,Nuno Ferreira Duarte,Alessandro Carfì,Francesco Rea,Fulvio Mastrogiovanni,Alessandra Sciutti,José Santos-Victor
title: If You Are Careful, So Am I! How Robot Communicative Motions Can Influence Human Approach in a Joint Task
title_zh: 如果你小心，我也小心！机器人的交流动作如何影响人类在联合任务中的方法
comment: Accepted to ICSR 2022, 14th International Conference on Social Robotics, preprint version
comments: Accepted to ICSR 2022, 14th International Conference on Social Robotics, preprint version
abstract: As humans, we have a remarkable capacity for reading the characteristics of objects only by observing how another person carries them. Indeed, how we perform our actions naturally embeds information on the item features. Collaborative robots can achieve the same ability by modulating the strategy used to transport objects with their end-effector. A contribution in this sense would promote spontaneous interactions by making an implicit yet effective communication channel available. This work investigates if humans correctly perceive the implicit information shared by a robotic manipulator through its movements during a dyadic collaboration task. Exploiting a generative approach, we designed robot actions to convey virtual properties of the transported objects, particularly to inform the partner if any caution is required to handle the carried item. We found that carefulness is correctly interpreted when observed through the robot movements. In the experiment, we used identical empty plastic cups; nevertheless, participants approached them differently depending on the attitude shown by the robot: humans change how they reach for the object, being more careful whenever the robot does the same. This emerging form of motor contagion is entirely spontaneous and happens even if the task does not require it.
summary: As humans, we have a remarkable capacity for reading the characteristics of objects only by observing how another person carries them. Indeed, how we perform our actions naturally embeds information on the item features. Collaborative robots can achieve the same ability by modulating the strategy used to transport objects with their end-effector. A contribution in this sense would promote spontaneous interactions by making an implicit yet effective communication channel available. This work investigates if humans correctly perceive the implicit information shared by a robotic manipulator through its movements during a dyadic collaboration task. Exploiting a generative approach, we designed robot actions to convey virtual properties of the transported objects, particularly to inform the partner if any caution is required to handle the carried item. We found that carefulness is correctly interpreted when observed through the robot movements. In the experiment, we used identical empty plastic cups; nevertheless, participants approached them differently depending on the attitude shown by the robot: humans change how they reach for the object, being more careful whenever the robot does the same. This emerging form of motor contagion is entirely spontaneous and happens even if the task does not require it.
abstract_zh: 作为人类，我们有一种非凡的能力，可以通过观察另一个人如何携带物体来解读物体的特征。事实上，我们如何执行我们的行动自然地将信息嵌入到项目特征中。协作机器人可以通过调整末端执行器运输物体的策略来实现相同的能力。从这个意义上说，贡献将通过提供隐式但有效的沟通渠道来促进自发互动。这项工作研究人类是否正确感知机器人操纵器在二元协作任务期间通过其运动共享的隐式信息。利用生成方法，我们设计了机器人动作来传达所运输物体的虚拟属性，特别是通知合作伙伴是否需要小心处理所运输的物品。我们发现，通过机器人的动作观察时，可以正确地解释谨慎。在实验中，我们使用了相同的空塑料杯；然而，根据机器人表现出的态度，参与者会以不同的方式接近它们：人类会改变他们接触物体的方式，每当机器人做同样的事情时，人类就会更加小心。这种新兴形式的运动传染完全是自发的，即使任务不需要它也会发生。

AI.tldr: 研究机器人通过动作传递隐含信息（如是否需要小心）是否能影响人类在协作任务中的行为。
AI.motivation: 人类能通过观察他人动作推断物体特性，机器人若能通过动作传递类似信息，可促进自发协作。
AI.method: 设计机器人动作模拟物体属性（需小心或无需），让参与者观察后模仿抓取动作，分析其行为差异。
AI.result: 当机器人表现小心动作时，人类参与者会模仿其谨慎行为，即使任务无需谨慎，表明隐含信息被正确解读。
AI.conclusion: 机器人可通过动作传递隐含信息影响人类行为，为协作机器人提供新的非语言沟通方式。
