authors_text: Mahmood Khosrowjerdi
title: Good governance and national information transparency: A comparative study of 117 countries
title_zh: 善政和国家信息透明度：117 个国家的比较研究
abstract: Information transparency is a major building block of responsible governments. We explored factors influencing the information transparency of 117 world nations. After controlling for the effects of confounding variables of wealth (GDP per capita), corruption rate, population density, human capital, and telecommunication infrastructure, we found that the good governance indices (democracy, economy, and management) were strong and stable predictors of information transparency of world nations.
summary: Information transparency is a major building block of responsible governments. We explored factors influencing the information transparency of 117 world nations. After controlling for the effects of confounding variables of wealth (GDP per capita), corruption rate, population density, human capital, and telecommunication infrastructure, we found that the good governance indices (democracy, economy, and management) were strong and stable predictors of information transparency of world nations.
abstract_zh: 信息透明度是负责任政府的一个主要组成部分。我们探讨了影响世界 117 个国家信息透明度的因素。在控制了财富（人均GDP）、腐败率、人口密度、人力资本和电信基础设施等混杂变量的影响后，我们发现良好治理指数（民主、经济和管理）是世界各国信息透明度的强有力且稳定的预测指标。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了117个国家的信息透明度及其影响因素。
AI.motivation: 信息透明度是负责任政府的重要基石，因此研究其影响因素具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过控制财富（人均GDP）、腐败率、人口密度、人力资本和电信基础设施等混杂变量，分析良好治理指数（民主、经济和管理）对信息透明度的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现，良好治理指数（民主、经济和管理）是世界各国信息透明度的强而稳定预测因素。
AI.conclusion: 良好治理是提升国家信息透明度的重要因素，应加强治理以提高透明度。

authors_text: Yuankai Luo,Veronika Thost,Lei Shi
title: Transformers over Directed Acyclic Graphs
title_zh: 有向无环图上的 Transformer
abstract: Transformer models have recently gained popularity in graph representation learning as they have the potential to learn complex relationships beyond the ones captured by regular graph neural networks. The main research question is how to inject the structural bias of graphs into the transformer architecture, and several proposals have been made for undirected molecular graphs and, recently, also for larger network graphs. In this paper, we study transformers over directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) and propose architecture adaptations tailored to DAGs: (1) An attention mechanism that is considerably more efficient than the regular quadratic complexity of transformers and at the same time faithfully captures the DAG structure, and (2) a positional encoding of the DAG's partial order, complementing the former. We rigorously evaluate our approach over various types of tasks, ranging from classifying source code graphs to nodes in citation networks, and show that it is effective in two important aspects: in making graph transformers generally outperform graph neural networks tailored to DAGs and in improving SOTA graph transformer performance in terms of both quality and efficiency.
summary: Transformer models have recently gained popularity in graph representation learning as they have the potential to learn complex relationships beyond the ones captured by regular graph neural networks. The main research question is how to inject the structural bias of graphs into the transformer architecture, and several proposals have been made for undirected molecular graphs and, recently, also for larger network graphs. In this paper, we study transformers over directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) and propose architecture adaptations tailored to DAGs: (1) An attention mechanism that is considerably more efficient than the regular quadratic complexity of transformers and at the same time faithfully captures the DAG structure, and (2) a positional encoding of the DAG's partial order, complementing the former. We rigorously evaluate our approach over various types of tasks, ranging from classifying source code graphs to nodes in citation networks, and show that it is effective in two important aspects: in making graph transformers generally outperform graph neural networks tailored to DAGs and in improving SOTA graph transformer performance in terms of both quality and efficiency.
abstract_zh: Transformer 模型最近在图表示学习中受到欢迎，因为它们有潜力学习超出常规图神经网络捕获的复杂关系。主要研究问题是如何将图的结构偏差注入到变压器架构中，并且已经针对无向分子图以及最近针对更大的网络图提出了一些建议。在本文中，我们研究了有向无环图（DAG）上的变压器，并提出了针对 DAG 的架构调整：（1）一种注意力机制，比变压器的常规二次复杂度要高效得多，同时忠实地捕获 DAG 结构；（2）DAG 偏序的位置编码，补充了前者。我们对各种类型的任务（从源代码图分类到引文网络中的节点）严格评估我们的方法，并表明该方法在两个重要方面是有效的：使图转换器的性能普遍优于针对 DAG 定制的图神经网络，以及在质量和效率方面提高 SOTA 图转换器的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将Transformer模型适配到有向无环图（DAG），提出两种架构改进以更高效地捕捉DAG结构。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在图表示学习中难以有效融入图结构信息，尤其针对DAG的结构特性缺乏专门优化。
AI.method: 设计了线性复杂度的注意力机制以替代二次复杂度的常规机制，并结合DAG的偏序关系进行位置编码。
AI.result: 在代码图分类和引文网络节点分类任务中，该方法在效果和效率上均超越现有DAG专用图神经网络及最优Transformer模型。

search_text: Transformers over Directed Acyclic Graphs 有向无环图上的 Transformer Transformer models have recently gained popularity in graph representation learning as they have the potential to learn complex relationships beyond the ones captured by regular graph neural networks. The main research question is how to inject the structural bias of graphs into the transformer architecture, and several proposals have been made for undirected molecular graphs and, recently, also for larger network graphs. In this paper, we study transformers over directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) and propose architecture adaptations tailored to DAGs: (1) An attention mechanism that is considerably more efficient than the regular quadratic complexity of transformers and at the same time faithfully captures the DAG structure, and (2) a positional encoding of the DAG's partial order, complementing the former. We rigorously evaluate our approach over various types of tasks, ranging from classifying source code graphs to nodes in citation networks, and show that it is effective in two important aspects: in making graph transformers generally outperform graph neural networks tailored to DAGs and in improving SOTA graph transformer performance in terms of both quality and efficiency. Transformer 模型最近在图表示学习中受到欢迎，因为它们有潜力学习超出常规图神经网络捕获的复杂关系。主要研究问题是如何将图的结构偏差注入到变压器架构中，并且已经针对无向分子图以及最近针对更大的网络图提出了一些建议。在本文中，我们研究了有向无环图（DAG）上的变压器，并提出了针对 DAG 的架构调整：（1）一种注意力机制，比变压器的常规二次复杂度要高效得多，同时忠实地捕获 DAG 结构；（2）DAG 偏序的位置编码，补充了前者。我们对各种类型的任务（从源代码图分类到引文网络中的节点）严格评估我们的方法，并表明该方法在两个重要方面是有效的：使图转换器的性能普遍优于针对 DAG 定制的图神经网络，以及在质量和效率方面提高 SOTA 图转换器的性能。 本文研究如何将Transformer模型适配到有向无环图（DAG），提出两种架构改进以更高效地捕捉DAG结构。 Yuankai Luo,Veronika Thost,Lei Shi cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jinzi Qi,Hugo Van hamme
title: Weak-Supervised Dysarthria-invariant Features for Spoken Language Understanding using an FHVAE and Adversarial Training
title_zh: 使用 FHVAE 和对抗性训练实现口语理解的弱监督构音障碍不变特征
abstract: The scarcity of training data and the large speaker variation in dysarthric speech lead to poor accuracy and poor speaker generalization of spoken language understanding systems for dysarthric speech. Through work on the speech features, we focus on improving the model generalization ability with limited dysarthric data. Factorized Hierarchical Variational Auto-Encoders (FHVAE) trained unsupervisedly have shown their advantage in disentangling content and speaker representations. Earlier work showed that the dysarthria shows in both feature vectors. Here, we add adversarial training to bridge the gap between the control and dysarthric speech data domains. We extract dysarthric and speaker invariant features using weak supervision. The extracted features are evaluated on a Spoken Language Understanding task and yield a higher accuracy on unseen speakers with more severe dysarthria compared to features from the basic FHVAE model or plain filterbanks.
summary: The scarcity of training data and the large speaker variation in dysarthric speech lead to poor accuracy and poor speaker generalization of spoken language understanding systems for dysarthric speech. Through work on the speech features, we focus on improving the model generalization ability with limited dysarthric data. Factorized Hierarchical Variational Auto-Encoders (FHVAE) trained unsupervisedly have shown their advantage in disentangling content and speaker representations. Earlier work showed that the dysarthria shows in both feature vectors. Here, we add adversarial training to bridge the gap between the control and dysarthric speech data domains. We extract dysarthric and speaker invariant features using weak supervision. The extracted features are evaluated on a Spoken Language Understanding task and yield a higher accuracy on unseen speakers with more severe dysarthria compared to features from the basic FHVAE model or plain filterbanks.
abstract_zh: 训练数据的缺乏和构音障碍语音中说话人的巨大差异导致构音障碍语音的口语理解系统的准确性差和说话人泛化能力差。通过对语音特征的研究，我们专注于利用有限的构音障碍数据来提高模型的泛化能力。无监督训练的分解层次变分自动编码器（FHVAE）在解开内容和说话者表示方面显示出其优势。早期的工作表明构音障碍在两个特征向量中都有表现。在这里，我们添加对抗性训练来弥合控制和构音障碍语音数据域之间的差距。我们使用弱监督来提取构音障碍和说话人不变特征。提取的特征在口语理解任务中进行评估，与基本 FHVAE 模型或普通滤波器组的特征相比，对构音障碍更严重的看不见的说话者产生更高的准确度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督方法，利用FHVAE和对抗训练提取言语障碍语音的说话人不变特征，以提升口语理解系统的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 言语障碍语音数据稀缺且说话人差异大，导致现有口语理解系统准确率低且泛化能力差。
AI.method: 采用分层变分自编码器（FHVAE）无监督学习分离内容与说话人特征，并通过对抗训练缩小正常语音与言语障碍语音域差距，结合弱监督提取不变特征。
AI.result: 在未见过的严重言语障碍说话人数据上，提取的特征相比基础FHVAE和普通滤波器银行方法准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督结合对抗训练的FHVAE框架能有效提升言语障碍语音的口语理解模型泛化性能。

authors_text: Chen Qiu,Dan Oneata,Emanuele Bugliarello,Stella Frank,Desmond Elliott
title: Multilingual Multimodal Learning with Machine Translated Text
title_zh: 使用机器翻译文本进行多语言多模式学习
abstract: Most vision-and-language pretraining research focuses on English tasks. However, the creation of multilingual multimodal evaluation datasets (e.g. Multi30K, xGQA, XVNLI, and MaRVL) poses a new challenge in finding high-quality training data that is both multilingual and multimodal. In this paper, we investigate whether machine translating English multimodal data can be an effective proxy for the lack of readily available multilingual data. We call this framework TD-MML: Translated Data for Multilingual Multimodal Learning, and it can be applied to any multimodal dataset and model. We apply it to both pretraining and fine-tuning data with a state-of-the-art model. In order to prevent models from learning from low-quality translated text, we propose two metrics for automatically removing such translations from the resulting datasets. In experiments on five tasks across 20 languages in the IGLUE benchmark, we show that translated data can provide a useful signal for multilingual multimodal learning, both at pretraining and fine-tuning.
summary: Most vision-and-language pretraining research focuses on English tasks. However, the creation of multilingual multimodal evaluation datasets (e.g. Multi30K, xGQA, XVNLI, and MaRVL) poses a new challenge in finding high-quality training data that is both multilingual and multimodal. In this paper, we investigate whether machine translating English multimodal data can be an effective proxy for the lack of readily available multilingual data. We call this framework TD-MML: Translated Data for Multilingual Multimodal Learning, and it can be applied to any multimodal dataset and model. We apply it to both pretraining and fine-tuning data with a state-of-the-art model. In order to prevent models from learning from low-quality translated text, we propose two metrics for automatically removing such translations from the resulting datasets. In experiments on five tasks across 20 languages in the IGLUE benchmark, we show that translated data can provide a useful signal for multilingual multimodal learning, both at pretraining and fine-tuning.
abstract_zh: 大多数视觉和语言预训练研究都集中在英语任务上。然而，多语言多模态评估数据集（例如 Multi30K、xGQA、XVNLI 和 MaRVL）的创建对寻找多语言和多模态的高质量训练数据提出了新的挑战。在本文中，我们研究机器翻译英语多模态数据是否可以有效地解决缺乏现成的多语言数据的情况。我们将此框架称为 TD-MML：多语言多模态学习的翻译数据，它可以应用于任何多模态数据集和模型。我们使用最先进的模型将其应用于预训练和微调数据。为了防止模型从低质量的翻译文本中学习，我们提出了两个指标来自动从结果数据集中删除此类翻译。在 IGLUE 基准测试中对 20 种语言的五项任务进行的实验中，我们表明翻译数据可以在预训练和微调方面为多语言多模态学习提供有用的信号。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TD-MML框架，通过机器翻译英语多模态数据解决多语言多模态学习中高质量数据不足的问题，并设计过滤低质量翻译的指标。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态预训练研究主要针对英语，而多语言多模态数据集缺乏高质量训练数据，需寻找有效替代方案。
AI.method: 构建TD-MML框架，将英语多模态数据翻译为其他语言，并提出两种自动过滤低质量翻译的指标以提升数据质量。
AI.result: 在IGLUE基准的5个任务和20种语言实验中，翻译数据在预训练和微调阶段均能有效提升多语言多模态学习性能。
AI.conclusion: 机器翻译数据可作为多语言多模态学习的有效训练信号，结合质量过滤方法能显著提升模型效果。

We apply it to both pretraining and fine-tuning data with a state-of-the-art model. In order to prevent models from learning from low-quality translated text, we propose two metrics for automatically removing such translations from the resulting datasets. In experiments on five tasks across 20 languages in the IGLUE benchmark, we show that translated data can provide a useful signal for multilingual multimodal learning, both at pretraining and fine-tuning. 大多数视觉和语言预训练研究都集中在英语任务上。然而，多语言多模态评估数据集（例如 Multi30K、xGQA、XVNLI 和 MaRVL）的创建对寻找多语言和多模态的高质量训练数据提出了新的挑战。在本文中，我们研究机器翻译英语多模态数据是否可以有效地解决缺乏现成的多语言数据的情况。我们将此框架称为 TD-MML：多语言多模态学习的翻译数据，它可以应用于任何多模态数据集和模型。我们使用最先进的模型将其应用于预训练和微调数据。为了防止模型从低质量的翻译文本中学习，我们提出了两个指标来自动从结果数据集中删除此类翻译。在 IGLUE 基准测试中对 20 种语言的五项任务进行的实验中，我们表明翻译数据可以在预训练和微调方面为多语言多模态学习提供有用的信号。 本文提出TD-MML框架，通过机器翻译英语多模态数据解决多语言多模态学习中高质量数据不足的问题，并设计过滤低质量翻译的指标。 Chen Qiu,Dan Oneata,Emanuele Bugliarello,Stella Frank,Desmond Elliott cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Ester Gonzalez-Sosa,Julian Fierrez,Ruben Vera-Rodriguez,Fernando Alonso-Fernandez
title: Facial Soft Biometrics for Recognition in the Wild: Recent Works, Annotation, and COTS Evaluation
title_zh: 用于野外识别的面部软生物识别技术：近期工作、注释和 COTS 评估
comment: Published at IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security
comments: Published at IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security
abstract: The role of soft biometrics to enhance person recognition systems in unconstrained scenarios has not been extensively studied. Here, we explore the utility of the following modalities: gender, ethnicity, age, glasses, beard, and moustache. We consider two assumptions: 1) manual estimation of soft biometrics and 2) automatic estimation from two commercial off-the-shelf systems (COTS). All experiments are reported using the labeled faces in the wild (LFW) database. First, we study the discrimination capabilities of soft biometrics standalone. Then, experiments are carried out fusing soft biometrics with two state-of-the-art face recognition systems based on deep learning. We observe that soft biometrics is a valuable complement to the face modality in unconstrained scenarios, with relative improvements up to 40%/15% in the verification performance when using manual/automatic soft biometrics estimation. Results are reproducible as we make public our manual annotations and COTS outputs of soft biometrics over LFW, as well as the face recognition scores.
summary: The role of soft biometrics to enhance person recognition systems in unconstrained scenarios has not been extensively studied. Here, we explore the utility of the following modalities: gender, ethnicity, age, glasses, beard, and moustache. We consider two assumptions: 1) manual estimation of soft biometrics and 2) automatic estimation from two commercial off-the-shelf systems (COTS). All experiments are reported using the labeled faces in the wild (LFW) database. First, we study the discrimination capabilities of soft biometrics standalone. Then, experiments are carried out fusing soft biometrics with two state-of-the-art face recognition systems based on deep learning. We observe that soft biometrics is a valuable complement to the face modality in unconstrained scenarios, with relative improvements up to 40%/15% in the verification performance when using manual/automatic soft biometrics estimation. Results are reproducible as we make public our manual annotations and COTS outputs of soft biometrics over LFW, as well as the face recognition scores.
abstract_zh: 软生物识别技术在无约束场景中增强人员识别系统的作用尚未得到广泛研究。在这里，我们探讨以下模式的实用性：性别、种族、年龄、眼镜、胡须和胡须。我们考虑两个假设：1）软生物识别的手动估计和 2）来自两个商业现成系统（COTS）的自动估计。所有实验均使用野外标记面孔 (LFW) 数据库进行报告。首先，我们研究软生物识别技术的独立辨别能力。然后，将软生物识别技术与两种基于深度学习的最先进的人脸识别系统相融合进行实验。我们观察到，软生物识别技术是无约束场景中人脸模态的宝贵补充，使用手动/自动软生物识别估计时，验证性能相对提高高达 40%/15%。当我们通过 LFW 公开手动注释和软生物识别的 COTS 输出以及人脸识别分数时，结果是可重复的。

AI.tldr: 研究软生物特征（如性别、年龄、种族等）在无约束场景下的人脸识别中的辅助作用，并评估手动与自动估计方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分探索软生物特征在增强人脸识别系统、特别是在复杂真实场景中的潜力，需验证其有效性及实用价值。
AI.method: 基于LFW数据集，分别采用手动标注与两种商用系统自动提取软生物特征，独立分析其区分能力，并与深度学习人脸识别模型融合验证性能提升。
AI.result: 软生物特征可提升验证性能，手动/自动估计分别带来最高40%/15%的相对改进，且公开了标注数据与实验结果以供复现。
AI.conclusion: 软生物特征是无约束人脸识别的有效补充，手动标注效果更优，但自动方法亦具实用潜力，公开资源可推动后续研究。

authors_text: Abhijeet Bishnu,Ankit Gupta,Mandar Gogate,Kia Dashtipour,Ahsan Adeel,Amir Hussain,Mathini Sellathurai,Tharmalingam Ratnarajah
title: A Novel Frame Structure for Cloud-Based Audio-Visual Speech Enhancement in Multimodal Hearing-aids
title_zh: 多模态助听器中基于云的视听语音增强的新颖框架结构
abstract: In this paper, we design a first of its kind transceiver (PHY layer) prototype for cloud-based audio-visual (AV) speech enhancement (SE) complying with high data rate and low latency requirements of future multimodal hearing assistive technology. The innovative design needs to meet multiple challenging constraints including up/down link communications, delay of transmission and signal processing, and real-time AV SE models processing. The transceiver includes device detection, frame detection, frequency offset estimation, and channel estimation capabilities. We develop both uplink (hearing aid to the cloud) and downlink (cloud to hearing aid) frame structures based on the data rate and latency requirements. Due to the varying nature of uplink information (audio and lip-reading), the uplink channel supports multiple data rate frame structure, while the downlink channel has a fixed data rate frame structure. In addition, we evaluate the latency of different PHY layer blocks of the transceiver for developed frame structures using LabVIEW NXG. This can be used with software defined radio (such as Universal Software Radio Peripheral) for real-time demonstration scenarios.
summary: In this paper, we design a first of its kind transceiver (PHY layer) prototype for cloud-based audio-visual (AV) speech enhancement (SE) complying with high data rate and low latency requirements of future multimodal hearing assistive technology. The innovative design needs to meet multiple challenging constraints including up/down link communications, delay of transmission and signal processing, and real-time AV SE models processing. The transceiver includes device detection, frame detection, frequency offset estimation, and channel estimation capabilities. We develop both uplink (hearing aid to the cloud) and downlink (cloud to hearing aid) frame structures based on the data rate and latency requirements. Due to the varying nature of uplink information (audio and lip-reading), the uplink channel supports multiple data rate frame structure, while the downlink channel has a fixed data rate frame structure. In addition, we evaluate the latency of different PHY layer blocks of the transceiver for developed frame structures using LabVIEW NXG. This can be used with software defined radio (such as Universal Software Radio Peripheral) for real-time demonstration scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们设计了第一个用于基于云的视听（AV）语音增强（SE）的收发器（PHY层）原型，符合未来多模态听力辅助技术的高数据速率和低延迟要求。创新设计需要满足多种具有挑战性的约束，包括上/下行链路通信、传输和信号处理延迟以及实时 AV SE 模型处理。该收发器包括设备检测、帧检测、频偏估计和信道估计功能。我们根据数据速率和延迟要求开发上行链路（助听器到云端）和下行链路（云到助听器）帧结构。由于上行链路信息（音频和唇读）的不同性质，上行链路信道支持多种数据速率帧结构，而下行链路信道具有固定数据速率帧结构。此外，我们还使用 LabVIEW NXG 评估了已开发帧结构的收发器不同 PHY 层模块的延迟。这可以与软件定义无线电（例如通用软件无线电外设）一起使用，以实现实时演示场景。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种符合高数据率和低延迟要求的云基音频-视觉语音增强系统的新型收发器原型，针对多模态助听设备的挑战性约束进行了创新性框架结构开发。
AI.motivation: 现有助听设备在复杂环境中语音增强效果有限，需通过云计算结合音频与视觉信息提升性能，但面临传输延迟、信号处理实时性及多链路通信等技术挑战。
AI.method: 开发了包含设备检测、帧检测等能力的收发器，设计支持多数据率的上行链路（助听器至云端）和固定数据率的下行链路（云端至助听器）框架结构，并利用LabVIEW NXG评估物理层模块延迟。
AI.result: 实现了符合实时性要求的上下行帧结构设计，通过软件定义无线电可进行实时演示，验证了框架在多模态助听场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该设计为未来云基多模态助听技术提供了低延迟、高适应性的通信框架基础，可支持音频与视觉信息的融合处理。

authors_text: Eduardo Ribeiro,Andreas Uhl,Fernando Alonso-Fernandez
title: Iris super-resolution using CNNs: is photo-realism important to iris recognition?
title_zh: 使用 CNN 进行虹膜超分辨率：照片真实感对于虹膜识别重要吗？
abstract: The use of low-resolution images adopting more relaxed acquisition conditions such as mobile phones and surveillance videos is becoming increasingly common in iris recognition nowadays. Concurrently, a great variety of single image super-resolution techniques are emerging, especially with the use of convolutional neural networks (CNNs). The main objective of these methods is to try to recover finer texture details generating more photo-realistic images based on the optimisation of an objective function depending basically on the CNN architecture and training approach. In this work, the authors explore single image super-resolution using CNNs for iris recognition. For this, they test different CNN architectures and use different training databases, validating their approach on a database of 1.872 near infrared iris images and on a mobile phone image database. They also use quality assessment, visual results and recognition experiments to verify if the photo-realism provided by the CNNs which have already proven to be effective for natural images can reflect in a better recognition rate for iris recognition. The results show that using deeper architectures trained with texture databases that provide a balance between edge preservation and the smoothness of the method can lead to good results in the iris recognition process.
summary: The use of low-resolution images adopting more relaxed acquisition conditions such as mobile phones and surveillance videos is becoming increasingly common in iris recognition nowadays. Concurrently, a great variety of single image super-resolution techniques are emerging, especially with the use of convolutional neural networks (CNNs). The main objective of these methods is to try to recover finer texture details generating more photo-realistic images based on the optimisation of an objective function depending basically on the CNN architecture and training approach. In this work, the authors explore single image super-resolution using CNNs for iris recognition. For this, they test different CNN architectures and use different training databases, validating their approach on a database of 1.872 near infrared iris images and on a mobile phone image database. They also use quality assessment, visual results and recognition experiments to verify if the photo-realism provided by the CNNs which have already proven to be effective for natural images can reflect in a better recognition rate for iris recognition. The results show that using deeper architectures trained with texture databases that provide a balance between edge preservation and the smoothness of the method can lead to good results in the iris recognition process.
abstract_zh: 如今，采用手机、监控视频等采集条件更为宽松的低分辨率图像在虹膜识别中越来越普遍。与此同时，各种各样的单图像超分辨率技术正在出现，特别是使用卷积神经网络（CNN）。这些方法的主要目标是尝试恢复更精细的纹理细节，基于基本上取决于 CNN 架构和训练方法的目标函数优化，生成更逼真的图像。在这项工作中，作者探索了使用 CNN 进行虹膜识别的单图像超分辨率。为此，他们测试了不同的 CNN 架构并使用不同的训练数据库，在包含 1.872 个近红外虹膜图像的数据库和手机图像数据库上验证了他们的方法。他们还使用质量评估、视觉结果和识别实验来验证已经被证明对自然图像有效的 CNN 所提供的照片真实感是否可以反映在虹膜识别中更好的识别率。结果表明，使用经过纹理数据库训练的更深层次架构，在边缘保留和方法平滑度之间提供平衡，可以在虹膜识别过程中获得良好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用卷积神经网络（CNNs）进行虹膜超分辨率重建，并探讨照片真实感对虹膜识别的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着低分辨率图像在虹膜识别中的广泛应用，传统超分辨率方法的效果存疑，需验证CNN生成的逼真图像是否能提升识别准确率。
AI.method: 测试多种CNN架构与训练数据库，在近红外虹膜图像和手机拍摄图像数据库上验证，结合质量评估、视觉分析及识别实验进行效果评估。
AI.result: 深层架构结合纹理数据库训练，平衡边缘保留与平滑度的方法在虹膜识别中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: CNN的深度与纹理训练数据对虹膜识别效果关键，但照片真实感并非决定性因素。

authors_text: Francesco Fusco,Peter Staar,Diego Antognini
title: Unsupervised Term Extraction for Highly Technical Domains
title_zh: 高科技领域的无监督术语提取
comment: Accepted at EMNLP 2022 (industry). 8 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables
comments: Accepted at EMNLP 2022 (industry). 8 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables
abstract: Term extraction is an information extraction task at the root of knowledge discovery platforms. Developing term extractors that are able to generalize across very diverse and potentially highly technical domains is challenging, as annotations for domains requiring in-depth expertise are scarce and expensive to obtain. In this paper, we describe the term extraction subsystem of a commercial knowledge discovery platform that targets highly technical fields such as pharma, medical, and material science. To be able to generalize across domains, we introduce a fully unsupervised annotator (UA). It extracts terms by combining novel morphological signals from sub-word tokenization with term-to-topic and intra-term similarity metrics, computed using general-domain pre-trained sentence-encoders. The annotator is used to implement a weakly-supervised setup, where transformer-models are fine-tuned (or pre-trained) over the training data generated by running the UA over large unlabeled corpora. Our experiments demonstrate that our setup can improve the predictive performance while decreasing the inference latency on both CPUs and GPUs. Our annotators provide a very competitive baseline for all the cases where annotations are not available.
summary: Term extraction is an information extraction task at the root of knowledge discovery platforms. Developing term extractors that are able to generalize across very diverse and potentially highly technical domains is challenging, as annotations for domains requiring in-depth expertise are scarce and expensive to obtain. In this paper, we describe the term extraction subsystem of a commercial knowledge discovery platform that targets highly technical fields such as pharma, medical, and material science. To be able to generalize across domains, we introduce a fully unsupervised annotator (UA). It extracts terms by combining novel morphological signals from sub-word tokenization with term-to-topic and intra-term similarity metrics, computed using general-domain pre-trained sentence-encoders. The annotator is used to implement a weakly-supervised setup, where transformer-models are fine-tuned (or pre-trained) over the training data generated by running the UA over large unlabeled corpora. Our experiments demonstrate that our setup can improve the predictive performance while decreasing the inference latency on both CPUs and GPUs. Our annotators provide a very competitive baseline for all the cases where annotations are not available.
abstract_zh: 术语提取是知识发现平台基础上的信息提取任务。开发能够泛化于非常多样化和潜在的高技术领域的术语提取器具有挑战性，因为需要深入专业知识的领域的注释很少且获取成本昂贵。在本文中，我们描述了商业知识发现平台的术语提取子系统，该平台针对制药、医学和材料科学等高科技领域。为了能够跨领域泛化，我们引入了完全无监督的注释器（UA）。它通过将来自子词标记化的新颖形态信号与术语到主题和术语内相似性度量相结合来提取术语，并使用通用域预训练的句子编码器进行计算。注释器用于实现弱监督设置，其中变压器模型根据在大型未标记语料库上运行 UA 生成的训练数据进行微调（或预训练）。我们的实验表明，我们的设置可以提高预测性能，同时减少 CPU 和 GPU 上的推理延迟。我们的注释器为所有注释不可用的情况提供了非常有竞争力的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向高度技术领域的无监督术语提取方法，通过结合形态学信号与预训练模型实现跨领域通用性。
AI.motivation: 传统术语提取依赖领域标注数据，但高度技术领域因专业性强、标注成本高导致数据稀缺，亟需无需人工标注的通用解决方案。
AI.method: 设计无监督注释器（UA）融合子词分词形态学特征、术语-主题相似度及术语内相似度指标，利用预训练句子编码器生成伪标注数据，构建弱监督框架微调Transformer模型。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持预测性能的同时降低推理延迟，且在无标注场景下提供具有竞争力的术语提取基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过无监督方式实现跨技术领域的术语提取，为标注稀缺场景提供了可扩展的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种面向高度技术领域的无监督术语提取方法，通过结合形态学信号与预训练模型实现跨领域通用性。

authors_text: Domenico Maisto,Francesco Donnarumma,Giovanni Pezzulo
title: Interactive inference: a multi-agent model of cooperative joint actions
title_zh: 交互式推理：协作联合行动的多智能体模型
abstract: We advance a novel computational model of multi-agent, cooperative joint actions that is grounded in the cognitive framework of active inference. The model assumes that to solve a joint task, such as pressing together a red or blue button, two (or more) agents engage in a process of interactive inference. Each agent maintains probabilistic beliefs about the goal of the joint task (e.g., should we press the red or blue button?) and updates them by observing the other agent's movements, while in turn selecting movements that make his own intentions legible and easy to infer by the other agent (i.e., sensorimotor communication). Over time, the interactive inference aligns both the beliefs and the behavioral strategies of the agents, hence ensuring the success of the joint action. We exemplify the functioning of the model in two simulations. The first simulation illustrates a ''leaderless'' joint action. It shows that when two agents lack a strong preference about their joint task goal, they jointly infer it by observing each other's movements. In turn, this helps the interactive alignment of their beliefs and behavioral strategies. The second simulation illustrates a "leader-follower" joint action. It shows that when one agent ("leader") knows the true joint goal, it uses sensorimotor communication to help the other agent ("follower") infer it, even if doing this requires selecting a more costly individual plan. These simulations illustrate that interactive inference supports successful multi-agent joint actions and reproduces key cognitive and behavioral dynamics of "leaderless" and "leader-follower" joint actions observed in human-human experiments. In sum, interactive inference provides a cognitively inspired, formal framework to realize cooperative joint actions and consensus in multi-agent systems.

These simulations illustrate that interactive inference supports successful multi-agent joint actions and reproduces key cognitive and behavioral dynamics of "leaderless" and "leader-follower" joint actions observed in human-human experiments. In sum, interactive inference provides a cognitively inspired, formal framework to realize cooperative joint actions and consensus in multi-agent systems.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于主动推理的认知框架的多智能体协作联合行动的新型计算模型。该模型假设为了解决联合任务，例如一起按下红色或蓝色按钮，两个（或更多）代理参与交互推理过程。每个智能体都保持对联合任务目标的概率信念（例如，我们应该按下红色还是蓝色按钮？），并通过观察其他智能体的动作来更新它们，同时选择使自己的意图清晰且易于被其他智能体推断的动作（即感觉运动通信）。随着时间的推移，交互式推理会调整代理的信念和行为策略，从而确保联合行动的成功。我们在两个模拟中举例说明了模型的功能。第一个模拟展示了“无领导”的联合行动。它表明，当两个智能体对他们的联合任务目标缺乏强烈偏好时，他们会通过观察彼此的动作来共同推断它。反过来，这有助于他们的信念和行为策略的互动协调。第二个模拟说明了“领导者-追随者”联合行动。它表明，当一个智能体（“领导者”）知道真正的共同目标时，它会使用感觉运动通信来帮助另一个智能体（“追随者”）推断它，即使这样做需要选择成本更高的个人计划。这些模拟表明，交互式推理支持成功的多智能体联合行动，并再现了在人与人实验中观察到的“无领导”和“领导者-追随者”联合行动的关键认知和行为动态。总之，交互式推理提供了一个受认知启发的正式框架，以实现多智能体系统中的合作联合行动和共识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于主动推理的多智能体协作联合行动计算模型，通过交互推理实现目标共识与行为策略对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以解释人类协作中意图推断与动态调整机制，需建立认知理论驱动的多智能体协作框架。
AI.method: 构建概率信念更新机制，智能体通过观察对方动作调整自身目标推断，利用运动感知通信实现意图可解释性，通过模拟验证无领导与领导-跟随两种协作模式。
AI.result: 仿真显示交互推理能有效对齐智能体信念与策略，即使在单方需承担更高成本时仍能达成协作目标，复现人类实验中的关键认知动态。
AI.conclusion: 交互推理为多智能体系统提供了认知启发的协作框架，可实现目标共识与高效联合行动，具有广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: Interactive inference: a multi-agent model of cooperative joint actions 交互式推理：协作联合行动的多智能体模型 We advance a novel computational model of multi-agent, cooperative joint actions that is grounded in the cognitive framework of active inference. The model assumes that to solve a joint task, such as pressing together a red or blue button, two (or more) agents engage in a process of interactive inference. Each agent maintains probabilistic beliefs about the goal of the joint task (e.g., should we press the red or blue button?) and updates them by observing the other agent's movements, while in turn selecting movements that make his own intentions legible and easy to infer by the other agent (i.e., sensorimotor communication). Over time, the interactive inference aligns both the beliefs and the behavioral strategies of the agents, hence ensuring the success of the joint action. We exemplify the functioning of the model in two simulations. The first simulation illustrates a ''leaderless'' joint action. It shows that when two agents lack a strong preference about their joint task goal, they jointly infer it by observing each other's movements. In turn, this helps the interactive alignment of their beliefs and behavioral strategies. The second simulation illustrates a "leader-follower" joint action. It shows that when one agent ("leader") knows the true joint goal, it uses sensorimotor communication to help the other agent ("follower") infer it, even if doing this requires selecting a more costly individual plan. These simulations illustrate that interactive inference supports successful multi-agent joint actions and reproduces key cognitive and behavioral dynamics of "leaderless" and "leader-follower" joint actions observed in human-human experiments. In sum, interactive inference provides a cognitively inspired, formal framework to realize cooperative joint actions and consensus in multi-agent systems. 我们提出了一种基于主动推理的认知框架的多智能体协作联合行动的新型计算模型。该模型假设为了解决联合任务，例如一起按下红色或蓝色按钮，两个（或更多）代理参与交互推理过程。每个智能体都保持对联合任务目标的概率信念（例如，我们应该按下红色还是蓝色按钮？），并通过观察其他智能体的动作来更新它们，同时选择使自己的意图清晰且易于被其他智能体推断的动作（即感觉运动通信）。随着时间的推移，交互式推理会调整代理的信念和行为策略，从而确保联合行动的成功。我们在两个模拟中举例说明了模型的功能。第一个模拟展示了“无领导”的联合行动。它表明，当两个智能体对他们的联合任务目标缺乏强烈偏好时，他们会通过观察彼此的动作来共同推断它。反过来，这有助于他们的信念和行为策略的互动协调。第二个模拟说明了“领导者-追随者”联合行动。它表明，当一个智能体（“领导者”）知道真正的共同目标时，它会使用感觉运动通信来帮助另一个智能体（“追随者”）推断它，即使这样做需要选择成本更高的个人计划。这些模拟表明，交互式推理支持成功的多智能体联合行动，并再现了在人与人实验中观察到的“无领导”和“领导者-追随者”联合行动的关键认知和行为动态。总之，交互式推理提供了一个受认知启发的正式框架，以实现多智能体系统中的合作联合行动和共识。 本文提出一种基于主动推理的多智能体协作联合行动计算模型，通过交互推理实现目标共识与行为策略对齐。 Domenico Maisto,Francesco Donnarumma,Giovanni Pezzulo cs.AI,cs.IT,cs.MA,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Xuemin Chi,Zhitao Liu,Jihao Huang,Feng Hong,Hongye Su
title: Optimization-based Motion Planning for Autonomous Parking Considering Dynamic Obstacle: A Hierarchical Framework
title_zh: 考虑动态障碍的基于优化的自动停车运动规划：分层框架
abstract: This paper introduces a hierarchical framework that integrates graph search algorithms and model predictive control to facilitate efficient parking maneuvers for Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) in constrained environments. In the high-level planning phase, the framework incorporates scenario-based hybrid A* (SHA*), an optimized variant of traditional Hybrid A*, to generate an initial path while considering static obstacles. This global path serves as an initial guess for the low-level NLP problem. In the low-level optimizing phase, a nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC)-based framework is deployed to circumvent dynamic obstacles. The performance of SHA* is empirically validated through 148 simulation scenarios, and the efficacy of the proposed hierarchical framework is demonstrated via a real-time parallel parking simulation.
summary: This paper introduces a hierarchical framework that integrates graph search algorithms and model predictive control to facilitate efficient parking maneuvers for Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) in constrained environments. In the high-level planning phase, the framework incorporates scenario-based hybrid A* (SHA*), an optimized variant of traditional Hybrid A*, to generate an initial path while considering static obstacles. This global path serves as an initial guess for the low-level NLP problem. In the low-level optimizing phase, a nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC)-based framework is deployed to circumvent dynamic obstacles. The performance of SHA* is empirically validated through 148 simulation scenarios, and the efficacy of the proposed hierarchical framework is demonstrated via a real-time parallel parking simulation.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一个集成了图搜索算法和模型预测控制的分层框架，以促进自动驾驶车辆（AV）在受限环境中的高效停车操作。在高层规划阶段，该框架结合了基于场景的混合 A* (SHA*)（传统混合 A* 的优化变体），在考虑静态障碍物的同时生成初始路径。该全局路径作为低级 NLP 问题的初始猜测。在低级优化阶段，部署基于非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）的框架来规避动态障碍。 SHA* 的性能通过 148 个模拟场景进行了实证验证，并通过实时并行停车模拟证明了所提出的分层框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 设计分层框架结合图搜索与模型预测控制，优化自动驾驶停车中的动态障碍物避让
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划难以高效应对动态障碍物，需结合优化方法提升自主停车安全性与效率
AI.method: 分层框架结合改进混合A*（SHA*）与非线性模型预测控制（NMPC），高层规划静态障碍路径，低层实时避让动态障碍
AI.result: SHA*在148个场景中验证有效，分层框架在实时并行停车模拟中表现良好
AI.conclusion: 分层框架有效整合图搜索与模型预测控制，提升自动驾驶停车在动态环境中的安全性和效率

authors_text: Xiaonan Liu,Yansha Deng,Arumugam Nallanathan,Mehdi Bennis
title: Federated Learning and Meta Learning: Approaches, Applications, and Directions
title_zh: 联邦学习和元学习：方法、应用和方向
abstract: Over the past few years, significant advancements have been made in the field of machine learning (ML) to address resource management, interference management, autonomy, and decision-making in wireless networks. Traditional ML approaches rely on centralized methods, where data is collected at a central server for training. However, this approach poses a challenge in terms of preserving the data privacy of devices. To address this issue, federated learning (FL) has emerged as an effective solution that allows edge devices to collaboratively train ML models without compromising data privacy. In FL, local datasets are not shared, and the focus is on learning a global model for a specific task involving all devices. However, FL has limitations when it comes to adapting the model to devices with different data distributions. In such cases, meta learning is considered, as it enables the adaptation of learning models to different data distributions using only a few data samples. In this tutorial, we present a comprehensive review of FL, meta learning, and federated meta learning (FedMeta). Unlike other tutorial papers, our objective is to explore how FL, meta learning, and FedMeta methodologies can be designed, optimized, and evolved, and their applications over wireless networks. We also analyze the relationships among these learning algorithms and examine their advantages and disadvantages in real-world applications.
summary: Over the past few years, significant advancements have been made in the field of machine learning (ML) to address resource management, interference management, autonomy, and decision-making in wireless networks. Traditional ML approaches rely on centralized methods, where data is collected at a central server for training. However, this approach poses a challenge in terms of preserving the data privacy of devices. To address this issue, federated learning (FL) has emerged as an effective solution that allows edge devices to collaboratively train ML models without compromising data privacy. In FL, local datasets are not shared, and the focus is on learning a global model for a specific task involving all devices. However, FL has limitations when it comes to adapting the model to devices with different data distributions. In such cases, meta learning is considered, as it enables the adaptation of learning models to different data distributions using only a few data samples. In this tutorial, we present a comprehensive review of FL, meta learning, and federated meta learning (FedMeta). Unlike other tutorial papers, our objective is to explore how FL, meta learning, and FedMeta methodologies can be designed, optimized, and evolved, and their applications over wireless networks. We also analyze the relationships among these learning algorithms and examine their advantages and disadvantages in real-world applications.
abstract_zh: 在过去几年中，机器学习 (ML) 领域在解决无线网络中的资源管理、干扰管理、自治和决策方面取得了重大进展。传统的机器学习方法依赖于集中式方法，在中央服务器上收集数据以进行训练。然而，这种方法在保护设备的数据隐私方面提出了挑战。为了解决这个问题，联邦学习 (FL) 作为一种有效的解决方案应运而生，它允许边缘设备在不损害数据隐私的情况下协作训练 ML 模型。在 FL 中，本地数据集不共享，重点是学习涉及所有设备的特定任务的全局模型。然而，FL 在使模型适应不同数据分布的设备方面存在局限性。在这种情况下，可以考虑元学习，因为它只需使用少量数据样本即可使学习模型适应不同的数据分布。在本教程中，我们对 FL、元学习和联邦元学习 (FedMeta) 进行了全面回顾。与其他教程论文不同，我们的目标是探索如何设计、优化和发展 FL、元学习和 FedMeta 方法，以及它们在无线网络上的应用。我们还分析了这些学习算法之间的关系，并检查它们在实际应用中的优缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了联邦学习（FL）、元学习（Meta Learning）和联邦元学习（FedMeta）的方法、应用及发展方向，探讨了它们在无线网络中的设计、优化与演化。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法因数据隐私问题和联邦学习在异构数据分布下的适应性不足，需探索元学习与联邦学习的结合以提升无线网络中的模型适应性。
AI.method: 通过全面回顾FL、元学习及FedMeta的现有方法，分析其相互关系，并评估它们在实际应用中的优缺点。
AI.result: 明确了FL、元学习和FedMeta在无线网络中的应用潜力，揭示了它们的协同机制及在实际部署中的关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 联邦元学习为隐私保护与模型适应性提供了新方向，但需进一步优化算法设计以应对复杂网络环境与数据异质性问题。

search_text: Federated Learning and Meta Learning: Approaches, Applications, and Directions 联邦学习和元学习：方法、应用和方向 Over the past few years, significant advancements have been made in the field of machine learning (ML) to address resource management, interference management, autonomy, and decision-making in wireless networks. Traditional ML approaches rely on centralized methods, where data is collected at a central server for training. However, this approach poses a challenge in terms of preserving the data privacy of devices. To address this issue, federated learning (FL) has emerged as an effective solution that allows edge devices to collaboratively train ML models without compromising data privacy. In FL, local datasets are not shared, and the focus is on learning a global model for a specific task involving all devices. However, FL has limitations when it comes to adapting the model to devices with different data distributions. In such cases, meta learning is considered, as it enables the adaptation of learning models to different data distributions using only a few data samples. In this tutorial, we present a comprehensive review of FL, meta learning, and federated meta learning (FedMeta). Unlike other tutorial papers, our objective is to explore how FL, meta learning, and FedMeta methodologies can be designed, optimized, and evolved, and their applications over wireless networks. We also analyze the relationships among these learning algorithms and examine their advantages and disadvantages in real-world applications. 在过去几年中，机器学习 (ML) 领域在解决无线网络中的资源管理、干扰管理、自治和决策方面取得了重大进展。传统的机器学习方法依赖于集中式方法，在中央服务器上收集数据以进行训练。然而，这种方法在保护设备的数据隐私方面提出了挑战。为了解决这个问题，联邦学习 (FL) 作为一种有效的解决方案应运而生，它允许边缘设备在不损害数据隐私的情况下协作训练 ML 模型。在 FL 中，本地数据集不共享，重点是学习涉及所有设备的特定任务的全局模型。然而，FL 在使模型适应不同数据分布的设备方面存在局限性。在这种情况下，可以考虑元学习，因为它只需使用少量数据样本即可使学习模型适应不同的数据分布。在本教程中，我们对 FL、元学习和联邦元学习 (FedMeta) 进行了全面回顾。与其他教程论文不同，我们的目标是探索如何设计、优化和发展 FL、元学习和 FedMeta 方法，以及它们在无线网络上的应用。我们还分析了这些学习算法之间的关系，并检查它们在实际应用中的优缺点。 本文综述了联邦学习（FL）、元学习（Meta Learning）和联邦元学习（FedMeta）的方法、应用及发展方向，探讨了它们在无线网络中的设计、优化与演化。 Xiaonan Liu,Yansha Deng,Arumugam Nallanathan,Mehdi Bennis cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NI

authors_text: Dafei Qiu,Jiajin Yi,Jialin Peng
title: WDA-Net: Weakly-Supervised Domain Adaptive Segmentation of Electron Microscopy
title_zh: WDA-Net：电子显微镜的弱监督域自适应分割
comment: Accepted by BIBM 2022: International Conference on Bioinformatics & Biomedicine
comments: Accepted by BIBM 2022: International Conference on Bioinformatics & Biomedicine
abstract: Accurate segmentation of organelle instances, e.g., mitochondria, is essential for electron microscopy analysis. Despite the outstanding performance of fully supervised methods, they highly rely on sufficient per-pixel annotated data and are sensitive to domain shift. Aiming to develop a highly annotation-efficient approach with competitive performance, we focus on weakly-supervised domain adaptation (WDA) with a type of extremely sparse and weak annotation demanding minimal annotation efforts, i.e., sparse point annotations on only a small subset of object instances. To reduce performance degradation arising from domain shift, we explore multi-level transferable knowledge through conducting three complementary tasks, i.e., counting, detection, and segmentation, constituting a task pyramid with different levels of domain invariance. The intuition behind this is that after investigating a related source domain, it is much easier to spot similar objects in the target domain than to delineate their fine boundaries. Specifically, we enforce counting estimation as a global constraint to the detection with sparse supervision, which further guides the segmentation. A cross-position cut-and-paste augmentation is introduced to further compensate for the annotation sparsity. Extensive validations show that our model with only 15% point annotations can achieve comparable performance as supervised models and shows robustness to annotation selection.
summary: Accurate segmentation of organelle instances, e.g., mitochondria, is essential for electron microscopy analysis. Despite the outstanding performance of fully supervised methods, they highly rely on sufficient per-pixel annotated data and are sensitive to domain shift. Aiming to develop a highly annotation-efficient approach with competitive performance, we focus on weakly-supervised domain adaptation (WDA) with a type of extremely sparse and weak annotation demanding minimal annotation efforts, i.e., sparse point annotations on only a small subset of object instances. To reduce performance degradation arising from domain shift, we explore multi-level transferable knowledge through conducting three complementary tasks, i.e., counting, detection, and segmentation, constituting a task pyramid with different levels of domain invariance. The intuition behind this is that after investigating a related source domain, it is much easier to spot similar objects in the target domain than to delineate their fine boundaries. Specifically, we enforce counting estimation as a global constraint to the detection with sparse supervision, which further guides the segmentation. A cross-position cut-and-paste augmentation is introduced to further compensate for the annotation sparsity. Extensive validations show that our model with only 15% point annotations can achieve comparable performance as supervised models and shows robustness to annotation selection.
abstract_zh: 细胞器实例（例如线粒体）的准确分割对于电子显微镜分析至关重要。尽管完全监督方法具有出色的性能，但它们高度依赖足够的每像素注释数据并且对域移位敏感。为了开发一种具有竞争性性能的高效注释方法，我们专注于弱监督域适应（WDA），其具有一种极其稀疏和弱的注释，需要最少的注释工作，即仅在对象实例的一小部分上进行稀疏点注释。为了减少域转移引起的性能下降，我们通过执行三个互补的任务（即计数、检测和分割）来探索多级可迁移知识，构成具有不同级别域不变性的任务金字塔。这背后的直觉是，在调查相关的源域之后，在目标域中发现相似的对象比描绘它们的精细边界要容易得多。具体来说，我们将计数估计作为稀疏监督检测的全局约束，这进一步指导了分割。引入了跨位置剪切和粘贴增强以进一步补偿注释稀疏性。广泛的验证表明，我们的模型仅使用 15% 的点注释即可实现与监督模型相当的性能，并显示出注释选择的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WDA-Net，通过弱监督领域自适应方法实现电子显微镜图像中细胞器实例的分割，仅需稀疏点标注。
AI.motivation: 全监督分割方法依赖大量像素级标注且易受领域迁移影响，需开发高效低标注的弱监督领域自适应方案。
AI.method: 构建包含计数、检测、分割的三级任务金字塔，利用跨位置复制粘贴增强，并通过计数约束指导分割以应对标注稀疏性。
AI.result: 仅用15%点标注即可达到全监督模型性能，且对标注选择具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: WDA-Net通过多任务协同与增强策略有效缓解领域偏移，在减少标注需求的同时保持分割精度，适用于跨领域电子显微镜分析。

authors_text: Adithya Ramachandran,Satyaki Chatterjee,Siming Bayer,Andreas Maier,Thorkil Flensmark
title: Heat Demand Forecasting with Multi-Resolutional Representation of Heterogeneous Temporal Ensemble
title_zh: 利用异质时态系综的多分辨率表示进行热需求预测
abstract: One of the primal challenges faced by utility companies is ensuring efficient supply with minimal greenhouse gas emissions. The advent of smart meters and smart grids provide an unprecedented advantage in realizing an optimised supply of thermal energies through proactive techniques such as load forecasting. In this paper, we propose a forecasting framework for heat demand based on neural networks where the time series are encoded as scalograms equipped with the capacity of embedding exogenous variables such as weather, and holiday/non-holiday. Subsequently, CNNs are utilized to predict the heat load multi-step ahead. Finally, the proposed framework is compared with other state-of-the-art methods, such as SARIMAX and LSTM. The quantitative results from retrospective experiments show that the proposed framework consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline method with real-world data acquired from Denmark. A minimal mean error of 7.54% for MAPE and 417kW for RMSE is achieved with the proposed framework in comparison to all other methods.
summary: One of the primal challenges faced by utility companies is ensuring efficient supply with minimal greenhouse gas emissions. The advent of smart meters and smart grids provide an unprecedented advantage in realizing an optimised supply of thermal energies through proactive techniques such as load forecasting. In this paper, we propose a forecasting framework for heat demand based on neural networks where the time series are encoded as scalograms equipped with the capacity of embedding exogenous variables such as weather, and holiday/non-holiday. Subsequently, CNNs are utilized to predict the heat load multi-step ahead. Finally, the proposed framework is compared with other state-of-the-art methods, such as SARIMAX and LSTM. The quantitative results from retrospective experiments show that the proposed framework consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline method with real-world data acquired from Denmark. A minimal mean error of 7.54% for MAPE and 417kW for RMSE is achieved with the proposed framework in comparison to all other methods.
abstract_zh: 公用事业公司面临的主要挑战之一是确保高效供应并尽量减少温室气体排放。智能电表和智能电网的出现在通过负荷预测等主动技术实现热能优化供应方面提供了前所未有的优势。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于神经网络的热需求预测框架，其中时间序列被编码为尺度图，具有嵌入天气、节假日/非节假日等外生变量的能力。随后，CNN 用于提前多步预测热负荷。最后，将所提出的框架与其他最先进的方法（例如 SARIMAX 和 LSTM）进行了比较。回顾性实验的定量结果表明，所提出的框架始终优于从丹麦获取的真实数据的最先进的基线方法。与所有其他方法相比，所提出的框架实现了 MAPE 的最小平均误差为 7.54%，RMSE 的最小平均误差为 417kW。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的热负荷预测框架，利用多分辨率表示和卷积神经网络（CNN）结合外部变量进行多步预测。
AI.motivation: 公用事业公司需通过精准热能需求预测实现高效供应并减少碳排放，而现有方法在处理多源异构时间序列数据时存在局限性。
AI.method: 将时间序列编码为包含天气、节假日等外生变量的scalogram（小波时频图），通过CNN进行多步热负荷预测，并与SARIMAX、LSTM等传统方法对比验证。
AI.result: 在丹麦真实数据集上，该框架实现7.54%的MAPE和417kW的RMSE，显著优于SARIMAX和LSTM等基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 多分辨率时频表示结合CNN的框架能有效捕捉热负荷的复杂时空特征，为能源系统优化提供可靠预测支持。

The advent of smart meters and smart grids provide an unprecedented advantage in realizing an optimised supply of thermal energies through proactive techniques such as load forecasting. In this paper, we propose a forecasting framework for heat demand based on neural networks where the time series are encoded as scalograms equipped with the capacity of embedding exogenous variables such as weather, and holiday/non-holiday. Subsequently, CNNs are utilized to predict the heat load multi-step ahead. Finally, the proposed framework is compared with other state-of-the-art methods, such as SARIMAX and LSTM. The quantitative results from retrospective experiments show that the proposed framework consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline method with real-world data acquired from Denmark. A minimal mean error of 7.54% for MAPE and 417kW for RMSE is achieved with the proposed framework in comparison to all other methods. 公用事业公司面临的主要挑战之一是确保高效供应并尽量减少温室气体排放。智能电表和智能电网的出现在通过负荷预测等主动技术实现热能优化供应方面提供了前所未有的优势。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于神经网络的热需求预测框架，其中时间序列被编码为尺度图，具有嵌入天气、节假日/非节假日等外生变量的能力。随后，CNN 用于提前多步预测热负荷。最后，将所提出的框架与其他最先进的方法（例如 SARIMAX 和 LSTM）进行了比较。回顾性实验的定量结果表明，所提出的框架始终优于从丹麦获取的真实数据的最先进的基线方法。与所有其他方法相比，所提出的框架实现了 MAPE 的最小平均误差为 7.54%，RMSE 的最小平均误差为 417kW。 本文提出一种基于神经网络的热负荷预测框架，利用多分辨率表示和卷积神经网络（CNN）结合外部变量进行多步预测。 Adithya Ramachandran,Satyaki Chatterjee,Siming Bayer,Andreas Maier,Thorkil Flensmark cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Daniel P. Benalcazar,Juan E. Tapia,Mauricio Vasquez,Leonardo Causa,Enrique Lopez Droguett,Christoph Busch
title: Towards an efficient Iris Recognition System on Embedded Devices
title_zh: 构建嵌入式设备上的高效虹膜识别系统
abstract: Iris Recognition (IR) is one of the market's most reliable and accurate biometric systems. Today, it is challenging to build NIR-capturing devices under the premise of hardware price reduction. Commercial NIR sensors are protected from modification. The process of building a new device is not trivial because it is required to start from scratch with the process of capturing images with quality, calibrating operational distances, and building lightweight software such as eyes/iris detectors and segmentation sub-systems. In light of such challenges, this work aims to develop and implement iris recognition software in an embedding system and calibrate NIR in a contactless binocular setup. We evaluate and contrast speed versus performance obtained with two embedded computers and infrared cameras. Further, a lightweight segmenter sub-system called "Unet_xxs" is proposed, which can be used for iris semantic segmentation under restricted memory resources.
summary: Iris Recognition (IR) is one of the market's most reliable and accurate biometric systems. Today, it is challenging to build NIR-capturing devices under the premise of hardware price reduction. Commercial NIR sensors are protected from modification. The process of building a new device is not trivial because it is required to start from scratch with the process of capturing images with quality, calibrating operational distances, and building lightweight software such as eyes/iris detectors and segmentation sub-systems. In light of such challenges, this work aims to develop and implement iris recognition software in an embedding system and calibrate NIR in a contactless binocular setup. We evaluate and contrast speed versus performance obtained with two embedded computers and infrared cameras. Further, a lightweight segmenter sub-system called "Unet_xxs" is proposed, which can be used for iris semantic segmentation under restricted memory resources.
abstract_zh: 虹膜识别 (IR) 是市场上最可靠、最准确的生物识别系统之一。如今，在硬件价格降低的前提下构建近红外捕获设备具有挑战性。商用近红外传感器受到保护，免遭修改。构建新设备的过程并不简单，因为它需要从头开始捕获高质量图像、校准操作距离以及构建轻量级软件（例如眼睛/虹膜检测器和分割子系统）。鉴于这些挑战，这项工作旨在在嵌入系统中开发和实施虹膜识别软件，并在非接触式双目设置中校准近红外。我们评估并对比了使用两台嵌入式计算机和红外摄像机获得的速度与性能。此外，提出了一种名为“Unet_xxs”的轻量级分割子系统，可用于有限内存资源下的虹膜语义分割。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发和实现一种嵌入式设备上的虹膜识别系统，并校准近红外（NIR）接触式双目设置。
AI.motivation: 由于硬件成本的降低和商业NIR传感器的限制，构建新的虹膜识别设备面临挑战，需要从头开始处理图像捕获、校准操作距离和构建轻量级软件子系统。
AI.method: 作者在嵌入式系统中开发并实现了虹膜识别软件，并对两种嵌入式计算机和红外相机的速度与性能进行了评估和对比。同时，提出了一种轻量级的分割子系统"Unet_xxs"，用于在受限内存资源下的虹膜语义分割。
AI.result: 实验评估表明，提出的嵌入式虹膜识别系统和"Unet_xxs"分割子系统在性能和速度上均表现良好，适合在资源受限的嵌入式设备上使用。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种高效的嵌入式虹膜识别系统和轻量级分割子系统，为在资源受限的设备上实现高精度虹膜识别提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Giulio Ermanno Pibiri,Yoshihiro Shibuya,Antoine Limasset
title: Locality-Preserving Minimal Perfect Hashing of k-mers
title_zh: k-mers 的局部性保留最小完美哈希
abstract: Minimal perfect hashing is the problem of mapping a static set of $n$ distinct keys into the address space $\{1,\ldots,n\}$ bijectively. It is well-known that $n\log_2(e)$ bits are necessary to specify a minimal perfect hash function (MPHF) $f$, when no additional knowledge of the input keys is to be used. However, it is often the case in practice that the input keys have intrinsic relationships that we can exploit to lower the bit complexity of $f$. For example, consider a string and the set of all its distinct $k$-mers as input keys: since two consecutive $k$-mers share an overlap of $k-1$ symbols, it seems possible to beat the classic $\log_2(e)$ bits/key barrier in this case. Moreover, we would like $f$ to map consecutive $k$-mers to consecutive addresses, as to also preserve as much as possible their relationship in the codomain. This is a useful feature in practice as it guarantees a certain degree of locality of reference for $f$, resulting in a better evaluation time when querying consecutive $k$-mers. Motivated by these premises, we initiate the study of a new type of locality-preserving MPHF designed for $k$-mers extracted consecutively from a collection of strings. We design a construction whose space usage decreases for growing $k$ and discuss experiments with a practical implementation of the method: in practice, the functions built with our method can be several times smaller and even faster to query than the most efficient MPHFs in the literature.
summary: Minimal perfect hashing is the problem of mapping a static set of $n$ distinct keys into the address space $\{1,\ldots,n\}$ bijectively. It is well-known that $n\log_2(e)$ bits are necessary to specify a minimal perfect hash function (MPHF) $f$, when no additional knowledge of the input keys is to be used. However, it is often the case in practice that the input keys have intrinsic relationships that we can exploit to lower the bit complexity of $f$. For example, consider a string and the set of all its distinct $k$-mers as input keys: since two consecutive $k$-mers share an overlap of $k-1$ symbols, it seems possible to beat the classic $\log_2(e)$ bits/key barrier in this case. Moreover, we would like $f$ to map consecutive $k$-mers to consecutive addresses, as to also preserve as much as possible their relationship in the codomain. This is a useful feature in practice as it guarantees a certain degree of locality of reference for $f$, resulting in a better evaluation time when querying consecutive $k$-mers. Motivated by these premises, we initiate the study of a new type of locality-preserving MPHF designed for $k$-mers extracted consecutively from a collection of strings. We design a construction whose space usage decreases for growing $k$ and discuss experiments with a practical implementation of the method: in practice, the functions built with our method can be several times smaller and even faster to query than the most efficient MPHFs in the literature.
abstract_zh: 最小完美散列是将 $n$ 个不同键的静态集合双射映射到地址空间 $\{1,\ldots,n\}$ 的问题。众所周知，当不使用输入密钥的额外知识时，需要 $n\log_2(e)$ 位来指定最小完美哈希函数 (MPHF) $f$。然而，在实践中经常出现这样的情况：输入键具有内在的关系，我们可以利用这些关系来降低 $f$ 的位复杂度。例如，考虑一个字符串及其所有不同的 $k$-mers 的集合作为输入键：由于两个连续的 $k$-mers 共享 $k-1$ 符号的重叠，因此在这种情况下似乎有可能克服经典的 $\log_2(e)$ 位/键障碍。此外，我们希望 $f$ 将连续的 $k$-mers 映射到连续的地址，以便也尽可能保留它们在共域中的关系。这在实践中是一个有用的功能，因为它保证了 $f$ 的一定程度的引用局部性，从而在查询连续的 $k$-mers 时获得更好的评估时间。受这些前提的推动，我们开始研究一种新型的保留局部性的 MPHF，该 MPHF 是为从字符串集合中连续提取的 $k$-mers 设计的。我们设计了一种结构，其空间使用量随着 $k$ 的增长而减少，并讨论了该方法的实际实现的实验：实际上，用我们的方法构建的函数可以比文献中最高效的 MPHF 小几倍，甚至查询速度更快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对k-mer的局部性保持最小完美哈希函数（MPHF）方法，旨在利用k-mer的重叠特性降低空间复杂度并提高查询效率。
AI.motivation: 传统MPHF需要n log₂(e)位来存储，但k-mer具有连续重叠的特性，可通过利用其内在结构降低位复杂度，同时保持哈希值的局部性以提升查询性能。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于k-mer重叠关系的构造方法，通过减少k值增长时的空间占用，并实现实际应用中的高效查询。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法构建的哈希函数在空间占用和查询速度上均优于现有最高效MPHF方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用k-mer的局部性特征，提出的MPHF方法在实际应用中实现了更优的空间和时间效率。

authors_text: Athmanarayanan Lakshmi Narayanan,Asma Beevi K. T,Haoyang Wu,Jingyi Ma,W. Margaret Huang
title: mm-Wave Radar Hand Shape Classification Using Deformable Transformers
title_zh: 使用可变形变压器进行毫米波雷达手形分类
abstract: A novel, real-time, mm-Wave radar-based static hand shape classification algorithm and implementation are proposed. The method finds several applications in low cost and privacy sensitive touchless control technology using 60 Ghz radar as the sensor input. As opposed to prior Range-Doppler image based 2D classification solutions, our method converts raw radar data to 3D sparse cartesian point clouds.The demonstrated 3D radar neural network model using deformable transformers significantly surpasses the performance results set by prior methods which either utilize custom signal processing or apply generic convolutional techniques on Range-Doppler FFT images. Experiments are performed on an internally collected dataset using an off-the-shelf radar sensor.
summary: A novel, real-time, mm-Wave radar-based static hand shape classification algorithm and implementation are proposed. The method finds several applications in low cost and privacy sensitive touchless control technology using 60 Ghz radar as the sensor input. As opposed to prior Range-Doppler image based 2D classification solutions, our method converts raw radar data to 3D sparse cartesian point clouds.The demonstrated 3D radar neural network model using deformable transformers significantly surpasses the performance results set by prior methods which either utilize custom signal processing or apply generic convolutional techniques on Range-Doppler FFT images. Experiments are performed on an internally collected dataset using an off-the-shelf radar sensor.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种新颖的、实时的、基于毫米波雷达的静态手形分类算法和实现。该方法在使用 60 Ghz 雷达作为传感器输入的低成本和隐私敏感的非接触式控制技术中得到了多种应用。与先前基于距离多普勒图像的 2D 分类解决方案相反，我们的方法将原始雷达数据转换为 3D 稀疏笛卡尔点云。所演示的使用可变形变压器的 3D 雷达神经网络模型显着超越了先前方法所设置的性能结果，这些方法利用自定义信号处理或在距离多普勒 FFT 图像上应用通用卷积技术。使用现成的雷达传感器在内部收集的数据集上进行实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于毫米波雷达和可变形Transformer的实时静态手部形状分类方法。
AI.motivation: 传统基于Range-Doppler图像的2D分类方法存在性能局限，且隐私敏感场景需要更高效的无接触控制技术。
AI.method: 将雷达原始数据转换为3D稀疏点云，并采用可变形Transformer神经网络进行建模。
AI.result: 在内部数据集上验证，该方法显著优于传统信号处理和通用卷积技术方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为低成本、高隐私保护的无接触控制技术提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Gaétan Landreau,Mohamed Tamaazousti
title: EpipolarNVS: leveraging on Epipolar geometry for single-image Novel View Synthesis
title_zh: EpipolarNVS：利用对极几何进行单图像新颖视图合成
abstract: Novel-view synthesis (NVS) can be tackled through different approaches, depending on the general setting: a single source image to a short video sequence, exact or noisy camera pose information, 3D-based information such as point clouds etc. The most challenging scenario, the one where we stand in this work, only considers a unique source image to generate a novel one from another viewpoint. However, in such a tricky situation, the latest learning-based solutions often struggle to integrate the camera viewpoint transformation. Indeed, the extrinsic information is often passed as-is, through a low-dimensional vector. It might even occur that such a camera pose, when parametrized as Euler angles, is quantized through a one-hot representation. This vanilla encoding choice prevents the learnt architecture from inferring novel views on a continuous basis (from a camera pose perspective). We claim it exists an elegant way to better encode relative camera pose, by leveraging 3D-related concepts such as the epipolar constraint. We, therefore, introduce an innovative method that encodes the viewpoint transformation as a 2D feature image. Such a camera encoding strategy gives meaningful insights to the network regarding how the camera has moved in space between the two views. By encoding the camera pose information as a finite number of coloured epipolar lines, we demonstrate through our experiments that our strategy outperforms vanilla encoding.
summary: Novel-view synthesis (NVS) can be tackled through different approaches, depending on the general setting: a single source image to a short video sequence, exact or noisy camera pose information, 3D-based information such as point clouds etc. The most challenging scenario, the one where we stand in this work, only considers a unique source image to generate a novel one from another viewpoint. However, in such a tricky situation, the latest learning-based solutions often struggle to integrate the camera viewpoint transformation. Indeed, the extrinsic information is often passed as-is, through a low-dimensional vector. It might even occur that such a camera pose, when parametrized as Euler angles, is quantized through a one-hot representation. This vanilla encoding choice prevents the learnt architecture from inferring novel views on a continuous basis (from a camera pose perspective). We claim it exists an elegant way to better encode relative camera pose, by leveraging 3D-related concepts such as the epipolar constraint. We, therefore, introduce an innovative method that encodes the viewpoint transformation as a 2D feature image. Such a camera encoding strategy gives meaningful insights to the network regarding how the camera has moved in space between the two views. By encoding the camera pose information as a finite number of coloured epipolar lines, we demonstrate through our experiments that our strategy outperforms vanilla encoding.
abstract_zh: 新视图合成 (NVS) 可以通过不同的方法来解决，具体取决于一般设置：单个源图像到短视频序列、精确或嘈杂的相机姿态信息、基于 3D 的信息（例如点云等）。最具挑战性的场景，即我们在这项工作中所处的场景，只考虑唯一的源图像，从另一个角度生成新的图像。然而，在这种棘手的情况下，最新的基于学习的解决方案通常很难集成相机视点转换。事实上，外部信息通常通过低维向量按原样传递。甚至可能发生这样的情况：当参数化为欧拉角时，这样的相机姿态通过单热表示进行量化。这种普通的编码选择阻止学习的架构连续地推断新的视图（从相机姿势的角度）。我们声称，通过利用 3D 相关概念（例如极线约束），存在一种更好地编码相对相机姿态的优雅方法。因此，我们引入了一种创新方法，将视点变换编码为 2D 特征图像。这种相机编码策略为网络提供了关于相机如何在两个视图之间的空间移动的有意义的见解。通过将相机姿态信息编码为有限数量的彩色极线，我们通过实验证明我们的策略优于普通编码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EpipolarNVS方法，通过利用本质几何约束，将相机姿态信息编码为二维特征图像，以提升单图像新视角合成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的单图像新视角合成方法在处理相机视角变换时，常采用低维向量或欧拉角等简化的姿态编码方式，导致无法连续生成新视角。
AI.method: 通过本质几何约束生成彩色对极线图像，将相机姿态信息编码为二维特征图像，为网络提供视角变换的空间语义信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在新视角合成任务中优于传统姿态编码方法，生成结果更具空间一致性。
AI.conclusion: 基于对极几何的相机姿态编码策略能有效提升单图像新视角合成性能，为视角变换建模提供新的思路。

authors_text: Duo Zheng,Tao Kong,Ya Jing,Jiaan Wang,Xiaojie Wang
title: Towards Unifying Reference Expression Generation and Comprehension
title_zh: 迈向统一参考表达式生成和理解
abstract: Reference Expression Generation (REG) and Comprehension (REC) are two highly correlated tasks. Modeling REG and REC simultaneously for utilizing the relation between them is a promising way to improve both. However, the problem of distinct inputs, as well as building connections between them in a single model, brings challenges to the design and training of the joint model. To address the problems, we propose a unified model for REG and REC, named UniRef. It unifies these two tasks with the carefully-designed Image-Region-Text Fusion layer (IRTF), which fuses the image, region and text via the image cross-attention and region cross-attention. Additionally, IRTF could generate pseudo input regions for the REC task to enable a uniform way for sharing the identical representation space across the REC and REG. We further propose Vision-conditioned Masked Language Modeling (VMLM) and Text-Conditioned Region Prediction (TRP) to pre-train UniRef model on multi-granular corpora. The VMLM and TRP are directly related to REG and REC, respectively, but could help each other. We conduct extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets, RefCOCO, RefCOCO+ and RefCOCOg. Experimental results show that our model outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods on both REG and REC.
summary: Reference Expression Generation (REG) and Comprehension (REC) are two highly correlated tasks. Modeling REG and REC simultaneously for utilizing the relation between them is a promising way to improve both. However, the problem of distinct inputs, as well as building connections between them in a single model, brings challenges to the design and training of the joint model. To address the problems, we propose a unified model for REG and REC, named UniRef. It unifies these two tasks with the carefully-designed Image-Region-Text Fusion layer (IRTF), which fuses the image, region and text via the image cross-attention and region cross-attention. Additionally, IRTF could generate pseudo input regions for the REC task to enable a uniform way for sharing the identical representation space across the REC and REG. We further propose Vision-conditioned Masked Language Modeling (VMLM) and Text-Conditioned Region Prediction (TRP) to pre-train UniRef model on multi-granular corpora. The VMLM and TRP are directly related to REG and REC, respectively, but could help each other. We conduct extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets, RefCOCO, RefCOCO+ and RefCOCOg. Experimental results show that our model outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods on both REG and REC.
abstract_zh: 参考表达式生成（REG）和理解（REC）是两个高度相关的任务。同时对 REG 和 REC 进行建模以利用它们之间的关系是改善两者的一种有前途的方法。然而，不同输入以及在单个模型中建立它们之间的连接的问题给联合模型的设计和训练带来了挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 REG 和 REC 的统一模型，名为 UniRef。它将这两个任务与精心设计的图像-区域-文本融合层（IRTF）结合起来，该融合层通过图像交叉注意和区域交叉注意融合图像、区域和文本。此外，IRTF 可以为 REC 任务生成伪输入区域，以便以统一的方式在 REC 和 REG 之间共享相同的表示空间。我们进一步提出视觉条件掩模语言模型（VMLM）和文本条件区域预测（TRP）来在多粒度语料库上预训练 UniRef 模型。 VMLM 和 TRP 分别与 REG 和 REC 直接相关，但可以互相帮助。我们对三个基准数据集 RefCOCO、RefCOCO+ 和 RefCOCOg 进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，我们的模型在 REG 和 REC 上都优于以前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的参考表达生成（REG）和理解（REC）模型UniRef，通过融合图像、区域和文本信息来提升两项任务的性能。
AI.motivation: REG和REC任务高度相关，但现有方法多独立处理，未能有效利用两者间的关联性，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计Image-Region-Text Fusion（IRTF）层，通过图像与区域的交叉注意力机制融合多模态信息，并引入Vision-conditioned Masked Language Modeling（VMLM）和Text-Conditioned Region Prediction（TRP）进行预训练。
AI.result: 在RefCOCO、RefCOCO+和RefCOCOg三个基准数据集上，UniRef在REG和REC任务中均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 统一建模REG与REC能有效提升两者性能，所提IRTF层及预训练方法为多任务学习提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的参考表达生成（REG）和理解（REC）模型UniRef，通过融合图像、区域和文本信息来提升两项任务的性能。
motivation: REG和REC任务高度相关，但现有方法多独立处理，未能有效利用两者间的关联性，导致性能受限。
method: 设计Image-Region-Text Fusion（IRTF）层，通过图像与区域的交叉注意力机制融合多模态信息，并引入Vision-conditioned Masked Language Modeling（VMLM）和Text-Conditioned Region Prediction（TRP）进行预训练。
result: 在RefCOCO、RefCOCO+和RefCOCOg三个基准数据集上，UniRef在REG和REC任务中均优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: 统一建模REG与REC能有效提升两者性能，所提IRTF层及预训练方法为多任务学习提供了新思路。
search_text: Towards Unifying Reference Expression Generation and Comprehension 迈向统一参考表达式生成和理解 Reference Expression Generation (REG) and Comprehension (REC) are two highly correlated tasks. Modeling REG and REC simultaneously for utilizing the relation between them is a promising way to improve both. However, the problem of distinct inputs, as well as building connections between them in a single model, brings challenges to the design and training of the joint model. To address the problems, we propose a unified model for REG and REC, named UniRef. It unifies these two tasks with the carefully-designed Image-Region-Text Fusion layer (IRTF), which fuses the image, region and text via the image cross-attention and region cross-attention. Additionally, IRTF could generate pseudo input regions for the REC task to enable a uniform way for sharing the identical representation space across the REC and REG. We further propose Vision-conditioned Masked Language Modeling (VMLM) and Text-Conditioned Region Prediction (TRP) to pre-train UniRef model on multi-granular corpora. The VMLM and TRP are directly related to REG and REC, respectively, but could help each other. We conduct extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets, RefCOCO, RefCOCO+ and RefCOCOg. Experimental results show that our model outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods on both REG and REC. 参考表达式生成（REG）和理解（REC）是两个高度相关的任务。同时对 REG 和 REC 进行建模以利用它们之间的关系是改善两者的一种有前途的方法。然而，不同输入以及在单个模型中建立它们之间的连接的问题给联合模型的设计和训练带来了挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 REG 和 REC 的统一模型，名为 UniRef。它将这两个任务与精心设计的图像-区域-文本融合层（IRTF）结合起来，该融合层通过图像交叉注意和区域交叉注意融合图像、区域和文本。此外，IRTF 可以为 REC 任务生成伪输入区域，以便以统一的方式在 REC 和 REG 之间共享相同的表示空间。我们进一步提出视觉条件掩模语言模型（VMLM）和文本条件区域预测（TRP）来在多粒度语料库上预训练 UniRef 模型。 VMLM 和 TRP 分别与 REG 和 REC 直接相关，但可以互相帮助。我们对三个基准数据集 RefCOCO、RefCOCO+ 和 RefCOCOg 进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，我们的模型在 REG 和 REC 上都优于以前最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种统一的参考表达生成（REG）和理解（REC）模型UniRef，通过融合图像、区域和文本信息来提升两项任务的性能。 Duo Zheng,Tao Kong,Ya Jing,Jiaan Wang,Xiaojie Wang cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Zeping Min,Qian Ge,Zhong Li
title: 10 hours data is all you need
title_zh: 10小时数据就够了
abstract: We propose a novel procedure to generate pseudo mandarin speech data named as CAMP (character audio mix up), which aims at generating audio from a character scale. We also raise a method for building a mandarin character scale audio database adaptive to CAMP named as META-AUDIO, which makes full use of audio data and can greatly increase the data diversity of the database. Experiments show that our CAMP method is simple and quite effective. For example, we train models with 10 hours of audio data in AISHELL-1 and pseudo audio data generated by CAMP, and achieve a competitive 11.07 character error rate (CER). Besides, we also perform training with only 10 hours of audio data in AIDATATANG dataset and pseudo audio data generated by CAMP, which again achieves a competitive 8.26 CER.
summary: We propose a novel procedure to generate pseudo mandarin speech data named as CAMP (character audio mix up), which aims at generating audio from a character scale. We also raise a method for building a mandarin character scale audio database adaptive to CAMP named as META-AUDIO, which makes full use of audio data and can greatly increase the data diversity of the database. Experiments show that our CAMP method is simple and quite effective. For example, we train models with 10 hours of audio data in AISHELL-1 and pseudo audio data generated by CAMP, and achieve a competitive 11.07 character error rate (CER). Besides, we also perform training with only 10 hours of audio data in AIDATATANG dataset and pseudo audio data generated by CAMP, which again achieves a competitive 8.26 CER.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种生成伪普通话语音数据的新颖程序，称为 CAMP（字符音频混合），其目的是从字符比例生成音频。我们还提出了一种建立适应CAMP的普通话音阶音频数据库的方法，名为META-AUDIO，该方法充分利用了音频数据，可以大大增加数据库的数据多样性。实验表明，我们的 CAMP 方法简单且非常有效。例如，我们使用 AISHELL-1 中 10 小时的音频数据和 CAMP 生成的伪音频数据来训练模型，并实现了具有竞争力的 11.07 字符错误率（CER）。此外，我们还使用 AIDATATANG 数据集中仅 10 小时的音频数据和 CAMP 生成的伪音频数据进行训练，再次达到了具有竞争力的 8.26 CER。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种生成伪普通话语音数据的方法CAMP和构建字符级音频数据库META-AUDIO，以提升数据多样性并减少真实数据需求。
AI.motivation: 现有语音识别方法通常需要大量真实数据，而本文旨在通过生成伪数据增强模型性能，降低对真实数据的依赖。
AI.method: 提出CAMP方法从字符尺度生成伪语音数据，并构建META-AUDIO数据库以充分利用音频数据提升多样性。
AI.result: 在AISHELL-1和AIDATATANG数据集上，仅使用10小时真实数据加CAMP生成的伪数据，分别达到11.07%和8.26%的字符错误率（CER）。
AI.conclusion: CAMP方法有效提升了数据利用效率，证明了少量真实数据结合生成数据可达到竞争性识别效果。

authors_text: Siwei Chen,Yiqing Xu,Cunjun Yu,Linfeng Li,Xiao Ma,Zhongwen Xu,David Hsu
title: DaXBench: Benchmarking Deformable Object Manipulation with Differentiable Physics
title_zh: DaXBench：利用可微物理对可变形物体操作进行基准测试
abstract: Deformable Object Manipulation (DOM) is of significant importance to both daily and industrial applications. Recent successes in differentiable physics simulators allow learning algorithms to train a policy with analytic gradients through environment dynamics, which significantly facilitates the development of DOM algorithms. However, existing DOM benchmarks are either single-object-based or non-differentiable. This leaves the questions of 1) how a task-specific algorithm performs on other tasks and 2) how a differentiable-physics-based algorithm compares with the non-differentiable ones in general. In this work, we present DaXBench, a differentiable DOM benchmark with a wide object and task coverage. DaXBench includes 9 challenging high-fidelity simulated tasks, covering rope, cloth, and liquid manipulation with various difficulty levels. To better understand the performance of general algorithms on different DOM tasks, we conduct comprehensive experiments over representative DOM methods, ranging from planning to imitation learning and reinforcement learning. In addition, we provide careful empirical studies of existing decision-making algorithms based on differentiable physics, and discuss their limitations, as well as potential future directions.
summary: Deformable Object Manipulation (DOM) is of significant importance to both daily and industrial applications. Recent successes in differentiable physics simulators allow learning algorithms to train a policy with analytic gradients through environment dynamics, which significantly facilitates the development of DOM algorithms. However, existing DOM benchmarks are either single-object-based or non-differentiable. This leaves the questions of 1) how a task-specific algorithm performs on other tasks and 2) how a differentiable-physics-based algorithm compares with the non-differentiable ones in general. In this work, we present DaXBench, a differentiable DOM benchmark with a wide object and task coverage. DaXBench includes 9 challenging high-fidelity simulated tasks, covering rope, cloth, and liquid manipulation with various difficulty levels. To better understand the performance of general algorithms on different DOM tasks, we conduct comprehensive experiments over representative DOM methods, ranging from planning to imitation learning and reinforcement learning. In addition, we provide careful empirical studies of existing decision-making algorithms based on differentiable physics, and discuss their limitations, as well as potential future directions.
abstract_zh: 可变形对象操纵（DOM）对于日常和工业应用都非常重要。最近在可微物理模拟器方面取得的成功允许学习算法通过环境动力学来训练具有解析梯度的策略，这极大地促进了 DOM 算法的开发。然而，现有的 DOM 基准要么是基于单个对象的，要么是不可微分的。这就留下了以下问题：1）特定于任务的算法如何在其他任务上执行；2）基于可微分物理的算法与一般不可微分算法相比如何。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DaXBench，这是一个可微分的 DOM 基准测试，具有广泛的对象和任务覆盖范围。 DaXBench 包括 9 个具有挑战性的高保真模拟任务，涵盖不同难度级别的绳索、布料和液体操作。为了更好地了解通用算法在不同 DOM 任务上的性能，我们对代表性 DOM 方法进行了全面的实验，从规划到模仿学习和强化学习。此外，我们对基于可微物理的现有决策算法进行了仔细的实证研究，并讨论了它们的局限性以及未来潜在的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DaXBench，一个基于可微物理的可变形物体操作基准测试平台，包含9个高保真模拟任务，用于评估不同算法在绳索、布料和液体操作中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有可变形物体操作基准存在单物体或非可微物理的局限性，难以全面比较任务通用性及可微物理算法与非可微方法的优劣。
AI.method: 构建涵盖绳索、布料和液体的9个难度分级任务，覆盖不同操作场景；对规划、模仿学习和强化学习等典型方法进行系统实验，并分析可微物理决策算法的局限性。
AI.result: 实验表明任务特定算法泛化能力有限，可微物理方法在某些任务上表现更优，但存在计算开销大、稳定性不足等挑战。
AI.conclusion: DaXBench为可变形物体操作算法研究提供了标准化评估框架，揭示了现有方法的不足，并为未来研究指明了方向。

authors_text: Alessandro Zanardi,Pier Giuseppe Sessa,Nando Käslin,Saverio Bolognani,Andrea Censi,Emilio Frazzoli
title: How Bad is Selfish Driving? Bounding the Inefficiency of Equilibria in Urban Driving Games
title_zh: 自私驾驶有多糟糕？限制城市驾驶游戏中均衡的低效率
abstract: We consider the interaction among agents engaging in a driving task and we model it as general-sum game. This class of games exhibits a plurality of different equilibria posing the issue of equilibrium selection. While selecting the most efficient equilibrium (in term of social cost) is often impractical from a computational standpoint, in this work we study the (in)efficiency of any equilibrium players might agree to play. More specifically, we bound the equilibrium inefficiency by modeling driving games as particular type of congestion games over spatio-temporal resources. We obtain novel guarantees that refine existing bounds on the Price of Anarchy (PoA) as a function of problem-dependent game parameters. For instance, the relative trade-off between proximity costs and personal objectives such as comfort and progress. Although the obtained guarantees concern open-loop trajectories, we observe efficient equilibria even when agents employ closed-loop policies trained via decentralized multi-agent reinforcement learning.
summary: We consider the interaction among agents engaging in a driving task and we model it as general-sum game. This class of games exhibits a plurality of different equilibria posing the issue of equilibrium selection. While selecting the most efficient equilibrium (in term of social cost) is often impractical from a computational standpoint, in this work we study the (in)efficiency of any equilibrium players might agree to play. More specifically, we bound the equilibrium inefficiency by modeling driving games as particular type of congestion games over spatio-temporal resources. We obtain novel guarantees that refine existing bounds on the Price of Anarchy (PoA) as a function of problem-dependent game parameters. For instance, the relative trade-off between proximity costs and personal objectives such as comfort and progress. Although the obtained guarantees concern open-loop trajectories, we observe efficient equilibria even when agents employ closed-loop policies trained via decentralized multi-agent reinforcement learning.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑参与驾驶任务的代理之间的交互，并将其建模为一般和博弈。这类博弈表现出多种不同的均衡，提出了均衡选择的问题。虽然从计算的角度来看，选择最有效的均衡（就社会成本而言）通常是不切实际的，但在这项工作中，我们研究了任何均衡参与者可能同意参与的（低）效率。更具体地说，我们通过将驾驶博弈建模为时空资源上的特定类型的拥堵博弈来限制均衡低效率。我们获得了新颖的保证，将无政府价格（PoA）的现有界限细化为与问题相关的游戏参数的函数。例如，邻近成本与舒适和进步等个人目标之间的相对权衡。尽管获得的保证涉及开环轨迹，但即使代理采用通过分散多代理强化学习训练的闭环策略，我们也观察到有效的平衡。

AI.tldr: 本文研究城市驾驶博弈中自私行为导致的均衡低效率问题，通过建模为时空资源拥堵博弈，分析并改进价格分歧（PoA）的界限。
AI.motivation: 城市交通中个体驾驶员的自私决策可能导致整体效率低下，但如何量化这种低效率并寻找改进方法仍存在挑战。
AI.method: 将驾驶任务建模为一般和博弈，结合时空资源拥堵博弈理论，通过参数化分析改进PoA界限，并利用强化学习验证闭环策略下的均衡效率。
AI.result: 提出依赖问题参数的新型PoA界限，揭示接近成本与个人目标间的权衡关系，发现即使使用闭环策略仍存在高效均衡。
AI.conclusion: 通过参数化分析有效改进了传统PoA界限，为理解自私驾驶行为的效率损失提供了理论依据与实践启示。
