search_text: How Bad is Selfish Driving? Bounding the Inefficiency of Equilibria in Urban Driving Games 自私驾驶有多糟糕？限制城市驾驶游戏中均衡的低效率 We consider the interaction among agents engaging in a driving task and we model it as general-sum game. This class of games exhibits a plurality of different equilibria posing the issue of equilibrium selection. While selecting the most efficient equilibrium (in term of social cost) is often impractical from a computational standpoint, in this work we study the (in)efficiency of any equilibrium players might agree to play. More specifically, we bound the equilibrium inefficiency by modeling driving games as particular type of congestion games over spatio-temporal resources. We obtain novel guarantees that refine existing bounds on the Price of Anarchy (PoA) as a function of problem-dependent game parameters. For instance, the relative trade-off between proximity costs and personal objectives such as comfort and progress. Although the obtained guarantees concern open-loop trajectories, we observe efficient equilibria even when agents employ closed-loop policies trained via decentralized multi-agent reinforcement learning. 我们考虑参与驾驶任务的代理之间的交互，并将其建模为一般和博弈。这类博弈表现出多种不同的均衡，提出了均衡选择的问题。虽然从计算的角度来看，选择最有效的均衡（就社会成本而言）通常是不切实际的，但在这项工作中，我们研究了任何均衡参与者可能同意参与的（低）效率。更具体地说，我们通过将驾驶博弈建模为时空资源上的特定类型的拥堵博弈来限制均衡低效率。我们获得了新颖的保证，将无政府价格（PoA）的现有界限细化为与问题相关的游戏参数的函数。例如，邻近成本与舒适和进步等个人目标之间的相对权衡。尽管获得的保证涉及开环轨迹，但即使代理采用通过分散多代理强化学习训练的闭环策略，我们也观察到有效的平衡。 本文研究城市驾驶博弈中自私行为导致的均衡低效率问题，通过建模为时空资源拥堵博弈，分析并改进价格分歧（PoA）的界限。 Alessandro Zanardi,Pier Giuseppe Sessa,Nando Käslin,Saverio Bolognani,Andrea Censi,Emilio Frazzoli cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.GT

authors_text: Ulrich Meyer,Hung Tran,Konstantinos Tsakalidis
title: Certifying Induced Subgraphs in Large Graphs
title_zh: 验证大图中的导出子图
abstract: We introduce I/O-optimal certifying algorithms for bipartite graphs, as well as for the classes of split, threshold, bipartite chain, and trivially perfect graphs. When the input graph is a class member, the certifying algorithm returns a certificate that characterizes this class. Otherwise, it returns a forbidden induced subgraph as a certificate for non-membership. On a graph with $n$ vertices and $m$ edges, our algorithms take optimal $O(\text{sort}(n + m))$ I/Os in the worst case or with high probability for bipartite chain graphs, and the certificates are returned in optimal I/Os. We give implementations for split and threshold graphs and provide an experimental evaluation.
summary: We introduce I/O-optimal certifying algorithms for bipartite graphs, as well as for the classes of split, threshold, bipartite chain, and trivially perfect graphs. When the input graph is a class member, the certifying algorithm returns a certificate that characterizes this class. Otherwise, it returns a forbidden induced subgraph as a certificate for non-membership. On a graph with $n$ vertices and $m$ edges, our algorithms take optimal $O(\text{sort}(n + m))$ I/Os in the worst case or with high probability for bipartite chain graphs, and the certificates are returned in optimal I/Os. We give implementations for split and threshold graphs and provide an experimental evaluation.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了二分图以及分裂图、阈值图、二分链图和平凡完美图类的 I/O 最优验证算法。当输入图是类成员时，认证算法返回表征该类的证书。否则，它返回一个禁止的诱导子图作为非成员资格的证书。在具有 $n$ 个顶点和 $m$ 个边的图上，我们的算法在最坏情况下或二分链图的概率较高时采用最佳 $O(\text{sort}(n + m))$ I/O，并且以最佳 I/O 形式返回证书。我们给出了分割图和阈值图的实现，并提供了实验评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于大型图的I/O最优认证算法，能够验证图是否属于特定类别并返回相应证书或禁止的诱导子图。
AI.motivation: 在处理大规模图数据时，需要高效且可靠的算法来验证图的结构属性，以支持数据分析和优化。
AI.method: 设计针对双分图、分裂图、阈值图等类别的认证算法，通过I/O最优操作返回证书或禁止子图，确保最坏情况下的时间复杂度。
AI.result: 算法在双分链图等场景下达到最优I/O复杂度，实现了分裂图和阈值图的认证算法，并通过实验验证了效果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为大规模图的结构认证提供了高效方法，有助于提升图数据分析的准确性和效率。

authors_text: Zhiwei Lin,Zengyu Yang,Yongtao Wang
title: Foreground Guidance and Multi-Layer Feature Fusion for Unsupervised Object Discovery with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 实现无监督对象发现的前景引导和多层特征融合
abstract: Unsupervised object discovery (UOD) has recently shown encouraging progress with the adoption of pre-trained Transformer features. However, current methods based on Transformers mainly focus on designing the localization head (e.g., seed selection-expansion and normalized cut) and overlook the importance of improving Transformer features. In this work, we handle UOD task from the perspective of feature enhancement and propose FOReground guidance and MUlti-LAyer feature fusion for unsupervised object discovery, dubbed FORMULA. Firstly, we present a foreground guidance strategy with an off-the-shelf UOD detector to highlight the foreground regions on the feature maps and then refine object locations in an iterative fashion. Moreover, to solve the scale variation issues in object detection, we design a multi-layer feature fusion module that aggregates features responding to objects at different scales. The experiments on VOC07, VOC12, and COCO 20k show that the proposed FORMULA achieves new state-of-the-art results on unsupervised object discovery. The code will be released at https://github.com/VDIGPKU/FORMULA.
summary: Unsupervised object discovery (UOD) has recently shown encouraging progress with the adoption of pre-trained Transformer features. However, current methods based on Transformers mainly focus on designing the localization head (e.g., seed selection-expansion and normalized cut) and overlook the importance of improving Transformer features. In this work, we handle UOD task from the perspective of feature enhancement and propose FOReground guidance and MUlti-LAyer feature fusion for unsupervised object discovery, dubbed FORMULA. Firstly, we present a foreground guidance strategy with an off-the-shelf UOD detector to highlight the foreground regions on the feature maps and then refine object locations in an iterative fashion. Moreover, to solve the scale variation issues in object detection, we design a multi-layer feature fusion module that aggregates features responding to objects at different scales. The experiments on VOC07, VOC12, and COCO 20k show that the proposed FORMULA achieves new state-of-the-art results on unsupervised object discovery. The code will be released at https://github.com/VDIGPKU/FORMULA.
abstract_zh: 最近，通过采用预先训练的 Transformer 功能，无监督对象发现 (UOD) 取得了令人鼓舞的进展。然而，目前基于 Transformer 的方法主要集中在设计定位头（例如种子选择-扩展和归一化切割），而忽视了改进 Transformer 特征的重要性。在这项工作中，我们从特征增强的角度处理 UOD 任务，并提出用于无监督对象发现的前景引导和多层特征融合，称为 FORMULA。首先，我们提出了一种前景引导策略，使用现成的 UOD 检测器来突出显示特征图上的前景区域，然后以迭代方式细化对象位置。此外，为了解决目标检测中的尺度变化问题，我们设计了一个多层特征融合模块，该模块聚合响应不同尺度目标的特征。在 VOC07、VOC12 和 COCO 20k 上的实验表明，所提出的 FORMULA 在无监督对象发现方面取得了新的最先进的结果。代码将在 https://github.com/VDIGPKU/FORMULA 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的无监督目标发现方法FORMULA，通过前景引导和多层特征融合提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer-based无监督目标发现方法过度依赖定位头设计，忽视了对Transformer特征本身的优化，导致尺度变化等问题。
AI.method: 提出前景引导策略利用现成检测器强化特征图前景区域，并设计多尺度特征融合模块聚合不同尺度目标响应特征。
AI.result: 在VOC07/VOC12/COCO20k数据集上达到无监督目标发现新SOTA，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征增强与多尺度融合，FORMULA有效解决了无监督目标发现中的尺度变化问题，验证了特征优化的重要性。

Moreover, to solve the scale variation issues in object detection, we design a multi-layer feature fusion module that aggregates features responding to objects at different scales. The experiments on VOC07, VOC12, and COCO 20k show that the proposed FORMULA achieves new state-of-the-art results on unsupervised object discovery. The code will be released at https://github.com/VDIGPKU/FORMULA. 最近，通过采用预先训练的 Transformer 功能，无监督对象发现 (UOD) 取得了令人鼓舞的进展。然而，目前基于 Transformer 的方法主要集中在设计定位头（例如种子选择-扩展和归一化切割），而忽视了改进 Transformer 特征的重要性。在这项工作中，我们从特征增强的角度处理 UOD 任务，并提出用于无监督对象发现的前景引导和多层特征融合，称为 FORMULA。首先，我们提出了一种前景引导策略，使用现成的 UOD 检测器来突出显示特征图上的前景区域，然后以迭代方式细化对象位置。此外，为了解决目标检测中的尺度变化问题，我们设计了一个多层特征融合模块，该模块聚合响应不同尺度目标的特征。在 VOC07、VOC12 和 COCO 20k 上的实验表明，所提出的 FORMULA 在无监督对象发现方面取得了新的最先进的结果。代码将在 https://github.com/VDIGPKU/FORMULA 发布。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的无监督目标发现方法FORMULA，通过前景引导和多层特征融合提升模型性能。 Zhiwei Lin,Zengyu Yang,Yongtao Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Nabeel Seedat,Jonathan Crabbé,Ioana Bica,Mihaela van der Schaar
title: Data-IQ: Characterizing subgroups with heterogeneous outcomes in tabular data
title_zh: Data-IQ：表征表格数据中具有异质结果的子组
abstract: High model performance, on average, can hide that models may systematically underperform on subgroups of the data. We consider the tabular setting, which surfaces the unique issue of outcome heterogeneity - this is prevalent in areas such as healthcare, where patients with similar features can have different outcomes, thus making reliable predictions challenging. To tackle this, we propose Data-IQ, a framework to systematically stratify examples into subgroups with respect to their outcomes. We do this by analyzing the behavior of individual examples during training, based on their predictive confidence and, importantly, the aleatoric (data) uncertainty. Capturing the aleatoric uncertainty permits a principled characterization and then subsequent stratification of data examples into three distinct subgroups (Easy, Ambiguous, Hard). We experimentally demonstrate the benefits of Data-IQ on four real-world medical datasets. We show that Data-IQ's characterization of examples is most robust to variation across similarly performant (yet different) models, compared to baselines. Since Data-IQ can be used with any ML model (including neural networks, gradient boosting etc.), this property ensures consistency of data characterization, while allowing flexible model selection. Taking this a step further, we demonstrate that the subgroups enable us to construct new approaches to both feature acquisition and dataset selection. Furthermore, we highlight how the subgroups can inform reliable model usage, noting the significant impact of the Ambiguous subgroup on model generalization.
summary: High model performance, on average, can hide that models may systematically underperform on subgroups of the data. We consider the tabular setting, which surfaces the unique issue of outcome heterogeneity - this is prevalent in areas such as healthcare, where patients with similar features can have different outcomes, thus making reliable predictions challenging. To tackle this, we propose Data-IQ, a framework to systematically stratify examples into subgroups with respect to their outcomes. We do this by analyzing the behavior of individual examples during training, based on their predictive confidence and, importantly, the aleatoric (data) uncertainty. Capturing the aleatoric uncertainty permits a principled characterization and then subsequent stratification of data examples into three distinct subgroups (Easy, Ambiguous, Hard). We experimentally demonstrate the benefits of Data-IQ on four real-world medical datasets. We show that Data-IQ's characterization of examples is most robust to variation across similarly performant (yet different) models, compared to baselines. Since Data-IQ can be used with any ML model (including neural networks, gradient boosting etc.), this property ensures consistency of data characterization, while allowing flexible model selection. Taking this a step further, we demonstrate that the subgroups enable us to construct new approaches to both feature acquisition and dataset selection. Furthermore, we highlight how the subgroups can inform reliable model usage, noting the significant impact of the Ambiguous subgroup on model generalization.
abstract_zh: 平均而言，较高的模型性能可以掩盖模型在数据子组上可能系统性表现不佳的事实。我们考虑表格设置，它提出了结果异质性的独特问题 - 这在医疗保健等领域很普遍，具有相似特征的患者可能会产生不同的结果，从而使可靠的预测具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Data-IQ，这是一个根据结果将示例系统地划分为子组的框架。我们通过分析训练期间各个示例的行为来做到这一点，基于它们的预测置信度，重要的是，任意（数据）不确定性。捕获任意不确定性可以进行原则性的表征，然后将数据示例分层为三个不同的子组（简单、模糊、困难）。我们通过实验证明了 Data-IQ 在四个真实世界医学数据集上的优势。我们表明，与基线相比，Data-IQ 对示例的描述对于性能相似（但不同）模型的变化最为稳健。由于 Data-IQ 可与任何 ML 模型（包括神经网络、梯度提升等）一起使用，因此此属性可确保数据表征的一致性，同时允许灵活的模型选择。更进一步，我们证明这些子组使我们能够构建特征获取和数据集选择的新方法。此外，我们强调了子组如何告知可靠的模型使用，并指出模糊子组对模型泛化的重大影响。

AI.tldr: 提出Data-IQ框架，用于在表格数据中识别具有异质结果的子群体，以提高模型预测的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 高模型性能可能掩盖子群体表现不佳的问题，尤其在医疗领域，患者特征相似但结果差异大，导致预测可靠性下降。
AI.method: 通过分析训练过程中样本的预测置信度与aleatoric不确定性，将数据划分为Easy（易预测）、Ambiguous（模糊）和Hard（难预测）三类子群。
AI.result: 在四个医疗数据集验证中，Data-IQ比基线方法更稳健，适用于多种模型，且能指导特征获取、数据集选择及模型使用策略优化。
AI.conclusion: Data-IQ有效识别数据子群，提升模型可靠性，尤其通过Ambiguous子群分析可优化模型泛化能力与实际应用决策。

authors_text: Marco Orsingher,Paolo Zani,Paolo Medici,Massimo Bertozzi
title: Learning Neural Radiance Fields from Multi-View Geometry
title_zh: 从多视图几何中学习神经辐射场
comment: ECCV 2022 Workshop on "Learning to Generate 3D Shapes and Scenes"
comments: ECCV 2022 Workshop on "Learning to Generate 3D Shapes and Scenes"
abstract: We present a framework, called MVG-NeRF, that combines classical Multi-View Geometry algorithms and Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) for image-based 3D reconstruction. NeRF has revolutionized the field of implicit 3D representations, mainly due to a differentiable volumetric rendering formulation that enables high-quality and geometry-aware novel view synthesis. However, the underlying geometry of the scene is not explicitly constrained during training, thus leading to noisy and incorrect results when extracting a mesh with marching cubes. To this end, we propose to leverage pixelwise depths and normals from a classical 3D reconstruction pipeline as geometric priors to guide NeRF optimization. Such priors are used as pseudo-ground truth during training in order to improve the quality of the estimated underlying surface. Moreover, each pixel is weighted by a confidence value based on the forward-backward reprojection error for additional robustness. Experimental results on real-world data demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach in obtaining clean 3D meshes from images, while maintaining competitive performances in novel view synthesis.
summary: We present a framework, called MVG-NeRF, that combines classical Multi-View Geometry algorithms and Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) for image-based 3D reconstruction. NeRF has revolutionized the field of implicit 3D representations, mainly due to a differentiable volumetric rendering formulation that enables high-quality and geometry-aware novel view synthesis. However, the underlying geometry of the scene is not explicitly constrained during training, thus leading to noisy and incorrect results when extracting a mesh with marching cubes. To this end, we propose to leverage pixelwise depths and normals from a classical 3D reconstruction pipeline as geometric priors to guide NeRF optimization. Such priors are used as pseudo-ground truth during training in order to improve the quality of the estimated underlying surface. Moreover, each pixel is weighted by a confidence value based on the forward-backward reprojection error for additional robustness. Experimental results on real-world data demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach in obtaining clean 3D meshes from images, while maintaining competitive performances in novel view synthesis.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个名为 MVG-NeRF 的框架，它结合了经典的多视图几何算法和神经辐射场 (NeRF)，用于基于图像的 3D 重建。 NeRF 彻底改变了隐式 3D 表示领域，这主要归功于可微分体积渲染公式，它能够实现高质量和几何感知的新颖视图合成。然而，场景的底层几何结构在训练过程中并未受到明确约束，因此在提取具有行进立方体的网格时会导致噪声和不正确的结果。为此，我们建议利用经典 3D 重建管道中的像素深度和法线作为几何先验来指导 NeRF 优化。这些先验在训练期间用作伪地面实况，以提高估计的下垫面的质量。此外，每个像素都通过基于前向-后向重投影误差的置信值进行加权，以提高鲁棒性。真实世界数据的实验结果证明了该方法在从图像中获取干净的 3D 网格方面的有效性，同时在新颖的视图合成中保持竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合经典多视角几何算法与神经辐射场（NeRF）的框架MVG-NeRF，用于基于图像的3D重建。
AI.motivation: NeRF在生成高质量新视角合成结果时，因训练过程中未显式约束场景几何结构，导致通过体素网格提取的3D模型存在噪声和误差。
AI.method: 利用经典3D重建流程生成的像素级深度和法线作为几何先验，结合前后投影误差计算的置信度权重，引导NeRF优化过程。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上验证了该方法能生成更干净的3D网格，同时保持新视角合成的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合多视角几何先验与NeRF，有效提升了3D重建质量与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Hao Yang,Jinming Zhao,Gholamreza Haffari,Ehsan Shareghi
title: Self-supervised Rewiring of Pre-trained Speech Encoders: Towards Faster Fine-tuning with Less Labels in Speech Processing
title_zh: 预训练语音编码器的自监督重新布线：在语音处理中以更少的标签实现更快的微调
abstract: Pre-trained speech Transformers have facilitated great success across various speech processing tasks. However, fine-tuning these encoders for downstream tasks require sufficiently large training data to converge or to achieve state-of-the-art. In text domain this has been partly attributed to sub-optimality of the representation space in pre-trained Transformers. In this work, we take a sober look into pre-trained speech encoders and rewire their representation space without requiring any task-specific labels. Our method utilises neutrally synthesised version of audio inputs along with frame masking to construct positive pairs for contrastive self-supervised learning. When used for augmenting the wav2vec 2 encoder, we observe consistent improvement of isotropy in the representation space. Our experiments on 6 speech processing tasks, exhibit a significant convergence speedup during task fine-tuning as well as consistent task improvement, specially in low-resource settings.
summary: Pre-trained speech Transformers have facilitated great success across various speech processing tasks. However, fine-tuning these encoders for downstream tasks require sufficiently large training data to converge or to achieve state-of-the-art. In text domain this has been partly attributed to sub-optimality of the representation space in pre-trained Transformers. In this work, we take a sober look into pre-trained speech encoders and rewire their representation space without requiring any task-specific labels. Our method utilises neutrally synthesised version of audio inputs along with frame masking to construct positive pairs for contrastive self-supervised learning. When used for augmenting the wav2vec 2 encoder, we observe consistent improvement of isotropy in the representation space. Our experiments on 6 speech processing tasks, exhibit a significant convergence speedup during task fine-tuning as well as consistent task improvement, specially in low-resource settings.
abstract_zh: 预训练的语音 Transformer 在各种语音处理任务中取得了巨大成功。然而，针对下游任务微调这些编码器需要足够大的训练数据才能收敛或达到最先进的水平。在文本领域，这部分归因于预训练 Transformer 中表示空间的次优性。在这项工作中，我们冷静地研究了预训练的语音编码器，并重新连接了它们的表示空间，而不需要任何特定于任务的标签。我们的方法利用音频输入的中性合成版本以及帧掩蔽来构建用于对比自监督学习的正对。当用于增强 wav2vec 2 编码器时，我们观察到表示空间中各向同性的持续改善。我们对 6 个语音处理任务进行的实验显示，任务微调过程中收敛速度显着加快，任务得到持续改进，特别是在资源匮乏的情况下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需任务标签的自监督方法，通过重构预训练语音编码器的表示空间，以加速下游任务的微调并提升低资源场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 预训练语音Transformer在微调时需大量数据才能收敛，且其表示空间可能存在次优问题，导致资源消耗大且效果受限。
AI.method: 利用中性合成音频与帧掩码生成正样本对，通过对比自监督学习重构wav2vec 2编码器的表示空间，无需任务特定标签。
AI.result: 在6个语音任务中，微调收敛速度显著提升，低资源场景下任务表现持续优化，表示空间各向同性得到改善。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自监督重构有效提升了编码器表示质量，为少标签场景下的语音任务微调提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Self-supervised Rewiring of Pre-trained Speech Encoders: Towards Faster Fine-tuning with Less Labels in Speech Processing 预训练语音编码器的自监督重新布线：在语音处理中以更少的标签实现更快的微调 Pre-trained speech Transformers have facilitated great success across various speech processing tasks. However, fine-tuning these encoders for downstream tasks require sufficiently large training data to converge or to achieve state-of-the-art. In text domain this has been partly attributed to sub-optimality of the representation space in pre-trained Transformers. In this work, we take a sober look into pre-trained speech encoders and rewire their representation space without requiring any task-specific labels. Our method utilises neutrally synthesised version of audio inputs along with frame masking to construct positive pairs for contrastive self-supervised learning. When used for augmenting the wav2vec 2 encoder, we observe consistent improvement of isotropy in the representation space. Our experiments on 6 speech processing tasks, exhibit a significant convergence speedup during task fine-tuning as well as consistent task improvement, specially in low-resource settings. 预训练的语音 Transformer 在各种语音处理任务中取得了巨大成功。然而，针对下游任务微调这些编码器需要足够大的训练数据才能收敛或达到最先进的水平。在文本领域，这部分归因于预训练 Transformer 中表示空间的次优性。在这项工作中，我们冷静地研究了预训练的语音编码器，并重新连接了它们的表示空间，而不需要任何特定于任务的标签。我们的方法利用音频输入的中性合成版本以及帧掩蔽来构建用于对比自监督学习的正对。当用于增强 wav2vec 2 编码器时，我们观察到表示空间中各向同性的持续改善。我们对 6 个语音处理任务进行的实验显示，任务微调过程中收敛速度显着加快，任务得到持续改进，特别是在资源匮乏的情况下。 本文提出一种无需任务标签的自监督方法，通过重构预训练语音编码器的表示空间，以加速下游任务的微调并提升低资源场景下的性能。 Hao Yang,Jinming Zhao,Gholamreza Haffari,Ehsan Shareghi cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Georgios Kaissis,Alexander Ziller,Stefan Kolek Martinez de Azagra,Daniel Rueckert
title: Generalised Likelihood Ratio Testing Adversaries through the Differential Privacy Lens
title_zh: 通过差分隐私视角的广义似然比测试对手
abstract: Differential Privacy (DP) provides tight upper bounds on the capabilities of optimal adversaries, but such adversaries are rarely encountered in practice. Under the hypothesis testing/membership inference interpretation of DP, we examine the Gaussian mechanism and relax the usual assumption of a Neyman-Pearson-Optimal (NPO) adversary to a Generalized Likelihood Test (GLRT) adversary. This mild relaxation leads to improved privacy guarantees, which we express in the spirit of Gaussian DP and $(\varepsilon, δ)$-DP, including composition and sub-sampling results. We evaluate our results numerically and find them to match the theoretical upper bounds.
summary: Differential Privacy (DP) provides tight upper bounds on the capabilities of optimal adversaries, but such adversaries are rarely encountered in practice. Under the hypothesis testing/membership inference interpretation of DP, we examine the Gaussian mechanism and relax the usual assumption of a Neyman-Pearson-Optimal (NPO) adversary to a Generalized Likelihood Test (GLRT) adversary. This mild relaxation leads to improved privacy guarantees, which we express in the spirit of Gaussian DP and $(\varepsilon, δ)$-DP, including composition and sub-sampling results. We evaluate our results numerically and find them to match the theoretical upper bounds.
abstract_zh: 差分隐私（DP）对最佳对手的能力提供了严格的上限，但在实践中很少遇到这样的对手。在DP的假设检验/隶属推理解释下，我们检查了高斯机制，并将内曼皮尔逊最优（NPO）对手的通常假设放宽为广义似然测试（GLRT）对手。这种温和的放松导致了隐私保证的改善，我们以高斯 DP 和 $(\varepsilon, δ)$-DP 的精神来表达，包括合成和子采样结果。我们对结果进行数值评估，发现它们与理论上限相符。

AI.tldr: 本文通过差分隐私视角分析广义似然比检验对手，以改进隐私保证。
AI.motivation: 差分隐私理论中假设的最优对手在现实中罕见，需通过更贴近实际的对手模型提升隐私分析的实用性。
AI.method: 在假设检验框架下放松奈曼-皮尔逊最优对手假设，引入广义似然比检验对手，并推导符合高斯差分隐私及(ε, δ)-DP形式的隐私界。
AI.result: 数值实验表明理论推导的隐私界与实际结果一致，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 广义似然比检验对手模型能提供更紧致的隐私保证，且理论与实验结果匹配，为差分隐私分析提供了新视角。

authors_text: Pius von Däniken,Jan Deriu,Don Tuggener,Mark Cieliebak
title: On the Effectiveness of Automated Metrics for Text Generation Systems
title_zh: 关于文本生成系统自动度量的有效性
abstract: A major challenge in the field of Text Generation is evaluation because we lack a sound theory that can be leveraged to extract guidelines for evaluation campaigns. In this work, we propose a first step towards such a theory that incorporates different sources of uncertainty, such as imperfect automated metrics and insufficiently sized test sets. The theory has practical applications, such as determining the number of samples needed to reliably distinguish the performance of a set of Text Generation systems in a given setting. We showcase the application of the theory on the WMT 21 and Spot-The-Bot evaluation data and outline how it can be leveraged to improve the evaluation protocol regarding the reliability, robustness, and significance of the evaluation outcome.
summary: A major challenge in the field of Text Generation is evaluation because we lack a sound theory that can be leveraged to extract guidelines for evaluation campaigns. In this work, we propose a first step towards such a theory that incorporates different sources of uncertainty, such as imperfect automated metrics and insufficiently sized test sets. The theory has practical applications, such as determining the number of samples needed to reliably distinguish the performance of a set of Text Generation systems in a given setting. We showcase the application of the theory on the WMT 21 and Spot-The-Bot evaluation data and outline how it can be leveraged to improve the evaluation protocol regarding the reliability, robustness, and significance of the evaluation outcome.
abstract_zh: 文本生成领域的一个主要挑战是评估，因为我们缺乏可以用来提取评估活动指南的合理理论。在这项工作中，我们提出了迈向这种理论的第一步，该理论融合了不同的不确定性来源，例如不完善的自动化指标和规模不足的测试集。该理论具有实际应用，例如确定在给定设置中可靠地区分一组文本生成系统的性能所需的样本数量。我们展示了该理论在 WMT 21 和 Spot-The-Bot 评估数据上的应用，并概述了如何利用该理论来改进有关评估结果的可靠性、稳健性和重要性的评估协议。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种理论框架，解决文本生成系统评估中因自动指标不完美和测试集不足导致的不确定性问题，并展示其在实际数据集中的应用。
AI.motivation: 文本生成领域缺乏可靠的评估理论，导致评估结果的可靠性、鲁棒性和显著性难以保证。
AI.method: 构建包含多种不确定性的理论模型，通过分析自动指标误差和测试集规模，确定区分系统性能所需的最小样本量，并应用于WMT 21和Spot-The-Bot数据集。
AI.result: 验证了理论框架可有效提升评估协议的可靠性，明确样本量与评估显著性的关系，并为改进评估标准提供方法论支持。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为文本生成系统的科学评估提供了理论依据，有助于制定更严谨的评估协议和实验设计规范。

authors_text: Bhushan Chaudhari,Himanshu Chaudhary,Aakash Agarwal,Kamna Meena,Tanmoy Bhowmik
title: FairGen: Fair Synthetic Data Generation
title_zh: FairGen：公平的合成数据生成
abstract: With the rising adoption of Machine Learning across the domains like banking, pharmaceutical, ed-tech, etc, it has become utmost important to adopt responsible AI methods to ensure models are not unfairly discriminating against any group. Given the lack of clean training data, generative adversarial techniques are preferred to generate synthetic data with several state-of-the-art architectures readily available across various domains from unstructured data such as text, images to structured datasets modelling fraud detection and many more. These techniques overcome several challenges such as class imbalance, limited training data, restricted access to data due to privacy issues. Existing work focusing on generating fair data either works for a certain GAN architecture or is very difficult to tune across the GANs. In this paper, we propose a pipeline to generate fairer synthetic data independent of the GAN architecture. The proposed paper utilizes a pre-processing algorithm to identify and remove bias inducing samples. In particular, we claim that while generating synthetic data most GANs amplify bias present in the training data but by removing these bias inducing samples, GANs essentially focuses more on real informative samples. Our experimental evaluation on two open-source datasets demonstrates how the proposed pipeline is generating fair data along with improved performance in some cases.
summary: With the rising adoption of Machine Learning across the domains like banking, pharmaceutical, ed-tech, etc, it has become utmost important to adopt responsible AI methods to ensure models are not unfairly discriminating against any group. Given the lack of clean training data, generative adversarial techniques are preferred to generate synthetic data with several state-of-the-art architectures readily available across various domains from unstructured data such as text, images to structured datasets modelling fraud detection and many more. These techniques overcome several challenges such as class imbalance, limited training data, restricted access to data due to privacy issues. Existing work focusing on generating fair data either works for a certain GAN architecture or is very difficult to tune across the GANs. In this paper, we propose a pipeline to generate fairer synthetic data independent of the GAN architecture. The proposed paper utilizes a pre-processing algorithm to identify and remove bias inducing samples. In particular, we claim that while generating synthetic data most GANs amplify bias present in the training data but by removing these bias inducing samples, GANs essentially focuses more on real informative samples. Our experimental evaluation on two open-source datasets demonstrates how the proposed pipeline is generating fair data along with improved performance in some cases.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习在银行、制药、教育技术等领域的日益普及，采用负责任的人工智能方法以确保模型不会不公平地歧视任何群体变得至关重要。由于缺乏干净的训练数据，生成对抗技术更适合生成具有多种最先进架构的合成数据，这些架构可以跨多个领域轻松使用，从文本、图像等非结构化数据到建模欺诈检测的结构化数据集等等。这些技术克服了一些挑战，例如类别不平衡、训练数据有限、由于隐私问题而限制数据访问。现有的专注于生成公平数据的工作要么适用于某种 GAN 架构，要么很难跨 GAN 进行调整。在本文中，我们提出了一种独立于 GAN 架构生成更公平的合成数据的管道。该论文利用预处理算法来识别和删除引起偏差的样本。特别是，我们声称，在生成合成数据时，大多数 GAN 会放大训练数据中存在的偏差，但通过删除这些偏差诱发样本，GAN 本质上更关注真实的信息样本。我们对两个开源数据集的实验评估展示了所提出的管道如何生成公平的数据以及在某些情况下提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种独立于GAN架构的生成公平合成数据的管道，通过预处理算法移除偏见样本以生成更公平的数据。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN生成的合成数据可能放大训练数据中的偏见，且现有去偏方法难以跨架构通用或调参困难。
AI.method: 设计预处理算法识别并移除训练数据中引发偏见的样本，使GAN更关注真实信息样本。
AI.result: 在两个开源数据集上验证了该方法能生成公平数据，并在某些场景下提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为生成公平合成数据提供了通用框架，在保证公平性的同时部分场景下提升性能。

authors_text: Dan Ofer,Dafna Shahaf
title: Cards Against AI: Predicting Humor in a Fill-in-the-blank Party Game
title_zh: 对抗人工智能的卡片：预测填空派对游戏中的幽默
comment: Conditionally accepted in EMNLP 2022 short findings. 5 pages
comments: Conditionally accepted in EMNLP 2022 short findings. 5 pages
abstract: Humor is an inherently social phenomenon, with humorous utterances shaped by what is socially and culturally accepted. Understanding humor is an important NLP challenge, with many applications to human-computer interactions. In this work we explore humor in the context of Cards Against Humanity -- a party game where players complete fill-in-the-blank statements using cards that can be offensive or politically incorrect. We introduce a novel dataset of 300,000 online games of Cards Against Humanity, including 785K unique jokes, analyze it and provide insights. We trained machine learning models to predict the winning joke per game, achieving performance twice as good (20\%) as random, even without any user information. On the more difficult task of judging novel cards, we see the models' ability to generalize is moderate. Interestingly, we find that our models are primarily focused on punchline card, with the context having little impact. Analyzing feature importance, we observe that short, crude, juvenile punchlines tend to win.
summary: Humor is an inherently social phenomenon, with humorous utterances shaped by what is socially and culturally accepted. Understanding humor is an important NLP challenge, with many applications to human-computer interactions. In this work we explore humor in the context of Cards Against Humanity -- a party game where players complete fill-in-the-blank statements using cards that can be offensive or politically incorrect. We introduce a novel dataset of 300,000 online games of Cards Against Humanity, including 785K unique jokes, analyze it and provide insights. We trained machine learning models to predict the winning joke per game, achieving performance twice as good (20\%) as random, even without any user information. On the more difficult task of judging novel cards, we see the models' ability to generalize is moderate. Interestingly, we find that our models are primarily focused on punchline card, with the context having little impact. Analyzing feature importance, we observe that short, crude, juvenile punchlines tend to win.
abstract_zh: 幽默是一种固有的社会现象，幽默的话语是由社会和文化所接受的内容塑造的。理解幽默是 NLP 的一项重要挑战，在人机交互中有许多应用。在这项工作中，我们在反人类卡片的背景下探索幽默——这是一款派对游戏，玩家使用可能具有攻击性或政治不正确的卡片来完成填空陈述。我们引入了包含 300,000 个反人类纸牌在线游戏的新颖数据集，其中包括 785K 个独特的笑话，对其进行分析并提供见解。我们训练机器学习模型来预测每场比赛的获胜笑话，即使没有任何用户信息，也能实现两倍于随机的性能 (20\%)。在判断新颖卡片这一更困难的任务中，我们看到模型的泛化能力中等。有趣的是，我们发现我们的模型主要集中在妙语卡上，上下文影响很小。通过分析特征的重要性，我们发现简短、粗俗、幼稚的妙语往往会获胜。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析Cards Against Humanity游戏数据集，研究机器学习模型预测填空类幽默笑话获胜情况的能力。
AI.motivation: 幽默作为社会文化现象，其理解对自然语言处理和人机交互具有重要意义，但现有研究缺乏对填空式幽默生成机制的系统分析。
AI.method: 构建包含30万场游戏、78.5万条笑话的新型数据集，训练机器学习模型预测每局游戏的胜出笑话，并分析特征重要性与模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 模型预测准确率达20%（为随机水平的两倍），发现模型主要关注结尾卡片而非上下文，短小粗俗的笑话更易获胜，新型卡片判断能力较弱。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习可有效捕捉幽默核心要素，但幽默预测仍面临文化敏感性和上下文理解的挑战，简洁粗俗特征与获胜概率存在显著关联。

authors_text: Fenghe Tang,Lingtao Wang,Chunping Ning,Min Xian,Jianrui Ding
title: CMU-Net: A Strong ConvMixer-based Medical Ultrasound Image Segmentation Network
title_zh: CMU-Net：基于 ConvMixer 的强大医学超声图像分割网络
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: U-Net and its extensions have achieved great success in medical image segmentation. However, due to the inherent local characteristics of ordinary convolution operations, U-Net encoder cannot effectively extract global context information. In addition, simple skip connections cannot capture salient features. In this work, we propose a fully convolutional segmentation network (CMU-Net) which incorporates hybrid convolutions and multi-scale attention gate. The ConvMixer module extracts global context information by mixing features at distant spatial locations. Moreover, the multi-scale attention gate emphasizes valuable features and achieves efficient skip connections. We evaluate the proposed method using both breast ultrasound datasets and a thyroid ultrasound image dataset; and CMU-Net achieves average Intersection over Union (IoU) values of 73.27% and 84.75%, and F1 scores of 84.81% and 91.71%. The code is available at https://github.com/FengheTan9/CMU-Net.
summary: U-Net and its extensions have achieved great success in medical image segmentation. However, due to the inherent local characteristics of ordinary convolution operations, U-Net encoder cannot effectively extract global context information. In addition, simple skip connections cannot capture salient features. In this work, we propose a fully convolutional segmentation network (CMU-Net) which incorporates hybrid convolutions and multi-scale attention gate. The ConvMixer module extracts global context information by mixing features at distant spatial locations. Moreover, the multi-scale attention gate emphasizes valuable features and achieves efficient skip connections. We evaluate the proposed method using both breast ultrasound datasets and a thyroid ultrasound image dataset; and CMU-Net achieves average Intersection over Union (IoU) values of 73.27% and 84.75%, and F1 scores of 84.81% and 91.71%. The code is available at https://github.com/FengheTan9/CMU-Net.
abstract_zh: U-Net 及其扩展在医学图像分割方面取得了巨大成功。然而，由于普通卷积运算固有的局部特征，U-Net编码器无法有效提取全局上下文信息。此外，简单的跳跃连接无法捕获显着特征。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个完全卷积分割网络（CMU-Net），它结合了混合卷积和多尺度注意门。 ConvMixer 模块通过混合远处空间位置的特征来提取全局上下文信息。此外，多尺度注意力门强调有价值的特征并实现高效的跳跃连接。我们使用乳房超声数据集和甲状腺超声图像数据集评估所提出的方法； CMU-Net 的平均交集比并集 (IoU) 值分别为 73.27% 和 84.75%，F1 分数分别为 84.81% 和 91.71%。代码可在 https://github.com/FengheTan9/CMU-Net 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于ConvMixer的医学超声图像分割网络CMU-Net，旨在解决传统U-Net在全局上下文提取和特征捕捉方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统U-Net因普通卷积的局部特性无法有效提取全局上下文信息，且简单跳跃连接难以捕捉显著特征，需改进以提升医学超声图像分割效果。
AI.method: 设计融合混合卷积和多尺度注意力门的全卷积网络，通过ConvMixer模块实现远距离空间位置特征混合，结合多尺度注意力门强化关键特征并优化跳跃连接。
AI.result: 在乳腺和甲状腺超声数据集上，CMU-Net分别达到73.27%和84.75%的平均IoU，以及84.81%和91.71%的F1分数，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CMU-Net通过全局特征混合与多尺度注意力机制显著提升了医学超声图像分割性能，验证了其在复杂医学影像任务中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于ConvMixer的医学超声图像分割网络CMU-Net，旨在解决传统U-Net在全局上下文提取和特征捕捉方面的不足。
ai_content.motivation: 传统U-Net因普通卷积的局部特性无法有效提取全局上下文信息，且简单跳跃连接难以捕捉显著特征，需改进以提升医学超声图像分割效果。
ai_content.method: 设计融合混合卷积和多尺度注意力门的全卷积网络，通过ConvMixer模块实现远距离空间位置特征混合，结合多尺度注意力门强化关键特征并优化跳跃连接。
ai_content.result: 在乳腺和甲状腺超声数据集上，CMU-Net分别达到73.27%和84.75%的平均IoU，以及84.81%和91.71%的F1分数，代码已开源。

search_text: CMU-Net: A Strong ConvMixer-based Medical Ultrasound Image Segmentation Network CMU-Net：基于 ConvMixer 的强大医学超声图像分割网络 U-Net and its extensions have achieved great success in medical image segmentation. However, due to the inherent local characteristics of ordinary convolution operations, U-Net encoder cannot effectively extract global context information. In addition, simple skip connections cannot capture salient features. In this work, we propose a fully convolutional segmentation network (CMU-Net) which incorporates hybrid convolutions and multi-scale attention gate. The ConvMixer module extracts global context information by mixing features at distant spatial locations. Moreover, the multi-scale attention gate emphasizes valuable features and achieves efficient skip connections. We evaluate the proposed method using both breast ultrasound datasets and a thyroid ultrasound image dataset; and CMU-Net achieves average Intersection over Union (IoU) values of 73.27% and 84.75%, and F1 scores of 84.81% and 91.71%. The code is available at https://github.com/FengheTan9/CMU-Net. U-Net 及其扩展在医学图像分割方面取得了巨大成功。然而，由于普通卷积运算固有的局部特征，U-Net编码器无法有效提取全局上下文信息。此外，简单的跳跃连接无法捕获显着特征。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个完全卷积分割网络（CMU-Net），它结合了混合卷积和多尺度注意门。 ConvMixer 模块通过混合远处空间位置的特征来提取全局上下文信息。此外，多尺度注意力门强调有价值的特征并实现高效的跳跃连接。我们使用乳房超声数据集和甲状腺超声图像数据集评估所提出的方法； CMU-Net 的平均交集比并集 (IoU) 值分别为 73.27% 和 84.75%，F1 分数分别为 84.81% 和 91.71%。代码可在 https://github.com/FengheTan9/CMU-Net 获取。 本文提出了一种基于ConvMixer的医学超声图像分割网络CMU-Net，旨在解决传统U-Net在全局上下文提取和特征捕捉方面的不足。 Fenghe Tang,Lingtao Wang,Chunping Ning,Min Xian,Jianrui Ding eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Benjamin Bergner,Christoph Lippert,Aravindh Mahendran
title: Iterative Patch Selection for High-Resolution Image Recognition
title_zh: 高分辨率图像识别的迭代补丁选择
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: High-resolution images are prevalent in various applications, such as autonomous driving and computer-aided diagnosis. However, training neural networks on such images is computationally challenging and easily leads to out-of-memory errors even on modern GPUs. We propose a simple method, Iterative Patch Selection (IPS), which decouples the memory usage from the input size and thus enables the processing of arbitrarily large images under tight hardware constraints. IPS achieves this by selecting only the most salient patches, which are then aggregated into a global representation for image recognition. For both patch selection and aggregation, a cross-attention based transformer is introduced, which exhibits a close connection to Multiple Instance Learning. Our method demonstrates strong performance and has wide applicability across different domains, training regimes and image sizes while using minimal accelerator memory. For example, we are able to finetune our model on whole-slide images consisting of up to 250k patches (>16 gigapixels) with only 5 GB of GPU VRAM at a batch size of 16.
summary: High-resolution images are prevalent in various applications, such as autonomous driving and computer-aided diagnosis. However, training neural networks on such images is computationally challenging and easily leads to out-of-memory errors even on modern GPUs. We propose a simple method, Iterative Patch Selection (IPS), which decouples the memory usage from the input size and thus enables the processing of arbitrarily large images under tight hardware constraints. IPS achieves this by selecting only the most salient patches, which are then aggregated into a global representation for image recognition. For both patch selection and aggregation, a cross-attention based transformer is introduced, which exhibits a close connection to Multiple Instance Learning. Our method demonstrates strong performance and has wide applicability across different domains, training regimes and image sizes while using minimal accelerator memory. For example, we are able to finetune our model on whole-slide images consisting of up to 250k patches (>16 gigapixels) with only 5 GB of GPU VRAM at a batch size of 16.
abstract_zh: 高分辨率图像在自动驾驶和计算机辅助诊断等各种应用中普遍存在。然而，在此类图像上训练神经网络在计算上具有挑战性，并且即使在现代 GPU 上也很容易导致内存不足错误。我们提出了一种简单的方法，即迭代补丁选择（IPS），它将内存使用与输入大小解耦，从而能够在严格的硬件限制下处理任意大的图像。 IPS 通过仅选择最显着的补丁来实现这一点，然后将其聚合成图像识别的全局表示。对于补丁选择和聚合，引入了基于交叉注意力的变压器，它与多实例学习有着密切的联系。我们的方法展示了强大的性能，并且在使用最小的加速器内存的同时，在不同领域、训练方案和图像大小方面具有广泛的适用性。例如，我们能够在由多达 250k 个补丁（> 16 GB）组成的整个幻灯片图像上微调我们的模型，并且批量大小为 16，仅使用 5 GB GPU VRAM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Iterative Patch Selection (IPS)的方法，用于在计算资源受限的情况下处理高分辨率图像的识别任务。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率图像在自动驾驶和医学诊断等领域广泛应用，但直接训练神经网络时面临计算资源消耗大、易出现内存溢出的问题。
AI.method: 通过迭代选择最具判别性的图像块（patches），结合基于交叉注意力机制的Transformer进行特征聚合，将内存占用与输入尺寸解耦，实现对任意尺寸图像的高效处理。
AI.result: 该方法在多个领域和不同图像尺寸上均表现出色，例如仅需5GB GPU显存即可处理包含250k图像块（>160亿像素）的全切片病理图像。
AI.conclusion: IPS方法为高分辨率图像识别提供了轻量级解决方案，在保证性能的同时显著降低了硬件资源需求，具有广泛的工程应用价值。

However, training neural networks on such images is computationally challenging and easily leads to out-of-memory errors even on modern GPUs. We propose a simple method, Iterative Patch Selection (IPS), which decouples the memory usage from the input size and thus enables the processing of arbitrarily large images under tight hardware constraints. IPS achieves this by selecting only the most salient patches, which are then aggregated into a global representation for image recognition. For both patch selection and aggregation, a cross-attention based transformer is introduced, which exhibits a close connection to Multiple Instance Learning. Our method demonstrates strong performance and has wide applicability across different domains, training regimes and image sizes while using minimal accelerator memory. authors_text: Cheng Guo
title: Efficient Representation of Natural Image Patches
title_zh: 自然图像块的有效表示
abstract: Utilizing an abstract information processing model based on minimal yet realistic assumptions inspired by biological systems, we study how to achieve the early visual system's two ultimate objectives: efficient information transmission and accurate sensor probability distribution modeling. We prove that optimizing for information transmission does not guarantee optimal probability distribution modeling in general. We illustrate, using a two-pixel (2D) system and image patches, that an efficient representation can be realized through a nonlinear population code driven by two types of biologically plausible loss functions that depend solely on output. After unsupervised learning, our abstract information processing model bears remarkable resemblances to biological systems, despite not mimicking many features of real neurons, such as spiking activity. A preliminary comparison with a contemporary deep learning model suggests that our model offers a significant efficiency advantage. Our model provides novel insights into the computational theory of early visual systems as well as a potential new approach to enhance the efficiency of deep learning models.
summary: Utilizing an abstract information processing model based on minimal yet realistic assumptions inspired by biological systems, we study how to achieve the early visual system's two ultimate objectives: efficient information transmission and accurate sensor probability distribution modeling. We prove that optimizing for information transmission does not guarantee optimal probability distribution modeling in general. We illustrate, using a two-pixel (2D) system and image patches, that an efficient representation can be realized through a nonlinear population code driven by two types of biologically plausible loss functions that depend solely on output. After unsupervised learning, our abstract information processing model bears remarkable resemblances to biological systems, despite not mimicking many features of real neurons, such as spiking activity. A preliminary comparison with a contemporary deep learning model suggests that our model offers a significant efficiency advantage. Our model provides novel insights into the computational theory of early visual systems as well as a potential new approach to enhance the efficiency of deep learning models.
abstract_zh: 利用受生物系统启发的基于最小但现实的假设的抽象信息处理模型，我们研究如何实现早期视觉系统的两个最终目标：高效的信息传输和准确的传感器概率分布建模。我们证明，优化信息传输并不能保证一般情况下的最优概率分布建模。我们使用两像素（2D）系统和图像块来说明，可以通过由两种仅依赖于输出的生物学上合理的损失函数驱动的非线性总体代码来实现有效的表示。经过无监督学习后，我们的抽象信息处理模型与生物系统具有显着的相似之处，尽管没有模仿真实神经元的许多特征，例如尖峰活动。与当代深度学习模型的初步比较表明，我们的模型提供了显着的效率优势。我们的模型为早期视觉系统的计算理论提供了新颖的见解，以及提高深度学习模型效率的潜在新方法。

AI.tldr: 研究如何通过生物启发模型高效表示自然图像块，同时优化信息传输与概率分布建模。
AI.motivation: 解决早期视觉系统在高效信息传输与准确概率分布建模间的矛盾，探索更高效的表示方法。
AI.method: 构建基于生物系统启发的抽象信息处理模型，采用非线性群体编码与两种生物合理损失函数，通过无监督学习实现。
AI.result: 模型在效率上优于当代深度学习方法，且与生物视觉系统特征高度相似，验证了理论有效性。
AI.conclusion: 为早期视觉系统计算理论提供新视角，并可能推动深度学习效率优化的创新方法。

authors_text: Amit Kumar Chaudhary,Alex J. Lucassen,Ioanna Tsani,Alberto Testoni
title: Are Current Decoding Strategies Capable of Facing the Challenges of Visual Dialogue?
title_zh: 当前的解码策略能够应对视觉对话的挑战吗？
abstract: Decoding strategies play a crucial role in natural language generation systems. They are usually designed and evaluated in open-ended text-only tasks, and it is not clear how different strategies handle the numerous challenges that goal-oriented multimodal systems face (such as grounding and informativeness). To answer this question, we compare a wide variety of different decoding strategies and hyper-parameter configurations in a Visual Dialogue referential game. Although none of them successfully balance lexical richness, accuracy in the task, and visual grounding, our in-depth analysis allows us to highlight the strengths and weaknesses of each decoding strategy. We believe our findings and suggestions may serve as a starting point for designing more effective decoding algorithms that handle the challenges of Visual Dialogue tasks.
summary: Decoding strategies play a crucial role in natural language generation systems. They are usually designed and evaluated in open-ended text-only tasks, and it is not clear how different strategies handle the numerous challenges that goal-oriented multimodal systems face (such as grounding and informativeness). To answer this question, we compare a wide variety of different decoding strategies and hyper-parameter configurations in a Visual Dialogue referential game. Although none of them successfully balance lexical richness, accuracy in the task, and visual grounding, our in-depth analysis allows us to highlight the strengths and weaknesses of each decoding strategy. We believe our findings and suggestions may serve as a starting point for designing more effective decoding algorithms that handle the challenges of Visual Dialogue tasks.
abstract_zh: 解码策略在自然语言生成系统中起着至关重要的作用。它们通常是在开放式纯文本任务中设计和评估的，目前尚不清楚不同的策略如何应对面向目标的多模态系统面临的众多挑战（例如基础和信息性）。为了回答这个问题，我们在视觉对话参考游戏中比较了各种不同的解码策略和超参数配置。尽管它们都没有成功地平衡词汇丰富性、任务准确性和视觉基础，但我们的深入分析使我们能够突出每种解码策略的优点和缺点。我们相信我们的发现和建议可以作为设计更有效的解码算法来应对视觉对话任务挑战的起点。

AI.tldr: 本文评估当前解码策略在视觉对话任务中的表现，探讨其是否能应对多模态挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有解码策略多针对文本任务设计，但视觉对话等多模态任务面临grounding和信息量等新挑战，需针对性分析。
AI.method: 通过视觉对话指称游戏，对比多种解码策略及超参数配置，评估其在词汇丰富性、任务准确性和视觉grounding上的表现。
AI.result: 所有策略均无法平衡三方面指标，但分析揭示了各策略的优劣势，如采样策略在多样性与准确性间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为设计更适应视觉对话任务的解码算法提供了方向与改进建议。

authors_text: Dacheng Yin,Zhiyuan Zhao,Chuanxin Tang,Zhiwei Xiong,Chong Luo
title: TridentSE: Guiding Speech Enhancement with 32 Global Tokens
title_zh: TridentSE：使用 32 个全球代币增强指导语音
abstract: In this paper, we present TridentSE, a novel architecture for speech enhancement, which is capable of efficiently capturing both global information and local details. TridentSE maintains T-F bin level representation to capture details, and uses a small number of global tokens to process the global information. Information is propagated between the local and the global representations through cross attention modules. To capture both inter- and intra-frame information, the global tokens are divided into two groups to process along the time and the frequency axis respectively. A metric discriminator is further employed to guide our model to achieve higher perceptual quality. Even with significantly lower computational cost, TridentSE outperforms a variety of previous speech enhancement methods, achieving a PESQ of 3.47 on VoiceBank+DEMAND dataset and a PESQ of 3.44 on DNS no-reverb test set. Visualization shows that the global tokens learn diverse and interpretable global patterns.
summary: In this paper, we present TridentSE, a novel architecture for speech enhancement, which is capable of efficiently capturing both global information and local details. TridentSE maintains T-F bin level representation to capture details, and uses a small number of global tokens to process the global information. Information is propagated between the local and the global representations through cross attention modules. To capture both inter- and intra-frame information, the global tokens are divided into two groups to process along the time and the frequency axis respectively. A metric discriminator is further employed to guide our model to achieve higher perceptual quality. Even with significantly lower computational cost, TridentSE outperforms a variety of previous speech enhancement methods, achieving a PESQ of 3.47 on VoiceBank+DEMAND dataset and a PESQ of 3.44 on DNS no-reverb test set. Visualization shows that the global tokens learn diverse and interpretable global patterns.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 TridentSE，一种新颖的语音增强架构，能够有效捕获全局信息和局部细节。 TridentSE 维护 T-F bin 级别表示来捕获细节，并使用少量全局令牌来处理全局信息。信息通过交叉注意模块在局部和全局表示之间传播。为了捕获帧间和帧内信息，全局令牌被分为两组，分别沿时间轴和频率轴进行处理。进一步采用度量鉴别器来指导我们的模型实现更高的感知质量。即使计算成本显着降低，TridentSE 的性能也优于之前的各种语音增强方法，在 VoiceBank+DEMAND 数据集上实现了 3.47 的 PESQ，在 DNS 无混响测试集上实现了 3.44 的 PESQ。可视化表明，全局令牌学习多样化且可解释的全局模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TridentSE语音增强架构，通过32个全局token高效捕捉全局信息与局部细节。
AI.motivation: 传统语音增强方法难以平衡全局信息建模与局部细节保留，且计算成本较高。
AI.method: 采用时频-bin级表示保留细节，通过分组全局token分别处理时间/频率轴信息，结合交叉注意力模块与度量判别器优化感知质量。
AI.result: 在VoiceBank+DEMAND数据集达到3.47 PESQ，在DNS无混响测试集达3.44 PESQ，计算成本显著低于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: TridentSE通过全局token分组机制与跨模态注意力有效提升语音增强效果，且具有良好的可解释性。

authors_text: Maximilian Bernhard,Matthias Schubert
title: Robust Object Detection in Remote Sensing Imagery with Noisy and Sparse Geo-Annotations (Full Version)
title_zh: 具有噪声和稀疏地理注释的遥感图像中的鲁棒目标检测（完整版）
abstract: Recently, the availability of remote sensing imagery from aerial vehicles and satellites constantly improved. For an automated interpretation of such data, deep-learning-based object detectors achieve state-of-the-art performance. However, established object detectors require complete, precise, and correct bounding box annotations for training. In order to create the necessary training annotations for object detectors, imagery can be georeferenced and combined with data from other sources, such as points of interest localized by GPS sensors. Unfortunately, this combination often leads to poor object localization and missing annotations. Therefore, training object detectors with such data often results in insufficient detection performance. In this paper, we present a novel approach for training object detectors with extremely noisy and incomplete annotations. Our method is based on a teacher-student learning framework and a correction module accounting for imprecise and missing annotations. Thus, our method is easy to use and can be combined with arbitrary object detectors. We demonstrate that our approach improves standard detectors by 37.1\% $AP_{50}$ on a noisy real-world remote-sensing dataset. Furthermore, our method achieves great performance gains on two datasets with synthetic noise. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/mxbh/robust_object_detection}.
summary: Recently, the availability of remote sensing imagery from aerial vehicles and satellites constantly improved. For an automated interpretation of such data, deep-learning-based object detectors achieve state-of-the-art performance. However, established object detectors require complete, precise, and correct bounding box annotations for training. In order to create the necessary training annotations for object detectors, imagery can be georeferenced and combined with data from other sources, such as points of interest localized by GPS sensors. Unfortunately, this combination often leads to poor object localization and missing annotations. Therefore, training object detectors with such data often results in insufficient detection performance. In this paper, we present a novel approach for training object detectors with extremely noisy and incomplete annotations. Our method is based on a teacher-student learning framework and a correction module accounting for imprecise and missing annotations. Thus, our method is easy to use and can be combined with arbitrary object detectors. We demonstrate that our approach improves standard detectors by 37.1\% $AP_{50}$ on a noisy real-world remote-sensing dataset. Furthermore, our method achieves great performance gains on two datasets with synthetic noise. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/mxbh/robust_object_detection}.
abstract_zh: 近年来，航空器和卫星遥感图像的可用性不断提高。为了自动解释此类数据，基于深度学习的物体检测器实现了最先进的性能。然而，已建立的目标检测器需要完整、精确和正确的边界框注释来进行训练。为了为物体检测器创建必要的训练注释，可以对图像进行地理配准并与其他来源的数据（例如由 GPS 传感器定位的兴趣点）相结合。不幸的是，这种组合通常会导致对象定位不佳和注释缺失。因此，使用此类数据训练目标检测器通常会导致检测性能不足。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的方法来训练具有极其嘈杂和不完整注释的目标检测器。我们的方法基于师生学习框架和纠正不精确和缺失注释的模块。因此，我们的方法易于使用，并且可以与任意物体检测器结合。我们证明，我们的方法在嘈杂的现实世界遥感数据集上将标准检测器提高了 37.1\% $AP_{50}$。此外，我们的方法在两个具有合成噪声的数据集上取得了巨大的性能提升。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/mxbh/robust_object_detection} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在存在噪声和稀疏地理标注的遥感图像中训练鲁棒物体检测器的新方法。
AI.motivation: 传统物体检测器依赖完整精确的标注，但遥感图像通过地理配准等方法生成的标注常存在定位偏差和缺失，导致检测性能不足。
AI.method: 基于教师-学生学习框架，结合校正模块处理不精确和缺失的标注，方法可兼容任意物体检测器。
AI.result: 在真实世界遥感数据集上将标准检测器性能提升37.1% AP50，合成噪声数据集也取得显著提升，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了噪声和稀疏标注问题，显著提升检测性能，适用于多种检测器且具有广泛适用性。

Therefore, training object detectors with such data often results in insufficient detection performance. In this paper, we present a novel approach for training object detectors with extremely noisy and incomplete annotations. Our method is based on a teacher-student learning framework and a correction module accounting for imprecise and missing annotations. Thus, our method is easy to use and can be combined with arbitrary object detectors. We demonstrate that our approach improves standard detectors by 37.1\% $AP_{50}$ on a noisy real-world remote-sensing dataset. Furthermore, our method achieves great performance gains on two datasets with synthetic noise. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/mxbh/robust_object_detection}. 近年来，航空器和卫星遥感图像的可用性不断提高。为了自动解释此类数据，基于深度学习的物体检测器实现了最先进的性能。然而，已建立的目标检测器需要完整、精确和正确的边界框注释来进行训练。为了为物体检测器创建必要的训练注释，可以对图像进行地理配准并与其他来源的数据（例如由 GPS 传感器定位的兴趣点）相结合。不幸的是，这种组合通常会导致对象定位不佳和注释缺失。因此，使用此类数据训练目标检测器通常会导致检测性能不足。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的方法来训练具有极其嘈杂和不完整注释的目标检测器。我们的方法基于师生学习框架和纠正不精确和缺失注释的模块。因此，我们的方法易于使用，并且可以与任意物体检测器结合。我们证明，我们的方法在嘈杂的现实世界遥感数据集上将标准检测器提高了 37.1\% $AP_{50}$。此外，我们的方法在两个具有合成噪声的数据集上取得了巨大的性能提升。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/mxbh/robust_object_detection} 获取。 本文提出一种在存在噪声和稀疏地理标注的遥感图像中训练鲁棒物体检测器的新方法。 Maximilian Bernhard,Matthias Schubert cs.CV

authors_text: Dahye Kim,Jungin Park,Jiyoung Lee,Seongheon Park,Kwanghoon Sohn
title: Language-free Training for Zero-shot Video Grounding
title_zh: 零镜头视频接地的无语言培训
abstract: Given an untrimmed video and a language query depicting a specific temporal moment in the video, video grounding aims to localize the time interval by understanding the text and video simultaneously. One of the most challenging issues is an extremely time- and cost-consuming annotation collection, including video captions in a natural language form and their corresponding temporal regions. In this paper, we present a simple yet novel training framework for video grounding in the zero-shot setting, which learns a network with only video data without any annotation. Inspired by the recent language-free paradigm, i.e. training without language data, we train the network without compelling the generation of fake (pseudo) text queries into a natural language form. Specifically, we propose a method for learning a video grounding model by selecting a temporal interval as a hypothetical correct answer and considering the visual feature selected by our method in the interval as a language feature, with the help of the well-aligned visual-language space of CLIP. Extensive experiments demonstrate the prominence of our language-free training framework, outperforming the existing zero-shot video grounding method and even several weakly-supervised approaches with large margins on two standard datasets.
summary: Given an untrimmed video and a language query depicting a specific temporal moment in the video, video grounding aims to localize the time interval by understanding the text and video simultaneously. One of the most challenging issues is an extremely time- and cost-consuming annotation collection, including video captions in a natural language form and their corresponding temporal regions. In this paper, we present a simple yet novel training framework for video grounding in the zero-shot setting, which learns a network with only video data without any annotation. Inspired by the recent language-free paradigm, i.e. training without language data, we train the network without compelling the generation of fake (pseudo) text queries into a natural language form. Specifically, we propose a method for learning a video grounding model by selecting a temporal interval as a hypothetical correct answer and considering the visual feature selected by our method in the interval as a language feature, with the help of the well-aligned visual-language space of CLIP. Extensive experiments demonstrate the prominence of our language-free training framework, outperforming the existing zero-shot video grounding method and even several weakly-supervised approaches with large margins on two standard datasets.
abstract_zh: 给定未修剪的视频和描述视频中特定时间时刻的语言查询，视频接地旨在通过同时理解文本和视频来定位时间间隔。最具挑战性的问题之一是极其耗时和昂贵的注释集合，包括自然语言形式的视频字幕及其相应的时间区域。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而新颖的零镜头设置下的视频基础训练框架，该框架仅使用视频数据而不使用任何注释来学习网络。受最近的无语言范例（即无需语言数据的训练）的启发，我们训练网络时无需强制将假（伪）文本查询生成为自然语言形式。具体来说，我们提出了一种学习视频基础模型的方法，通过选择一个时间间隔作为假设的正确答案，并借助 CLIP 良好对齐的视觉语言空间，将我们的方法在该间隔中选择的视觉特征视为语言特征。大量的实验证明了我们的无语言训练框架的重要性，优于现有的零样本视频接地方法，甚至优于在两个标准数据集上具有较大裕度的几种弱监督方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需语言标注的零样本视频定位训练框架
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖耗时耗力的自然语言标注，本文旨在无需语言标注的情况下实现零样本视频定位
AI.method: 通过CLIP的视觉-语言对齐空间，无需生成伪文本，直接利用视觉特征作为语言特征进行训练
AI.result: 在两个标准数据集上显著优于现有零样本和弱监督方法
AI.conclusion: 验证了语言无关训练框架在零样本视频定位中的有效性

authors_text: Biao Zhang,Shuqin Zhang
title: Investigating Neuron Disturbing in Fusing Heterogeneous Neural Networks
title_zh: 研究融合异构神经网络中的神经元干扰
abstract: Fusing deep learning models trained on separately located clients into a global model in a one-shot communication round is a straightforward implementation of Federated Learning. Although current model fusion methods are shown experimentally valid in fusing neural networks with almost identical architectures, they are rarely theoretically analyzed. In this paper, we reveal the phenomenon of neuron disturbing, where neurons from heterogeneous local models interfere with each other mutually. We give detailed explanations from a Bayesian viewpoint combining the data heterogeneity among clients and properties of neural networks. Furthermore, to validate our findings, we propose an experimental method that excludes neuron disturbing and fuses neural networks via adaptively selecting a local model, called AMS, to execute the prediction according to the input. The experiments demonstrate that AMS is more robust in data heterogeneity than general model fusion and ensemble methods. This implies the necessity of considering neural disturbing in model fusion. Besides, AMS is available for fusing models with varying architectures as an experimental algorithm, and we also list several possible extensions of AMS for future work.
summary: Fusing deep learning models trained on separately located clients into a global model in a one-shot communication round is a straightforward implementation of Federated Learning. Although current model fusion methods are shown experimentally valid in fusing neural networks with almost identical architectures, they are rarely theoretically analyzed. In this paper, we reveal the phenomenon of neuron disturbing, where neurons from heterogeneous local models interfere with each other mutually. We give detailed explanations from a Bayesian viewpoint combining the data heterogeneity among clients and properties of neural networks. Furthermore, to validate our findings, we propose an experimental method that excludes neuron disturbing and fuses neural networks via adaptively selecting a local model, called AMS, to execute the prediction according to the input. The experiments demonstrate that AMS is more robust in data heterogeneity than general model fusion and ensemble methods. This implies the necessity of considering neural disturbing in model fusion. Besides, AMS is available for fusing models with varying architectures as an experimental algorithm, and we also list several possible extensions of AMS for future work.
abstract_zh: 在一次性通信中将在不同位置的客户端上训练的深度学习模型融合到全局模型中是联邦学习的一种直接实现。尽管当前的模型融合方法在融合具有几乎相同架构的神经网络方面经实验证明是有效的，但它们很少在理论上进行分析。在本文中，我们揭示了神经元干扰现象，即来自异构局部模型的神经元相互干扰。我们从贝叶斯的角度结合客户端之间的数据异构性和神经网络的特性给出了详细的解释。此外，为了验证我们的发现，我们提出了一种实验方法，通过自适应选择称为 AMS 的本地模型来根据输入执行预测，从而排除神经元干扰并融合神经网络。实验表明，AMS 在数据异质性方面比一般模型融合和集成方法更稳健。这意味着在模型融合中考虑神经干扰的必要性。此外，AMS 可作为实验算法用于融合不同架构的模型，我们还列出了 AMS 的几种可能的扩展以供将来的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了异构神经网络融合中的神经元干扰现象，并提出了一种自适应模型选择方法AMS以提高模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型融合方法在处理异构模型时缺乏理论分析，且在数据异质性环境下鲁棒性不足，需探索更有效的融合策略。
AI.method: 提出AMS方法，通过自适应选择本地模型进行预测，以消除神经元干扰并提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，AMS在数据异质性环境下比传统模型融合和集成方法更稳健，并可应用于不同架构模型的融合。
AI.conclusion: 神经元干扰在模型融合中不可忽视，AMS方法有效缓解了该问题，并为未来研究提供了扩展方向。

authors_text: Nan Xue,Tianfu Wu,Song Bai,Fu-Dong Wang,Gui-Song Xia,Liangpei Zhang,Philip H. S. Torr
title: Holistically-Attracted Wireframe Parsing: From Supervised to Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 整体吸引的线框解析：从监督学习到自监督学习
comment: Journal extension of arXiv:2003.01663; Accepted by IEEE TPAMI; Code is available at https://github.com/cherubicxn/hawp
comments: Journal extension of arXiv:2003.01663; Accepted by IEEE TPAMI; Code is available at https://github.com/cherubicxn/hawp
abstract: This article presents Holistically-Attracted Wireframe Parsing (HAWP), a method for geometric analysis of 2D images containing wireframes formed by line segments and junctions. HAWP utilizes a parsimonious Holistic Attraction (HAT) field representation that encodes line segments using a closed-form 4D geometric vector field. The proposed HAWP consists of three sequential components empowered by end-to-end and HAT-driven designs: (1) generating a dense set of line segments from HAT fields and endpoint proposals from heatmaps, (2) binding the dense line segments to sparse endpoint proposals to produce initial wireframes, and (3) filtering false positive proposals through a novel endpoint-decoupled line-of-interest aligning (EPD LOIAlign) module that captures the co-occurrence between endpoint proposals and HAT fields for better verification. Thanks to our novel designs, HAWPv2 shows strong performance in fully supervised learning, while HAWPv3 excels in self-supervised learning, achieving superior repeatability scores and efficient training (24 GPU hours on a single GPU). Furthermore, HAWPv3 exhibits a promising potential for wireframe parsing in out-of-distribution images without providing ground truth labels of wireframes.
summary: This article presents Holistically-Attracted Wireframe Parsing (HAWP), a method for geometric analysis of 2D images containing wireframes formed by line segments and junctions. HAWP utilizes a parsimonious Holistic Attraction (HAT) field representation that encodes line segments using a closed-form 4D geometric vector field. The proposed HAWP consists of three sequential components empowered by end-to-end and HAT-driven designs: (1) generating a dense set of line segments from HAT fields and endpoint proposals from heatmaps, (2) binding the dense line segments to sparse endpoint proposals to produce initial wireframes, and (3) filtering false positive proposals through a novel endpoint-decoupled line-of-interest aligning (EPD LOIAlign) module that captures the co-occurrence between endpoint proposals and HAT fields for better verification. Thanks to our novel designs, HAWPv2 shows strong performance in fully supervised learning, while HAWPv3 excels in self-supervised learning, achieving superior repeatability scores and efficient training (24 GPU hours on a single GPU). Furthermore, HAWPv3 exhibits a promising potential for wireframe parsing in out-of-distribution images without providing ground truth labels of wireframes.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了整体吸引线框解析 (HAWP)，这是一种对包含由线段和连接点形成的线框的 2D 图像进行几何分析的方法。 HAWP 利用简约的整体吸引 (HAT) 场表示，使用封闭形式 4D 几何矢量场对线段进行编码。所提出的 HAWP 由端到端和 HAT 驱动设计支持的三个连续组件组成：(1) 从 HAT 字段生成一组密集线段，并从热图生成端点建议，(2) 将密集线段绑定到稀疏端点建议以生成初始线框，(3) 通过新颖的端点解耦兴趣线对齐 (EPD LOIAlign) 模块过滤误报建议，该模块捕获端点建议和 HAT 字段之间的共现情况，以便更好地进行验证。得益于我们新颖的设计，HAWPv2 在完全监督学习方面表现出强大的性能，而 HAWPv3 在自监督学习方面表现出色，实现了卓越的可重复性分数和高效训练（单个 GPU 上 24 个 GPU 小时）。此外，HAWPv3 在不提供线框的真实标签的情况下，在分布外图像中展现出线框解析的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HAWP的几何分析方法，用于解析包含线段和节点的2D图像中的线框结构，通过引入紧凑的全向吸引力（HAT）场表示和端点解耦的线兴趣对齐模块，实现了从监督学习到自监督学习的高效线框解析。
AI.motivation: 传统线框解析方法依赖于复杂的标注数据和监督学习，难以处理无标签或分布外图像。本文旨在开发一种更高效、鲁棒的线框解析框架，支持监督与自监督学习，并提升在无标注场景下的泛化能力。
AI.method: HAWP方法包含三个核心组件：1）通过HAT场和热图生成密集线段及端点候选；2）将密集线段绑定到稀疏端点生成初始线框；3）利用EPD LOIAlign模块通过端点与HAT场的共现关系过滤误检。HAWPv2专注于监督学习，HAWPv3则通过自监督学习优化，减少训练时间并提升泛化性。
AI.result: HAWPv2在监督学习任务中表现出色，而HAWPv3在自监督学习中达到更优的重复性得分（24小时单GPU训练），且无需标注即可处理分布外图像，验证了其高效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HAWP通过创新的HAT场和EPD LOIAlign模块，为线框解析提供了从监督到自监督的统一框架，尤其在无标签场景下展现出显著优势，为几何视觉任务提供了新思路。

search_text: Holistically-Attracted Wireframe Parsing: From Supervised to Self-Supervised Learning 整体吸引的线框解析：从监督学习到自监督学习 This article presents Holistically-Attracted Wireframe Parsing (HAWP), a method for geometric analysis of 2D images containing wireframes formed by line segments and junctions. HAWP utilizes a parsimonious Holistic Attraction (HAT) field representation that encodes line segments using a closed-form 4D geometric vector field. The proposed HAWP consists of three sequential components empowered by end-to-end and HAT-driven designs: (1) generating a dense set of line segments from HAT fields and endpoint proposals from heatmaps, (2) binding the dense line segments to sparse endpoint proposals to produce initial wireframes, and (3) filtering false positive proposals through a novel endpoint-decoupled line-of-interest aligning (EPD LOIAlign) module that captures the co-occurrence between endpoint proposals and HAT fields for better verification. Thanks to our novel designs, HAWPv2 shows strong performance in fully supervised learning, while HAWPv3 excels in self-supervised learning, achieving superior repeatability scores and efficient training (24 GPU hours on a single GPU). Furthermore, HAWPv3 exhibits a promising potential for wireframe parsing in out-of-distribution images without providing ground truth labels of wireframes. 本文介绍了整体吸引线框解析 (HAWP)，这是一种对包含由线段和连接点形成的线框的 2D 图像进行几何分析的方法。 HAWP 利用简约的整体吸引 (HAT) 场表示，使用封闭形式 4D 几何矢量场对线段进行编码。所提出的 HAWP 由端到端和 HAT 驱动设计支持的三个连续组件组成：(1) 从 HAT 字段生成一组密集线段，并从热图生成端点建议，(2) 将密集线段绑定到稀疏端点建议以生成初始线框，(3) 通过新颖的端点解耦兴趣线对齐 (EPD LOIAlign) 模块过滤误报建议，该模块捕获端点建议和 HAT 字段之间的共现情况，以便更好地进行验证。得益于我们新颖的设计，HAWPv2 在完全监督学习方面表现出强大的性能，而 HAWPv3 在自监督学习方面表现出色，实现了卓越的可重复性分数和高效训练（单个 GPU 上 24 个 GPU 小时）。此外，HAWPv3 在不提供线框的真实标签的情况下，在分布外图像中展现出线框解析的巨大潜力。 本文提出了一种名为HAWP的几何分析方法，用于解析包含线段和节点的2D图像中的线框结构，通过引入紧凑的全向吸引力（HAT）场表示和端点解耦的线兴趣对齐模块，实现了从监督学习到自监督学习的高效线框解析。 Nan Xue,Tianfu Wu,Song Bai,Fu-Dong Wang,Gui-Song Xia,Liangpei Zhang,Philip H. S. Torr cs.CV

authors_text: Johannes Ackermann,Minjun Li
title: High-Resolution Image Editing via Multi-Stage Blended Diffusion
title_zh: 通过多级混合扩散进行高分辨率图像编辑
comment: Machine Learning for Creativity and Design Workshop at NeurIPS 2022
comments: Machine Learning for Creativity and Design Workshop at NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Diffusion models have shown great results in image generation and in image editing. However, current approaches are limited to low resolutions due to the computational cost of training diffusion models for high-resolution generation. We propose an approach that uses a pre-trained low-resolution diffusion model to edit images in the megapixel range. We first use Blended Diffusion to edit the image at a low resolution, and then upscale it in multiple stages, using a super-resolution model and Blended Diffusion. Using our approach, we achieve higher visual fidelity than by only applying off the shelf super-resolution methods to the output of the diffusion model. We also obtain better global consistency than directly using the diffusion model at a higher resolution.
summary: Diffusion models have shown great results in image generation and in image editing. However, current approaches are limited to low resolutions due to the computational cost of training diffusion models for high-resolution generation. We propose an approach that uses a pre-trained low-resolution diffusion model to edit images in the megapixel range. We first use Blended Diffusion to edit the image at a low resolution, and then upscale it in multiple stages, using a super-resolution model and Blended Diffusion. Using our approach, we achieve higher visual fidelity than by only applying off the shelf super-resolution methods to the output of the diffusion model. We also obtain better global consistency than directly using the diffusion model at a higher resolution.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型在图像生成和图像编辑方面显示出了很好的效果。然而，由于训练高分辨率生成扩散模型的计算成本，当前的方法仅限于低分辨率。我们提出了一种使用预先训练的低分辨率扩散模型来编辑百万像素范围内的图像的方法。我们首先使用混合扩散以低分辨率编辑图像，然后使用超分辨率模型和混合扩散分多个阶段对其进行放大。使用我们的方法，与仅将现成的超分辨率方法应用于扩散模型的输出相比，我们获得了更高的视觉保真度。与直接使用更高分辨率的扩散模型相比，我们还获得了更好的全局一致性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段混合扩散方法，实现高分辨率图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型因计算成本限制无法高效处理高分辨率图像编辑任务。
AI.method: 先使用预训练低分辨率扩散模型进行图像编辑，再通过多阶段超分辨率模型和混合扩散逐步放大图像。
AI.result: 相比直接超分辨率方法和高分辨率扩散模型，该方法在视觉保真度和全局一致性上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 多阶段混合扩散方法有效平衡了高分辨率图像编辑的质量与计算效率。

authors_text: Oshan Jayawardana,Fariza Rashid,Suranga Seneviratne
title: Non-Contrastive Learning-based Behavioural Biometrics for Smart IoT Devices
title_zh: 适用于智能物联网设备的非对比学习行为生物识别
abstract: Behaviour biometrics are being explored as a viable alternative to overcome the limitations of traditional authentication methods such as passwords and static biometrics. Also, they are being considered as a viable authentication method for IoT devices such as smart headsets with AR/VR capabilities, wearables, and erables, that do not have a large form factor or the ability to seamlessly interact with the user. Recent behavioural biometric solutions use deep learning models that require large amounts of annotated training data. Collecting such volumes of behaviour biometrics data raises privacy and usability concerns. To this end, we propose using SimSiam-based non-contrastive self-supervised learning to improve the label efficiency of behavioural biometric systems. The key idea is to use large volumes of unlabelled (and anonymised) data to build good feature extractors that can be subsequently used in supervised settings. Using two EEG datasets, we show that at lower amounts of labelled data, non-contrastive learning performs 4%-11% more than conventional methods such as supervised learning and data augmentation. We also show that, in general, self-supervised learning methods perform better than other baselines. Finally, through careful experimentation, we show various modifications that can be incorporated into the non-contrastive learning process to archive high performance.
summary: Behaviour biometrics are being explored as a viable alternative to overcome the limitations of traditional authentication methods such as passwords and static biometrics. Also, they are being considered as a viable authentication method for IoT devices such as smart headsets with AR/VR capabilities, wearables, and erables, that do not have a large form factor or the ability to seamlessly interact with the user. Recent behavioural biometric solutions use deep learning models that require large amounts of annotated training data. Collecting such volumes of behaviour biometrics data raises privacy and usability concerns. To this end, we propose using SimSiam-based non-contrastive self-supervised learning to improve the label efficiency of behavioural biometric systems. The key idea is to use large volumes of unlabelled (and anonymised) data to build good feature extractors that can be subsequently used in supervised settings. Using two EEG datasets, we show that at lower amounts of labelled data, non-contrastive learning performs 4%-11% more than conventional methods such as supervised learning and data augmentation. We also show that, in general, self-supervised learning methods perform better than other baselines. Finally, through careful experimentation, we show various modifications that can be incorporated into the non-contrastive learning process to archive high performance.
abstract_zh: 人们正在探索行为生物识别技术作为一种可行的替代方案，以克服密码和静态生物识别等传统身份验证方法的局限性。此外，它们还被认为是物联网设备的可行身份验证方法，例如具有 AR/VR 功能的智能耳机、可穿戴设备和可穿戴设备，这些设备没有大尺寸或无法与用户无缝交互。最近的行为生物识别解决方案使用需要大量带注释的训练数据的深度学习模型。收集如此大量的行为生物识别数据会引发隐私和可用性问题。为此，我们建议使用基于SimSiam的非对比自监督学习来提高行为生物识别系统的标签效率。关键思想是使用大量未标记（和匿名）数据来构建良好的特征提取器，随后可以在监督设置中使用。使用两个 EEG 数据集，我们表明，在标记数据量较少的情况下，非对比学习的性能比监督学习和数据增强等传统方法高 4%-11%。我们还表明，一般来说，自我监督学习方法比其他基线表现更好。最后，通过仔细的实验​​，我们展示了可以纳入非对比学习过程以实现高性能的各种修改。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于非对比学习的自监督方法，以提高物联网设备行为生物特征识别系统的标签效率。
AI.motivation: 传统认证方法存在隐私和可用性问题，而物联网设备受限于体积和交互能力，难以收集大量标注数据。
AI.method: 采用SimSiam框架的非对比自监督学习，利用未标注的匿名数据训练特征提取器，再在监督场景中使用。
AI.result: 在两个EEG数据集上，该方法在标注数据较少时比监督学习和数据增强方法高出4%-11%，且自监督方法整体优于其他基线。
AI.conclusion: 非对比自监督学习能有效提升行为生物特征系统的性能，减少对标注数据的依赖，且可通过优化学习过程进一步提升效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出基于非对比学习的自监督方法，以提高物联网设备行为生物特征识别系统的标签效率。
ai_content.motivation: 传统认证方法存在隐私和可用性问题，而物联网设备受限于体积和交互能力，难以收集大量标注数据。
ai_content.method: 采用SimSiam框架的非对比自监督学习，利用未标注的匿名数据训练特征提取器，再在监督场景中使用。

search_text: Non-Contrastive Learning-based Behavioural Biometrics for Smart IoT Devices 适用于智能物联网设备的非对比学习行为生物识别 Behaviour biometrics are being explored as a viable alternative to overcome the limitations of traditional authentication methods such as passwords and static biometrics. Also, they are being considered as a viable authentication method for IoT devices such as smart headsets with AR/VR capabilities, wearables, and erables, that do not have a large form factor or the ability to seamlessly interact with the user. Recent behavioural biometric solutions use deep learning models that require large amounts of annotated training data. Collecting such volumes of behaviour biometrics data raises privacy and usability concerns. To this end, we propose using SimSiam-based non-contrastive self-supervised learning to improve the label efficiency of behavioural biometric systems. The key idea is to use large volumes of unlabelled (and anonymised) data to build good feature extractors that can be subsequently used in supervised settings. Using two EEG datasets, we show that at lower amounts of labelled data, non-contrastive learning performs 4%-11% more than conventional methods such as supervised learning and data augmentation. We also show that, in general, self-supervised learning methods perform better than other baselines. Finally, through careful experimentation, we show various modifications that can be incorporated into the non-contrastive learning process to archive high performance. 人们正在探索行为生物识别技术作为一种可行的替代方案，以克服密码和静态生物识别等传统身份验证方法的局限性。此外，它们还被认为是物联网设备的可行身份验证方法，例如具有 AR/VR 功能的智能耳机、可穿戴设备和可穿戴设备，这些设备没有大尺寸或无法与用户无缝交互。最近的行为生物识别解决方案使用需要大量带注释的训练数据的深度学习模型。收集如此大量的行为生物识别数据会引发隐私和可用性问题。为此，我们建议使用基于SimSiam的非对比自监督学习来提高行为生物识别系统的标签效率。关键思想是使用大量未标记（和匿名）数据来构建良好的特征提取器，随后可以在监督设置中使用。使用两个 EEG 数据集，我们表明，在标记数据量较少的情况下，非对比学习的性能比监督学习和数据增强等传统方法高 4%-11%。我们还表明，一般来说，自我监督学习方法比其他基线表现更好。最后，通过仔细的实验​​，我们展示了可以纳入非对比学习过程以实现高性能的各种修改。 本文提出基于非对比学习的自监督方法，以提高物联网设备行为生物特征识别系统的标签效率。 Oshan Jayawardana,Fariza Rashid,Suranga Seneviratne cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Farhan Ahmed,Pratik Vaishnavi,Kevin Eykholt,Amir Rahmati
title: Ares: A System-Oriented Wargame Framework for Adversarial ML
title_zh: Ares：面向系统的对抗性机器学习战争游戏框架
comment: Presented at the DLS Workshop at S&P 2022
comments: Presented at the DLS Workshop at S&P 2022
abstract: Since the discovery of adversarial attacks against machine learning models nearly a decade ago, research on adversarial machine learning has rapidly evolved into an eternal war between defenders, who seek to increase the robustness of ML models against adversarial attacks, and adversaries, who seek to develop better attacks capable of weakening or defeating these defenses. This domain, however, has found little buy-in from ML practitioners, who are neither overtly concerned about these attacks affecting their systems in the real world nor are willing to trade off the accuracy of their models in pursuit of robustness against these attacks. In this paper, we motivate the design and implementation of Ares, an evaluation framework for adversarial ML that allows researchers to explore attacks and defenses in a realistic wargame-like environment. Ares frames the conflict between the attacker and defender as two agents in a reinforcement learning environment with opposing objectives. This allows the introduction of system-level evaluation metrics such as time to failure and evaluation of complex strategies such as moving target defenses. We provide the results of our initial exploration involving a white-box attacker against an adversarially trained defender.
summary: Since the discovery of adversarial attacks against machine learning models nearly a decade ago, research on adversarial machine learning has rapidly evolved into an eternal war between defenders, who seek to increase the robustness of ML models against adversarial attacks, and adversaries, who seek to develop better attacks capable of weakening or defeating these defenses. This domain, however, has found little buy-in from ML practitioners, who are neither overtly concerned about these attacks affecting their systems in the real world nor are willing to trade off the accuracy of their models in pursuit of robustness against these attacks. In this paper, we motivate the design and implementation of Ares, an evaluation framework for adversarial ML that allows researchers to explore attacks and defenses in a realistic wargame-like environment. Ares frames the conflict between the attacker and defender as two agents in a reinforcement learning environment with opposing objectives. This allows the introduction of system-level evaluation metrics such as time to failure and evaluation of complex strategies such as moving target defenses. We provide the results of our initial exploration involving a white-box attacker against an adversarially trained defender.
abstract_zh: 自从近十年前发现针对机器学习模型的对抗性攻击以来，对抗性机器学习的研究迅速演变成一场永恒的战争，防御者寻求提高机器学习模型对抗对抗性攻击的鲁棒性，而对手则寻求开发能够削弱或击败这些防御的更好的攻击。然而，这个领域几乎没有得到机器学习从业者的认可，他们既没有公开担心这些攻击会影响他们在现实世界中的系统，也不愿意为了追求抵御这些攻击的鲁棒性而牺牲模型的准确性。在本文中，我们推动了 Ares 的设计和实现，这是一个对抗性机器学习的评估框架，允许研究人员在现实的类似战争游戏的环境中探索攻击和防御。阿瑞斯将攻击者和防御者之间的冲突描述为强化学习环境中具有相反目标的两个代理。这允许引入系统级评估指标，例如故障时间和复杂策略的评估，例如移动目标防御。我们提供了初步探索的结果，涉及白盒攻击者对抗经过对抗性训练的防御者。

AI.tldr: 设计并实现Ares框架，用于在真实战争游戏环境中评估对抗性机器学习的攻击与防御。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗性机器学习研究缺乏实践者参与，需真实环境评估以推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 构建基于强化学习的对抗环境，模拟攻击与防御代理，引入系统级评估指标和复杂防御策略。
AI.result: 初步实验显示白盒攻击者在对抗训练防御者中的攻击效果及防御机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Ares框架为对抗性机器学习提供了有效评估工具，有助于推动更鲁棒的防御策略研究。
